source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Cun n colf de scena ala ispetur Clouseau che degügn s'aspetâ, ai sëgn n'atra cossa da incecoché por Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Sará n iade dagnora dër d'ota tres i video dla secunda telecamera de de sora, deperpo che ai odü de curios l'Ispetur in pé söl fust dl'erbo dlungia la staziun dl mangé. Al sciurâ tres entourn, ciafanel dlungia la dodes porchël pënsei al lüch (modificaziun) ch'al i jise do, sciöche ai ti al lassa fá val'iade, inant ch'i m'un sciüre d'azident...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

L'ispetur Clouseau fô dailó, a se revolor d'ota sciöche n mat a ca. 2 metri a nord-est dl'erbo, scialdi dacossé dala storta posiziun dl post de ost dla tenda. Impó fôl dailó por 5 menüts, te chël momënt ch'al é sciuré deretoba söl erbo, al é jü tres l pré cina la colrina, al s'á fat plat jö bas, y spo él sciuré demez dala telecamera, d'ota te mez a chël ch'an ti dij "The Zoomies".
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Sëgn, sciöche deplü de mi leturs de Spooky Kitties Sciences sará bëgn, la rejon d'eser de chësc test n'é nia mé por devertí i iac. Scebën che l'aspet plü d'importanza é la sciomera de dert d'odëi i iac a se revolor d'ota te né, ói propi ciafé val' che ti sará jü de bel al Ispetur. Söi demez dales prömes proes mé cun un n momënt ch'al ess podü m'un dé da capí ch'al ti plajô val'. Chël ch'al fô é dër n mister.
3/

Impó fôl dailó por 5 menüts, te chël momënt ch'al é sciuré deretoba söl erbo, al é jü tres l pré cina la colrina, al s'á fat plat jö bas, y spo él sciuré demez dala telecamera, d'ota te mez a chël ch'an ti dij "The Zoomies".
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Sëgn, sciöche deplü de mi leturs de Spooky Kitties Sciences sará bëgn, la rejon d'eser de chësc test n'é nia mé por devertí i iac. Scebën che l'aspet plü d'importanza é la sciomera de dert d'odëi i iac a se revolor d'ota te né, ói propi ciafé val' che ti sará jü de bel al Ispetur. Söi demez dales prömes proes mé cun un n momënt ch'al ess podü m'un dé da capí ch'al ti plajô val'. Chël ch'al fô é dër n mister.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences
hypo_5:
Cun n colf de scena ala ispetur Clouseau che degügn s'aspetâ, ai sëgn n'atra cossa da incecoché por Spooky Kitties Sciences!
Sará n iade dagnora dër d'ota tres i video dla secunda telecamera de de sora, deperpo che ai odü de curios l'Ispetur in pé söl fust dl'erbo dlungia la staziun dl mangé. Al sciurâ tres entourn, ciafanel dlungia la dodes porchël pënsei al lüch (modificaziun) ch'al i jise do, sciöche ai ti al lassa fá val'iade, inant ch'i m'un sciüre d'azident...

What's the matter with you?
Are you in a trance or something?
You're in the wrong lane.
Oh, I'm sorry.
Helen.
There goes my whole week's salary.
I haven't had a full paycheck since Christmas.
Oh, that's all going to be changed tonight.
But, gee, what if they just say strike and leave us out on a limb?
They won't.
Our demands are reasonable.
Yeah.
If I lose this job, it'll mean pedaling, chewing gum and lead pencils for me.
I ain't a looker.

Oh, well, uh, you know, I figured since you like doing regular stuff, um, well, there's this dance at our school Friday night, and I was wondering, how'd you like to spend a really regular evening with a regular old me?
I'd love that.
I never get to go to high school dances.
Oh, really?
Well, look, now, don't get your hopes up, okay?
This ain't going to be some big, fancy evening.
In fact, you may need to give me a couple dollars for the gas.

source_doc:
I'm being weird.
But you.
Oh, I'm not too worried about that.
Being with you just now is so nice.
I mean, taking a trip to a regular grocery store with a regular guy.
In a regular limo?
Yeah, but it felt good to spend the afternoon.
That had nothing to do with the record business.
I mean, to get away from all those people who only act nice to you because they want something.
You run into a lot of those, huh?
Yeah.
Even my grandmother sends me demo tapes.
So what were you afraid was weird?

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

Un mi amich che sciöra tröp á metü na fopa de porpí da bagn de dagnöch olache al sciöra en col d'en ater mi amich s'á fat de mal sibe che al picâ sö i chedres y ala fin ál adoré la gessa dl'inzidënt y n pü' de gouache por stampé de bogn dessëgns sön les plates. Pora döt ci che te os porchëi: al va bën döt ci che te os che al jess.

@aurora Y spo... tolestes tö dötes chëstis cosses, y les colestes, les atachestes cun la piatrice, o les mëtstes te n liber? Ince sö por chësc?
I n'ái nia capí bën ci che suzed dales dales do, o porchëi.
A ddi la verité, te n scrapbooking n'unsciö gna por me.

@kagan Sci, al é propi insciö che al va fat! Sgora de spróc to cafè, bëna na podina d'inchioscior... döt ci che te pica. An dëssa döt fora de cencia s'en lascè sciampé chëles boles idées che an vëiga sön Pinterest o d'atri sers. Al se trata de documenté l'ativité inant che d'un d'un bel laur d'ert. Ador'l scicösc un de chëi tondins de demoliziun sce te os. Al depend döt de chël che al mët d'andament.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
Bun dé a düt le monn!
Incé doman jorone a la desciaria. Chësc desparagnará n valgünes cosses che trancé un metü d'anchëi söl stradun. Al m'inchietes nia chi s'co döt da n vaje sce nia chi s'portun la rorofes, mo la rorofes é plëna de fer por la desciaria d'or.
Plü tert podessi jé inant a cherié les casses.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Viazo ala desciaria fat, y n ater auto plën de patofles sciuré demez.
I á tut le nio asse de rorofes y motor de traziun de rorofes dales patofles de fer da sciuré demez. Chëst vö die che podun metü deplü fer da sciuré demez te l'auto y nia sciuré dles perts che i dles m'interessëia.
I m'pensi che, do, m'metarai a müté le fer da sciuré demez dal jort do cèsa te rorofes por ester pronti.
I prisc dl fer da sciuré demez nia n'é tgi bogn in chest moment, mo miú co nia, sce m'porté assá d'un n iade.
I á dancor d'ordonné le fer nia-ferus.

Chëla cossa canche t'es d'sciuré i gome marces dai pici, gragn dles gome di pici tratorns de jort....
Gragn sforz por desmuté un n lat de gome, mo al oara veramenter de rüscia söl ater lat de rim.
Nel temp che al á d'moré por l'desgancié, m'ái d'mentié che i l'ái bele fat söl ater lat, y al é sciurà che rim m'é gnü demez, mo döt dinfora dles gome!
I á d'vü d'muté dancor les gome söl chël lat, y do m'lauré d'atorn por fá gní demez rim.
I á d'vü taié la gome d'andré por la fá gní dancor demez!
M'dumandé cotantes dles gome ái dancor d'desmuté? Catr de fati cina sën.

source_doc:
Everything gone.
We lost Ray.
And you moved to Atlanta.
Well, I'm not in the best of health.
And my boys, they insisted that we move so that I could get the best medical care money.
Could buy the best care our money can buy is a heating pad and a bottle of aspirin.

I un pordü Ray.
Y tö t'es trasferé a Atlanta.
Bën, i n'un nia la mender sanité.
Y mi vari, ai á insisté che nos se trasferëghes insciö che i podess ciafé la miú assistënza medica por chi scioldi.

source_doc:
I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
La stala dl post tasta de davagné a Coffs cun cater partezipanc

L’atlet dl post Noel Mayfield-Smith spera de ciafé na jorndada davagnosa te l’incont de domënia a Coffs Harbour, cun cater ciavai dla stala che piia ia sön la carta de ot races.

L’alenadú, che á bele davagné na gara dl Group 1, pizará la jorndada tl secundo evënt dl dé cun Ausbred Yahoo che piia ia tl Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605 m), cun l’apevisant Ella Drew de dui chili che sará söl ciaval.

Le sport di ciavai mët dër man a Coffs Harbour de domënia.

Ausbred Yahoo á cors dër bun ultimamënter, cun n terzo post a Kempsey trëi gares ciavalades de n pe, spo dui secundi posć de riga a Coffs Harbour, l’ultimo canche al é stat batü dal rival de domënia Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith se colia cun n’andra apevisanta, Leanne Boyd de trëi chili, canche Never Island piia ia tl Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Vincitria de trëi de sües 15 gares, Never Island jorojará cun n pëis de 59,5 chili do la detraziun de Boyd. Never Island é stada batüda por de manco de na lunghezade canche ara é arivada secunda do Montgomery a Grafton, y á confermé la buna prestaziun cun n chinto post te süa ultima gara a Coffs Harbour do In The Fine Print, canche ara é indô stada batüda por de manco de na lungheza.

Raymond Spokes mët man söl ciaval Monte Cruise, alené da Mayfield-Smith, tl O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205 m).

Ince Monte Cruise á davagné por trëi iadi sön ma nü gares. Ara n’á nia cors da messas incá, canche ara é stada l’ultima de ot ciavai a Eagle Farm, y á fat dui dërc de pröva sön chësta pista por se preparé al retorn, arivan secunda do la vincitria de sabeda de Wyong, Petticoat, de riga d’avëi davagné l’ultimo de chi.

Mayfield-Smith complëta la jorndada canche al se colia indô cun Boyd, che jorojará söl ciaval Cardsharp tl Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Mayfield-Smith se colia cun n’andra aprenista, Leanne Boyd cun n deces de trëi chili, canche Never Island piia ia tl Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305 m).

Raymond Spokes mët man söl ciaval Monte Cruise, alené da Mayfield-Smith, tl O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205 m).

source_doc:
I've never seen Jessica do so much chores at home.
You're right.
I think I literally do like, two weeks worth of dishes.
The one day I'm here, but I'm always like, tells me that I can't leave the dishes in the sink.
Can't leave my stuff in the sink.
I'm so diligent here.
Just not at home.
But hey, if I'm washing stuff for him at the shop, it should be okay that I leave some stuff at home, right?

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

hypo_0:
@la Ne éra nia la regola n. 1 de la lauraziun cun la mascin che sce te n'as nia spiané la superfice, n'él nia dër drec o tlap?

@azonenberg scio, segur, ma i *orô* bën la spiané. Möss ma avëi pusedé bof l zero de m'istrumënt.
Deache i m'aspetâ che la fossa bën inant tlapa.
Anco' fajaré n dapia plü. I n'ha ciamò de de püre. Y sce i ne l fegh nia me sturbarál decontinuous. Al m'é ince sciampé l dapia da colé te l tasser, canche i l proâ, insciö che i messas duncue indô d' d'un n d' d'un d'un l raddrizzé, y i n'ha degügnea de ' l féééé, insciö che.....

@la I sa co an se sasc.
I n'ha albü n prublem d' n medem genar canche i laurâ a mia cia d'ćia, ulache bën döt chel che te messas müté de referimënt fô bof.
I s'ha fat n tel rëndro per l chêder d' n us dër drët y bosc. Me n'ha sciampé da ranco do che l fô jüt n pêr de trave, deache l' us messâ n do dër n gradu d' sbiech por sté tl par de l' surfacia y nia fluté in d' l'aria da n ce.
N ater mür (bassa autëza) ha vigni trave dër scurté exactament deache nia n dé fô n medem... L pavimënt n'é nia tlap, insciö che por avëi l tlap dl tëgol de la jach messas de l mür avëi n paralelogram endre de n retangol

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Iasera te #MMRPG! Mia schina me lassa finalmënter assá en dëche por podëi fá dacassö da master, ince sce i heros va inant cun la chirida de Cammie, la porpola sparia. Vega, le Dragon Digital, aposta n trio de mofons de strisura che s’â infiltré te süa sala jocs de nöt manco mët, ma un de chi la reconësc sciöche na superheroina dl post y ai fësc a la fin n burt bel de bocia cuntan de video jocs. Malan che l’ocajiun vën rumpida da valgügn o valch che toma sön l’at de la sala... 1/?

Vega va a ciaré y ciata le Dr. Vesper, te süa forma de batarela mostrosa che la stampa á batié "Gargoyle Man," adöm cun na creatura che semea na arpia y che Vesper descrî sciöche süa "pica sciöla." Vesper dij ch’ai vën a se presenté y a envié Vega a se sodescé a süa sozieté de creatura-man mostros che vën menada da "La Madame," la Dra. Diana Laughton dl Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega de fesc a dagné n pü' de tëmp por fá sciampé i mofons fora de la sala jocs y cherdé i d’atri di Mythics por aiüt, pona fej d’ester enteresada a se sodescé a chësta "fameia nöia." Vesper y Harpy (che ne riona nia na ota te chësc momënt) mën Vega sön n bastim tl port, olache al semea che le Laughton Institute sides pormez a mët adöm sües cosses... de segur de d’ëi che ai sá che ai tira l’atenziun de l’Aënt Carter y d’A.R.G.E.N.T. y d’atri. 3/?

Malan che l’ocajiun vën rumpida da valgügn o valch che toma sön l’at de la sala... 1/?

Vega va a ciaré y ciata le Dr. Vesper, te süa forma de batarela mostrosa che la stampa á batié "Gargoyle Man," adöm cun na creatura che semea na arpia y che Vesper descrî sciöche süa "pica sciöla." Vesper dij ch’ai vën a se presenté y a envié Vega a se sodescé a süa sozieté de spidantadus de creatura-man mostros che vën menada da "La Madame," la Dra. Diana Laughton dl Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega se fesc a dagné n pü' de tëmp por fá sciampé i mofons fora de la sala jocs y cherdé i d’atri di Mythics por aiüt, pona fej d’ester enteresada a se sodescé a chësta "fameia nöia." Vesper y Harpy (che ne riona nia na ota te chësc momënt) mën Vega sön n bastim tl port, olache al semea che le Laughton Institute sides pormez a mët adöm sües cosses... de segur dache ai demania ch’ai tira l’atenziun de l’Aënt Carter y de l’A.R.G.E.N.T. danter l’ater. 3/?

source_doc:
Just so you know, Harriet and I didn't actually get back together.
What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.
But I don't think I want it anymore.
Like that time my parents got Fergie to perform at my ninth birthday and I was like, oh, this is sick.
Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ma por t'al dì, iö y Harriet ne s'un nia en verité ciafé doman de mët d'andor adöm.
Ciodí?
Ma iö t'un odü a la bacié.
Joan.
Le fia sciöche sce te m'essest a cör é deventé dër.
Y spo scenó sunsi döt confuso, ciodí che iö m'un ciafé cie che iö s'un arist.
Ma iö ne i penzo nia che iö l'ores püre d'andor.
Sciöche chëla iade che mi geniturs s'un döt Fergie por s'esibí sön mi nono cumpliann y iö s'un döt oh, chësc é dër bel.
Spo s'éra en verité esibida y iö s'un döt oh, iö s'un dementié sciöche Fergie cianta.
Ára d'andor n sens?
Al á döt le sens.

Joan.
Mia finta che te m'essest a cör é deventada reá.
Y sëgn sunsi döt confuso ciodí che iö un ciafé cie che iö s'un arist.

Sciöche chëla iade che mi geniturs á fat gní Fergie a cianté al mi nono cumpliann y iö s'un döt, oh, chësc é dër gajard.

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

hypo_0:
Mi fred te Chël-Ch'An-Në-Müia-Nia-Da-Nominé, chël che te descrives al é na conseghënza dla _misoginia_, nia dla "misandria".

I m’un dëgnes dër che i oms capisces che por le dër fat che al é dricé cuntra d’ëi y che al é un n problem dër de gra, chësc nia dër ne vöia di che al sides "misandria".
I rüva sëgn de odëi un che descriva le gní discriminé _porchëi che al vëgn ponsé che al sides dër dlicé_ sciöche "misandria" y i sun dër debojoles.

Nia che te ne passes nia tres valch de reau. Al pöl bën dër ester. Mo al n’é nia "misandria". Porchëi che la "misandria" ne n’ezistëia nia.
Gëis, chësc val ince por i oms trans. Ince la "transmisandria" _nia_ n’é na cossa d’ezistënza y la jor dër ma para a n percurse anti-feminist. source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

hypo_0:
Sona le cordoroi vërt lëde por m’prové por le pröm iade col patrun de Sachi's Studio por le bersté da colors. Al ne m'ispira nia tröp da adoré le tlesc, mo al adorará dër de valch por al rorí y al spessí n pü'.
#millinery

Le patrun de Sachi's Studio por le bersté da colors aconsiëia de taié i toc dla corona a sbiech respet al dlesso ("sön le bias") por avëi deplü elastizité sön la zirconferënza, mo chëst foss de colpa che les rigaies dl cordoroi jess a sbiech, de penda che i les prëferësc verticales.
Al se odará. Chësc é le test por s'un dé na fia col patrun. A mi me bria le cordoroi por la textura, mo le vërt ne foss nia m'prima sora, y chësc tlesc é tan lëde che i dëssi pormez büsté n strato, che al sides tlesc che taca o valch d'ater da mi fustí.

A n secund udada, mi tlesc ne n'é nia cordoroi, al é de valüre, insciö che i pöl taié a 45° respet al dlesso dl tlesc sciöche Sachi aconsiëia tl patrun dl bersté da colors, zënza che al sides d'arshura.
#millinery
hypo_1:
Ston stanché le cordoroi vërt y lëde por m’prové por le pröm iade cul patrun dl bersté da colors de Sachi’s Studio. N'aspeti nia tröp dales dinstruziuns de d'adoré le tlesc da rorí, mo dër che al vá de bogn d'i dé n pü' de sostanza y spessor.
#millinery

Le patrun dl bersté de Sachi aconsiëia de taié i toc dla corona a sbiech respet al dlesso ("on the bias") por avëi deplü elastizité d'ingor, mo chëst foss de colpa che les rigaies dl cordoroi jess d'ingort, de penda che i les m'aspeti drites.
Al se odará. Chësc é n test de pröva por m’dé na fia cul patrun. A mi me bria le cordoroi por la textura mo le vërt ne foss nia m'prima sora, y chësc tlesc é tan lëde che i dëssi pormez büsté n strato de colajor o d'ater sciöche i á tlo tles scartofles.

A d'aspeté n pü' mender, mi tlesc ne n'é nia cordoroi, al é de valüre, insciö che i pöl taié a 45° respet al dlesso dl tlesc sciöche Sachi aconsiëia tl patrun dl bersté, zënza che al deventi d'arshura.
#millinery

A d'aspeté n pü' mender, mi tlesc ne n'é nia cordoroi, al é de valüre, insciö che i pöl taié a 45° respet al dlesso dl tlesc sciöche Sachi aconsiëia tl patrun dl bersté y al ne jará nia d'arshura.
#millinery
hypo_7:

Oh, oh, they stopped playing.
What do you mean?
The music has stopped?
What are you saying?
I hear it.
Oh, and it's so beautiful.
How can you hear the music?
You see, they're putting away their instruments.
Oh.
You heard them playing.
Well.
Darling, do you hear things?
Sybil, this is our music played at our engagement party.
I think I'll hear it for the rest of my life.

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
A puzelé deperpo con mi implant stereo chësta edema m'al fat pënse a n fat curiof che n'unse mai arjont da capí... asvelt sce le "hive mind" de Mastodon m'asiste.
L'amplificadú é n Philips FA454 y le letur CD é n Philips CD150.
Aldonco le manual dl amplificadú possi collié i dusc prosc con n cavo "DIN a 8 poli a DIN a 5 poli + 2 x CINCH unipolars".
I capësci che chësc oles d'orëi dí n cavo da DIN a 8 pin a DIN a 5 pin + RCA stereo... ciodí sönna dër mofëia.
N'unse mai ciafé n valgolas de te'. El cocun che n á la jof de s'un fá un?

Le manual d'asistënza dl amplificadú é bel y dër tler (figura 2 tl toot sora), mo n'arjonse nia de ciafé valch de tan bun por le letur CD. I á taché lapró n retrat (figura 4 tl toot sora) dl manual d'asistënza che i *pënse* sibe la pert interessada.
Śën ái le letur CD colié ma con i cavi RCA y döt fonziunëia bun, mo sce i podess ciafé/fá le dërt cavo da Din a Din + RCA spo podessi adoré valch fonziun d'ampustaziun y deliberé i sors ingressi RCA stereo sön mi amplificadú.

Al é n repair café chësc fine edema tla chitá ulache i ví... sce i m'un dërcëgni ciamó inant por te' tëmp spo m'al porti de d'ütl döt dagnara lapró y asvelt sce ai m'asiste a m'un mës-cé un adöm.

hypo_5:
A puzelé con mi implant stereo chësta edema m’ál fat pënse a na strania de curiosité che n’á dagnora mai capí d’en fonz... asvelt sce le mervëi de Mastodon m’asiste.
L’amplificadú é n Philips FA454 y le letur CD é n Philips CD150.
Aldonco le manual dl amplificadú possi collié i dusc prosc con n cavo "DIN a 8 poli a DIN a 5 poli + 2 x CINCH unipolars".
I capësci che chësc oles d’orëi dí n cavo da DIN a 8 pin a DIN a 5 pin + RCA stereo... che sönna sciöche na dërta de desgrazia.
N’á mai ciafé n valgolas de te’. El cocun che m’un foss de bon de s’un fá un?

Le manual d’asistënza dl amplificadú é bel y dër tler (figura 2 tl toot sora), mo n’arjonse nia de ciafé valch de tan bun por le letur CD. I á taché lapró n retrat (figura 4 tl toot sora) dl manual d’asistënza che i *pënse* sibe la pert interessada.
Śën ái le letur CD colié ma con i cavi RCA y döt fonziunëia dër bun, mo sce i podess ciafé/fá le dërt cavo da Din a Din + RCA spo podessi adoré valch fonziun deplü y deliberé i sors ingressi RCA stereo sön mi amplificadú.

Al é n repair café chësc fine edema tl post ulache i ví... sce i m’un dërcëgni ciamó inant por te’ tëmp spo m’al porti döt dagnara lapró y asvelt sce ai m’asiste a s’un mës-cé un adöm.

source_doc:
Where is he, Bill?
Out there.
Don't you girls back down tonight?
We got a surprise for you.
That sounds exciting.
Tommy, just you wait and see.
Hello?
Hello.
Hello, Jim.
They told me it was somebody about the hall for tonight.
You don't think they'd let me in the kitchen if they knew I was organizing the strike, do you?
You're pretty smart, aren't you?
Can you get away?
Yes.
Give me one minute to change my dress.

Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. hypo_0:
Ula élpa, Bill?
Defora.
No se tirereise nia indô, mutes, enscerla?
I ciafarëis na sopreja.
Chësc sona bën intresciant.
Tommy, aspiete söl bën y dër y tö te veras.
Halo?
Halo.
Halo, Jim.
Ai m'à dit ch'al ê valgügn por la sela de d'asera.
Te ne mënies nia ch'ai m'ess liché jé tla odlina, sce ai ess sciügnü che i rabaido la gréva, po'?
Te iest dër furbes, nia dër?
Este bofia da gní demez?
Scé.
Damé un n menüt por me mudé setra.

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Unfortunately, this leaves me at square one. The makeup of the plant matter is similar to the surrounding area. Any of the various creates that pass through here could have easily urinated in just that area, but the amount of animal traffic would make it difficult to narrow suspects.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Inspector Clouseau did not roll around in the area from what I could tell, but he did stop in the spot for around a minute. It is too far away from any of my cameras to tell exactly what he was doing, but movement suggests sniffing around.
4/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Whatever X22 was doing, I don't believe he is the reason everyone is interested. I have only found 1 additional The Inspector visit to the spot the day before. The camera recording the area only keeps the most recent 100GB, so I only have a limited time frame to check. So far, I have found no other traffic during the day. While secret kitty traffic at night is a possibility, it is unlikely.
6/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Desgraziadamënter m’ascia chësc söl vare zero. La composiziun dla materia vegetala é valia a chëra dles odofines. Vignun di Reagan tiers che passa d’enco podess avëi picié dlungia feter te chël post, mo la cuantité de tru de tiers rënd dër de sbalp tigní a d’orëla i sopeses.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: L’ispetur Clouseau ne s’á nia sboloré d’enco, per chel che d’al s’á podü odëi, mo al s’á archité söl post por presciapüch un n menüt. Al é dër dalonc da mius d’aparac d’architè por odëi d’idun chel che fô do a fá, mo l movimënt m’astona chel che d’al fô do a snoflé d’enco.
4/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

2026-03-23 Hum The X-Men Animated Series Theme To Yourself: Chersö ch’el á fat X22, ne m’apara nia ch’al sibe la rejon che d’ares döt m’ascia enteressés. Amma d’á ciafé n’atra vijita dl Ispetur söl post de d’ayer d’ant. La camera d’architè te chëla d’area á döt d’esceda de m’ascia döt recordé d’i d’ötem 100GB, can d’asura d’á un n tëmp limit por controlé. Cin d’en chë d’öga d’á döt ciafé degun d’atra traffic can d’asura dl dé. Insciö, ch’al sibe un n traffic de iadi de iat can d’asura dla nöt d’é na poscibilité d’architè, mo n’é d’asura nia d’acert.
6/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Le Falkirk rinfurza les speranzes da pié te chi prumi sciach cun na vitoria fora de ciafra söl ciamp dl St Mirren

Miller á spo tute la sigureza di punc döt do l'ora de iüch, profiténd de na fasa de de fesa stasica dl St Mirren por sciampé do so medemo thir para debojé, denant de dac n colf sotil de bal al de sura de George.

Al é sté n domisdé da dëis rë s'un d'oblidé por le St Mirren, che á pordü Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips y George por infortone d menter ch'i ti jô incuntra a de dertcia de ror de rur por la terza outa de colf.

Le Falkirk á albü la prüma ocajiun al 18ejim menüt, canche Barney Stewart ti á passé la bala a Dylan Tait, che cun n thir curvé döt d'or dfora de l'aria á albü na picera deviaziun denant de jé a sbalzé sön la pert d'alton dl dë dert de porta.

Le St Mirren é finalmënter sté prigolos döt do la mesa ora, canche Mikael Mandron á thiré da na posiziun strenta, obliand le vachier dl Falkirk Scott Bain a na bela parada cun i pîsc.

Le Falkirk é spo jé debota da l'oltra pert y le tuler Miller é sté lëde de thiré da na posiziun valia, mo George á paré fluvis.

La partida s'á finalmënter pié ia y Dan Nlundulu é sté le proscim a thiré te porta al 36ejim menüt do che i "Bairns" á pordü de püre la bala, mo al é sté na parada normala söl prum pal de Bain.

Nlundulu é spo jé do la de fesa y á dac la bala te porta, mo l'alegreza di fegandurs de ciafra é stada curta por mënter che l'asistent de l'arbitre á albü la banderina söl ciaf por n fuoriiüch che parô lëde.

La scuadra de ciafra á albü jö bele pordü Donnelly por infortone a mita dl prum tëmp y á albü n'oltra bota de dert canche Phillips, che parô s'avei fat mäl al spale tl prum tëmp, é gnü sustituí al interval.

La partida mülé ciamé do n mument de cualité y chësc é gnü do 10 menüc tl secund tëmp tres Yeats.

N passê d'alt de Tait á fat pié ia Miller, y porchë mënter che George é gnü dfora de porta am rora d'ora por n bun duel, la bala lëda é piada dapart dlungia a Yeats, che cun n thir de pruma d'un curvé á dac la bala te d'alton dl dë dert de porta vuota dl St Mirren.

Al é jé ciamé mi d'ora por la scuadra de dfora döt do la mesa ora, canche i "Bairns" á doplé so avantach.

Le prum thir de Miller dal spi de l'aria é gnü para debojé da Scott Tanser mo, mënter che la de fesa de ciafra n'é stada asvelta, Miller á reají por prum sön la bala lëda y á albü n thir cun le pî dert d'alton de George che gnô d'or a d'incuntra.

Le St Mirren á albü n'oltra bota de dert do n picer de tëmp canche le vachier á albü da jé demez por gní sustituí da Ryan Mullen.

I cambiamënć obliá y i coi d'or d döt de colf á desmisoré la scuadra de ciafra, che n'á plü mostré d'ester prigolosa por na rimonta, cun so domisdé rezorí al 89ejim menüt canche Tanser á döt faddé so thir de volo da sies iardes de dlongia.

La partida s'á finalmënter pié ia y Dan Nlundulu é sté le proscim a thiré te porta al 36ejim menüt do che i "Bairns" á pordü de püre la bala, mo al é sté na parada normala söl prum pal de Bain.

Nlundulu é spo jé do la de fesa y á dac la bala te porta, mo l'alegreza di fegandurs de ciafra é stada curta por mënter che l'asistent de l'arbitre á albü la banderina söl ciaf por n fuoriiüch che parô lëde.

La scuadra de ciafra á albü jö bele pordü Donnelly por infortone a mita dl prum tëmp y á albü n'oltra bota de dert canche Phillips, che parô s'avei fat mäl al spale tl prum tëmp, é gnü sustituí al interval.

La partida mülé ciamé do n mument de cualité y chësc é gnü do 10 menüc tl secund tëmp tres Yeats.

N passê d'alt de Tait á fat pié ia Miller, y porchë mënter che George é gnü dfora de porta am rora d'ora por n bun duel, la bala lëda é piada dapart dlungia a Yeats, che cun n thir de pruma d'un curvé á dac la bala te d'alton dl dë dert de porta vuota dl St Mirren.

Al é jé ciamé mi d'ora por la scuadra de dfora döt do la mesa ora, canche i "Bairns" á doplé so avantach.

Le prum thir de Miller dal spi de l'aria é gnü para debojé da Scott Tanser mo, mënter che la de fesa de ciafra n'é stada asvelta, Miller á reají por prum sön la bala lëda y á albü n thir cun le pî dert d'alton de George che gnô d'or a d'incuntra.

Le St Mirren á albü n'oltra bota de dert do n picer de tëmp canche le vachier á albü da jé demez por gní sustituí da Ryan Mullen.

I cambyamënć obliá y i coi d'or d döt de colf á desmisoré la scuadra de ciafra, che n'á plü mostré d'ester prigolosa por na rimonta, cun so domisdé rezorí al 89ejim menüt canche Tanser á döt faddé so thir de volo da sies iardes de dlongia.

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_0:
Campanīle
Na riga de #poesia
i.
Un ciampanì de na dlijia romana,
crusc d'or ch'arescghia les nives:
la ciampana sona, l'otun s'un va de balona,
al cianta fora por na nola de brognea,
al sona alt y al cherdia
i fedei che n'é dlongia d'agn.
Degun zele de pieté d'auria:
tanc de moris de soredlé.
La tor de pera sciava la bocia
tres la mascara dla plöia de domisdé,
i cìes ch'aspecolta les bombes
dô dles tebeles de tet indoman.
🧵👇🏼
#poesia #poesiadeporé #melfor #neoclassich #dlijia #gnot #fotografia

ii.
Chidore à tira la corda dla ciampana?
Monch su in te so claustro
che degun n'à plü dlongia d'al.
El, grain in te l'ostra dla dlijia —
mo degöna cela ne s'à tignì so let,
degun porf tarliscia dles coce dles fusties soes,
so inome n'é mai gnü dit,
degun liber vedl ch'al à dori.
La corda dla ciampana storta, schertlada,
mangiada dai dinc di soris dla dlijia.
Al é dlongia d'agn ch'ara ne se debrana,
tirada sota dales mans.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
L'ai de gnot ciantegna de psalms
y d'al sancia canticles
por debrana la batarela de bronz,
al respognes in descant —
mo nia con la mia usc.
L'ai s'ingloba la mia uia,
ciantegna so sanch muregn d'organs
con les mans de so bocia de sbalm.
✋🏼🧵

degun porf tarliscia dles coce dles fusties soes,
so inome n'é mai gnü dit,
degun liber vedl ch'al à dori.
La corda dla ciampana storta, schertlada,
mangiada dai dinc di soris dla dlijia.
Al é dlongia d'agn ch'ara ne se debrana,
tirada sota dales mans.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
L'ai de gnot ciantegna de psalms
y d'al sancia canticles
por debrana la batarela de bronz,
al respognes in descant —
mo nia con la mia usc.
L'ai s'ingloba la mia uia,
ciantegna so sanch muregn d'organs
con les mans de so bocia de sbalm.
✋🏼🧵

Un fil de #poesia
i.

source_doc:
Oh, yes, now I see.
I think I shall call you Pinocchio, my little pine nut.
Oh, my, my, how late it's gotten.
You see, Pinocchio already your company has become distraction to me.
Well, I really must be off to bed now.
Lots of work to do tomorrow.
There will be much awaiting you as well when the morning sun rises.
Sleep well, my boy.

Bën, sëgn m'un rëi propi gí a dromí.

Dormi bën, mi müt.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Inant cun i laurs do n pech de pof. Al é gnü dër fora la mascin da thier por fá la tesa y n costura dl'erfa. Na dömia dl'erfa cordöra adöm cun la tesa, sciöche ara dëssa ester sön la forma de ciaresta fata sön la tlesora. Al m'á costé dër dechirí y thier de bof de n flà la cordöra a mascin, deache i á pité dlongia ia en dër de dlongia d'en travers y sön la cordöra i m'un dër jor fora de tlesora. Podesse ester che i faje de bof la tesa sce i ó n pech de deplü sfundé.
#millinery

Oto tlesores d'erfa y döes tlesores de tesa metüdes adöm te trëi pices y pitedes por avëi la forma de bof generala. Tlesora de Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio te vellüt vërt. Thit dër de deplü a mascin.
La tlesora prëia dër n cordöra dessura dlongia i costures dles tlesores dl'erfa, sciöche al podesse ester con n thon dlongia o contrastant.
#millinery

Udüda dessura dan che i cordure i dömi d'erfa adöm. I vëgnes dër da ciarcé le video d'istruziuns. I vëdi che Sachi dëura n valgönes piceres molletes durtant che ara thie, en dër de pité döt la cordöra.

N pech de n bogn d'unión n pech storz sön i oto tlesores che s'incunta sön la piza dl bareto da newsboy, sciöche i m'un dër de ponsé de bof n botun plü gran por curí dert i costures.

Erfa döt metüda adöm, cun n botun curí de fust sön la piza. I bocs n'é dër nia bogn y metüs dlongia sotora. I costures n'é dër de nia stiades n'apede nia cordörades dessura.
#millinery

I á derví dër dechirí y thier de bof la cordöra a mascin, deache i á pité dlongia ia en dër de dlongia d'en travers dles spines y sön la cordöra i m'un dër jor fora de tlesora. Podesse ester che i faje de bof la tesa sce i ó n pech de deplü sfundé.
#millinery

Oto tlesores d'erfa y döes tlesores de tesa metüdes adöm te trëi pices y pitedes por la forma generala. Tlesora de Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio te vellüt vërt. Thit dër de deplü a mascin.
La tlesora prëia dër na cordöra dessura dlongia i costures dles tlesores dl'erfa, sciöche al podesse ester con n thon dlongia o contrastant.
#millinery

Udüda dessura dan che i cordure i dömi d'erfa adöm. I vëgnes dër da ciarcé le video d'istruziuns. I vëdi che Sachi dëura n valgönes piceres molletes durtant che ara thie, en dër de pité döt la cordöra con spines.

N pech de n bogn d'unión n pech storz sön i oto tlesores che s'incunta sön la piza dl bareto da newsboy, sciöche i m'un dër de ponsé de bof n botun plü gran por curí dert i costures.

Erfa döt metüda adöm, cun n botun curí de fust sön la piza. I bocs n'é dër nia bogn y metüs dlongia sotora. I costures n'é dër de nia stiades n'apede nia cordörades dessura.
#millinery

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Sëgn liji le reportaje sotacoverte de Gloria Steinem söl’esperienza de ester na Playboy Bunny... ai fustí la pröma pert y ce dër colpo🤔
Ince sce sae dër bun che Playboy é na... CORPORAZIUN lol... n’âi degüna idea de tan inant che düta soa infrastrotöra jorvess debojëgn a mantegní le classism te na moda dër spaventosa, ince sce ai se presentâ por de fora sciöche l’opziun "eleganta" y duncue "plü etica" en confrunt, por dì, a Hustler

Plü tert pùsteli val’ screenshot, mo por dé n’idea, les Bunnies (che ê modeledres/camarieres) messâ:
- azeté n stipende plü bas (de 200-150 $, che corespund al dé desciöche a 2,5K de śën) de chi che gnô publiché
- dé jö le 50% de dötis les mances
- ti dé so cognom ai "propietars de ciafles numer 1" (chël uler dì, VIP/elite) sce ai al damanâ
- se sotesmete a n’ezaminaziun dla pélvis y a n’ezam de sanch, mo a d’eres n’ora dacundonć nia dé de chirí fora le dotur
- gní spiades da n detetif privat
- fé de döt por ascogne si oms/moric

Le punt prinzipal che lëia döt chësc é chësc:
La jënt de ciasa de Playboy n'â AVUT ASSOLUTAMËNTER NIA LE DERTO DE (sot d’enpena de licenziamënt) gní fora cun d’atri coliades o clienc... MO acompagné y gní fora cun i "propietars de ciafles numer 1" ê pormetü, sce nia ince encurajé. Capëise olache ai ô rovada?

Ales jones d’inchët ti gnôl dé na "Bunny Bible" da studié dutes chës regoles y istruziuns bizes.
Por ne numné ma deplü:
- les prestaziuns de laur dles Bunnies gnô valütades tres n "sistem de merić" (SCE, dër chëstes parores!) en post de gní scrites sö. Nia de spaventus, le merit gnô valüté nia ma söl bagn dla moral dl laur mo ince sön rechejic dër spezifics de biela prezenza y de comportamënt.
- al ê en funziun n sistem de premiaziun che dâ n pest ales Bunnies che venê le plü alcol y gadgets

Plü tert pùsteli val’ screenshot, mo por dé n’idea, les Bunnies (che ê camarieres de cocktail) messâ:
- azeté n stipende plü bas (de 200-150 $, che corespund al dé desciöche a 2,5K de śën) de chi che gnô publiché
- dé jö le 50% de dötis les mances
- ti dé so cognom ai "propietars de ciafles numer 1" (chël uler dì, VIP/elite) sce ai al damanâ
- se sotesmete a n’ezaminaziun dla pélvis y a n’ezam de sanch, mo a d’eres n’ora dacundonć nia dé de chirí fora le dotur
- gní spiades da n detetif privat
- fé de döt por ascogne si oms/moric

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Mio partner á na consulënza video cun Ikea por estermeté n cost de na cosina fada söl rregolament. Al é n sguard fascinant söl ecosistem de sorvisc online por i boomer.
1. Ai á mannè le link por la consulënza video, trëi edorles ciavá. Al d'ôra la soluziun de videoconferënza de proprieté de Ikea
2. Ai damana i dissegn & i render 3D por la cosina nöia
3. Ai manna n'email dijan "giolan por s'avëi mannè i dissegn"
4. Incandé se coleghunse, ai pëia ia la cherdada dijan "nosch sistem á bloché osc archifs, designedun la cosina adöm"
1/x

5. Mio partner damana s'al é n traich de se spartí i dissegn (tres detaliá, se á sciasté na dërta de tëmp por i mët adöm), sù che le dindio de Ikea vá sön n script, y n'en vöia d'ascolté gora.
6. Le proscimo vare tl script é "fé cul fia de n laborius dissegn dacor söl fon cun le cliënt, petan sön la tastiera y dër lënt a dorè la UI de so program de dissegn"
2/x

7. Ai ne pöl nia spartí so sghermo, a n d'manera che al é dër n spetacul da dlá ride cun de continuus incomprensciuns sön che pert de cia riga an descort"
8. L'orloio á d'andé demanco passè chël che messâ ester la consulënza complëta, y ai é al 35% d'avëi i dac dles mosöres dures.
9. Cina sën él stè de bogn 8 d'menüts de de gran fadia dl dindio dl'Ikea de mët ite les mosöres dades

Thank you, Malcolm.
Not at all, Mr. Dreiser.
Tell Paul I said goodbye.
I will.
What are you sniffling about, Theodore?
I'm not sniffling.
Look here, son, I'm tired of having you mope around because Paul's going away to school.
You should be happy that your brother's going to be a minister.
I am happy.

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
I Clan bat tlesc i Steelers cun na proa de forza te na Devëta davagnada de piza tl ce de ciasa

I Clan á ciamé n bun start cun Joe Hazeldine che á tirié dandaia na bota dërc tl dertgior de Sheffield do na buna combinaziun danter Hugo Roy y Deven Sideroff.

Malgré na buna fasa defensiva dl Glasgow, á i Steelers ciafé la dëta tres le tir dërt de Brien Diffley tres la riga de defensurs, dan che Mikko Juusola portass i ghests inant cun n tir deieré dala fana dërcia.

Tl secundo iade é le momënt passó ala pert di Clan, cun Steven Seigo che á passó n bun gol da d'aspech dlungia fopa ia por Matthew Greenfield por sbalancé le resultat.

N püt do á Rylan Schwartz portó süa scuadra inant cun na bota dal dertgior de do dlungia, do che i Clan á albü de gran fortüna a sciampé a na punicion por müt de iogadus söl dlacia.

Sheffield é gnü indor par l'alt cun Ryan Tait che á tirié söl dertgior, Brine á paré de bacio la fona de bachet söl retro, sënza la fassé, y Kevin Tansey á tirié le terzo gol di ghests demez dala riga.

Cun le resultat sbalancé do la fasa de piza dl iade de mez, á la renumanza dlungia le Braehead fât salté la fola y Glasgow á ciafé le control dl iade.

Tristin Langan á ciafé süa revancha por la batalia de dagnora che al á albü d'aspeté dales fures de Mitchell Heard, fajan n gol de maraveia con na bota söl lenn sora por dé la dëta a süa scuadra.

Na punicion por Miihkali Teppo á fât prescion sön i d'aspech dlungia la fin dl iade, cun i Steelers che á trât demez le dertgiadure por n iogadure de plü de atach.

Langan á dagnora fât le secundo gol dl iade te na porta öta por stlujé la sëra cun de bi doi punc dagnora miritadus por i Clan de piza de ciasa.

L'alenadure di Glasgow Clan, Corey Neilson, á dêt do l'iade: "S'un fât la mior scuadra. Nossc forecheck é sté ezelent, chel d'alch che s'un fât döt le de de edema, y é sté dagnora tlesc sënza palsa chësta sëra. L'idantitá che deman s'un chirí á scumencé a se mostré. Al é sté dagnora n plajëi d'alené cun dotes les linies tlesches y de s'aprofité de na scuadra che soga de sota cun i iogadus, por müt che de solit s'un nos da l'andra pert de chësc."

L'alenadure di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, á dêt: "Pensi che s'un stés assá bogn por le mior de l'iade. Glasgow s'á dêt n bacio a l'inizio, mpa nossc rabo a s'auzé é sté bun. Nossc jogn ê döt stanc ala fin, s'alben me trëi linies de sogadus mpa s'un stés te batalia por döt le iade, n'posse nia dire alch sön la pinca de competizion de nossc jogn."

N pü' do á Rylan Schwartz portó süa scuadra inant cun n tir sciche na bala dal dertgior de do, do che i Clan á albü de gran fortüna a sciampé a na punicion por avëi plü de n iogadus söl dlacia de chel che foss dër.

Sheffield é gnü indô inant cun Ryan Tait che á tirié söl dertgior de bachet; Brine á paré mpa sënza la fassé, y Kevin Tansey á tirié le terzo gol di ghests demez dala riga.

Cun le resultat sbalancé do la fasa de piza dl iade de mez, á la renumanza dlungia le Braehead fât salté la fola y Glasgow á ciafé le control dl iade.

Tristin Langan á ciafé süa revancha por la batalia de dagnora che al á albü d'aspeté dales fures de Mitchell Heard, fajan n gol de maraveia con na bota söl lenn sora por dé la dëta a süa scuadra.

Na punicion por avëi tgnü fërt de Miihkali Teppo á fât prescion sön i d'aspech dlungia la fin dl iade, cun i Steelers che á trât demez le dertgiadure por n iogadus de plü de atach.

Langan á dagnora fât le secundo gol dl iade te na porta öta por stlujé la sëra cun de bi doi punc miritadus y de gran deman por i Clan de piza de ciasa.

L'alenadure di Glasgow Clan, Corey Neilson, á dêt do l'iade: "S'un stés la mior scuadra. Nossc forecheck é sté ezelent, chel d'alch che s'un fât döt le de de edema, y é sté dagnora tlesc sënza palsa chësta sëra. L'idantitá che deman s'un chirí á scumencé a se mostré. Al é sté dagnora n plajëi d'alené cun dotes les linies tlesches y de s'aprofité de na scuadra che soga cun de pi iogadus, por müt che de solit s'un nos da l'andra pert de chësc."

L'alenadure di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, á dêt: "Pensi che s'un stés assá bogn por le mior de l'iade. Glasgow s'á dêt n bacio a l'inizio, mpa nossc rabo a s'auzé é sté bun. Nossc jogn ê döt stanc ala fin, s'alben me trëi linies de sogadus mpa s'un stés te batalia por döt le iade, n'posse nia dire alch sön la pinca de competizion de nossc jogn."

You went $0.06 over.
I need the $0.06.
But I only want $10 even.
You pumped 1006.
Then you should fix your pumps so they don't go so fast.
I'm on a fixed income, you know.
Lady, if you don't.

- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

hypo_0:
Opo, tö oles dagnora dì che Blender Market, chël che i m’â ponsé che a m’en jise bel plan devers un de chi sorvisc de abunamënt de m**da por le monn de Blender, s’á batié de n bun inom sciöche "Superhive" y spo á d’un n iade dezié de mete deplen d’abunamënzes d’obligh?
OPO, QUI L’ESSA MAI PONSÉ?! Sëur d’agné nia iö, d’sigü. Chësc é porchël daldöt d’atun!

A d’onesté, n’ái mai odü n’ola de dita cun "Hive" tl inom che ne sides nia na m**da totara manada da d’i asenesc, insciö n’ái dagnora nia cumpré nia sön chësta piataforma -
Scusa
N’ái ficiá nia da chëra piataforma sce i pudê n fá a debojëgn.
Forsce m’en pón d’avëi, sará ince nia dërt, d’un n dita spezialisada te liat anter i creadus y les porsones che ascuta, che se batia HIVE, scenó se pón dí che i creadus sides ma nostes apines de fidonza, d’bun travalia por nos! Chësc me dá dagnora d’i bruti d’pënzes.

"Hive ó dì jënt che laora!"
Hive ó dì na regina.
