source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs almanco te mia turscha de amisc i telefonins n'â ror nia fora dles carateristiches bele dales prumes laurantes di agn 90, mo al costâ n *bot* a cherdé sö da n telefon de ciasa (porchëi sce t'asidofes ciamò pro i piögures ti pici i geniturs s'un devalgâ de d'al fà), y cina al 1995-1999 n'oron nia d'asgure, dagnora canche un cun un scanner radio podê (y gonot al fajê) scofé sö les conversaziuns.
Canche i scanners radio ê fora de cheriöra por i jones, truep dla jent plü de edé i â, y cina te chi agn dales fines di agn 90 ê gonot dl genner de apassionà de radio che ê n zelepor de tory y fistidiâ la polizia y d'atres istituziuns dl sistem, de puresce sce te rasonâs de canchecoch’ de subversif sön un telefonin, t'asidofes de gni tradì..
Manco mal che la roda s'á arbassé dales fines di agn 90 canche i scanners á metü man de gnì d'un preze plü bas, y la polizia ê ciamò cun i radios analogics 😁

@JugglingWithEggs dales fines di agn 1990 dagnora d'ör de dagnora â n telefonin y les cherdades ê plü barates (gonot cun un bel d'menüsc d'gora debant) mo i messasg SMS n'ê nia segures y a l'ancaria gnanca n'jô fora de d'atres rëis - la jent s'rasonâ de d'ör sön chi contra d'atris!
Ince la desferënza ê che l'aces ai spasics fari n'ê nia sciöche bagn desferenzié y asuré sciöche al é d'anchëi - ince sce al ê implö de d'un sistem CCTV y la jent dl post cherdâ dagnora la polizia por i jones che "studiava de d'intor", n'ê nia de de asá forza de d'ör dles forzes dl'ordin sön strada y n'inciarié gnanca n sistem CCTV collié (na guardia de d'asguranza reala messâ vardé la registraziun de d'ör sön chël post, y i dusi dla proprieté normalmënter n'orô nia de d'paié por chi canchëi de d'sera y de fin d'edé.
Ince al ê de de manco d'poliziotes de d'sorvisc ti rions plü de d'fora te les de nets/fins d'edé - i ê dagnora de de de decolochés ti zentri dla cité)

@vfrmedia
Me recorde di messasg che a d'fades tolô de d'ores a ruvé do dales prumes laurantes di agn dumila - porchëi n'ê nia gonot de d'ör d'bogn por planifiché d'bel de golant.
Sté te na cité de d'marcià de d'asguré orô dì de de manco cctv y de de poliziotes do chi agn 90. Me recorde dla desferënza canche s'movofes por de d'sera de d'Bournemouth o de d'Norwich. Mo ai jones che se devalgâ d'bagn n'ti jô nia contra sciöche d'anchëi. Mia rinfresciada de d'pröma dör d'reconofer les fies ê d'sorvisc por un post dagnora canche al é sté n gran de de jones de d'intor.

Ince la desferënza ê che l'aces ai spasics fari n'ê nia sciöche bagn desferenzié y asuré sciöche al é d'anchëi - ince sce al ê implö de d'un sistem CCTV y la jent dl post cherdâ dagnora la polizia por i jones che "studiava de d'intor", n'ê nia de de asá forza de d'ör dles forzes dl'ordin sön strada y n'inciarié gnanca n sistem CCTV collié (na guardia de d'asguranza reala messâ vardé la registraziun de d'ör sön chël post, y i dusi dla proprieté normalmënter n'orô nia de d'paié por chi canchëi de d'sera y de fin d'edé.
Ince al ê de de manco d'poliziotes de d'sorvisc ti rions plü de d'fora te les de nets/fins d'edé - i ê dagnora de de decolochés ti zentri dla cité)

@vfrmedia

Mo ai jones che se devalgâ d'bagn n'ti jô nia contra sciöche d'anchëi. Mia rinfresciada de d'pröma dör d'reconofer les fies ê d'sorvisc por un post dagnora canche al é sté n gran de de jones de d'intor.

@JugglingWithEggs almanco te mia turscha de amisc i telefonins n'ê nia sciöche nia conesciüs bele dai prumi agn 90, mo ai costâ n *bot* a cherdé sö da n telefon de ciasa (porchëi sce t'asidofes ciamò pro i piögures ti geniturs s'un devalgâ), y cina al 1995-1999 n'eron nia d'asgure, dagnora canche un cun un scanner radio podê (y gonot al fajê) scofé sö.
Canche i scanners radio ê fora de cheriöra por i jones, truep dla jent plü de edé i â, y cina te chi agn dales fines di agn 90 ê gonot dl genner de apassionà de radio che ê n zelepor de tory y fistidiâ la polizia y d'atres istituziuns dl sistem, de puresce sce te rasonâs de zeche de subversif sön un telefonin, t'asidofes de gni tradì..

source_doc:
Sorry if I sound strange, but really, Mr. Powell, that man is kind of frightening.
Frightening?
Well, he just sits there and grins at me.
I told him he didn't see people without an appointment.
He said, oh, he'll see me.
Just tell him it's an old friend.
Clint, do you know anybody by that name?
Clint.
Clint.
No, it doesn't ring a bell.
All right, send him in.
I'll get rid of him.
Okay.
Don't say I didn't warn you.
Mr. Powell will see you.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
@rechelon sciöche döt d’ater che popolar ressea dër bun la chëstiuin… dërt na dërta de dures… i ne ví nia a Berlin, mo i pënse che la jënt dötalor m’adesse albü plü o manco la medema reaziun, chëra de dí “va’ a d’al vëne a chisc d’un cul che faje cosses che bocia dër tancia jënt che n’à nia a che fá cun la dacoranza dales lumes, tratan le fat sciöche n dagn tuleré d’obligh”. I à odü na lerdia de jënt che se faje de gran dutes che al sibe sté n auto-atach por mete sot a n tles lominus la jënt de dërta de mán. Nia che i carabinic s’un crözie, ai sará dër de boles sce an se l’à fora (por dí deplü sciöche n de dërt stöp d’un che t’as a se mët fora na parbana por podëi aresté jënt y scrí fora dales rutes i iadof d’or de mán.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Sce, i oress dí che al paca che al sibe ciamó canche ses de anticivs che s’à cherié fora te n rinfresc de profile de meme che s’à dër n marvëia che la dacoranza ne i dess nia l’apogiu, mo che s’à dër n mior de marvëia che i pröms anticivs se sibe dër santis ofendüs da d’al dër sciof y ne sibe nia cun ai.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I me crözie por de bon de chël de na de spira de giustificaziun de auto-atach d’un de chisc d’un che se santis d’un de chisc de rutes che se crözie dër de d’al y de döt le movimënt che n’à nia d’apogiu fora de d’al de si atach dër canche döt se stöp d’un cun döt le monn, che an po areté a na dërta de ITS canche al passa n de o dui de solitudine y de brames che se canche an se sbalia.
hypo_1:
@rechelon "dër d’ater che popolar" ressea dër bun la chëstiuin… i ne ví nia a Berlin, mo i pënse che la jënt dötalor m’adesse albü plü o manco la medema reaziun, chëra de dí "va’ a d’al vëne a chisc d’un cul por avëi fat valch che bocia dër tancia jënt che n'à nia a che fá sënza de lumes, tratan le fat sciöche n dagn tuleré d’obligh". I à odü na lerdia de jënt se mët te de gran dutes che al sibe sté n auto-atach por mete sot a na dles lominus la jënt de man ciancia. Nia che i carabinic s’un crözie, ai sará de boles de legreza sën (na cossa schifosa da se figuresse) sën che ai à n pretest por fá rais y criminalisé la scene de man ciancia.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Sce, i oress dí che al paca che al sibe ciamó prescia n duman de anticivs raised sön profile de meme che s’à dër n marvëia che la scene ne s'à nia sciurá cun ai, mo che s’à ciamó deplü n marvëia che i vedli anticivs s'à santí manco de respet da dita cherta y ne i à nia dji do.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I me crözie por de bon che an vëghes na spira de auto-giustificaziun ulache n paca de anticivs se stancia dër de d’al cul movimënt por nia avëi dji do a si atach dër d’un d’or cuntra la zivilté che ai s’un dadesse te de gran dutes de livel ITS te n an o dui de solitudine y de brames che se sbalia.

I à odü na lerdia de jënt se mët te de gran dutes che al sibe sté n auto-atach por mete sot a na dles lominus la jënt de man ciancia. Don't you have these exact same shoes?
Excuse me, but these have a pearlized finish.
The other ones are patent leather.
What's wrong with patent leather?
They were like screaming 1995.
It was totally embarrassing.
That's it.
Shoes do not scream.
What year it is.
The shopping addiction of yours has got to stop.
But, daddy.
From now on, no more pit stops on rodeo.
No visits to the mall, no little hikes along Melrose.

Chilò dancé.
I jorâ che n'á odü de mius online.
Oh, chësc é chël ch'i á ciaré.
Al é te n colur sfadié brüm, mo i podess ince tól chësc porpora.
A ciun pensâstpa?
Chël é n kit.
Al á n daint daintifer.
Um.
Oh, y n bloch.
I á odü jënt cun chisc blocs te classa gier.
Porché canche t'vas a fá de bogn d'stretching y te n'arivest nia pro tera, d'arichera dër d'aiüt.
Aspeta, al ne me piâsc nia co che chësc se dënta.
Al ne dá nia l'impresciun de tení bun.

  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.Details.Daily.description.setup_fee": "Once you subscribe, we will place a new order with this product every day.   "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.Savings.description": "{{discount}}% off this item if bought in a bundle:",
  "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.NoSavings.description": "This item can be bought in a bundle:",

  "Account.LoyaltyBalance.description": "Balance: {{amount}} available to redeem",
  "Account.Orders.CantFindOrder.description": "If you can’t find your purchase, it may be linked to another email address. Try signing in with the email address you provided during in-store checkout. }

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

hypo_0:
Faci na riuniun de n'ora al'edema cun un di direturs dl'inzignaria ulache i ti splighi mia vijun söl dodester d'un n'organisaziun de gestiun di produc y a d'onor dl vëi él dër n bel format a toc

I temes é stac
- i dferënc tips de product manager y i doti de basa por svilupé i rekvisic
- sciöche i product manager sigura n ritm costant por na scuadra de d'inzignirs
- sciöche an manisc i product manager cun dferënc tbackgrounds (inzignaria, analist de dades, espert operatif de setur, consulënza, eci.)
ci che é sté burt da rí é che chësc diretur y jö political intran deboriada te n'andra dita cun product manager che iö ne dodester nia y i pöl dí "te dëstes miné de chëra porsona? Chëra porsona ê dër slia y chilò t'un dji l porcí."

Insciö ti spiëre inant de dferëntes mails o discussiuns sön Slack a chëst diretur (sce al n'é nia bel ded rëna) y i dji "bun, n BUN product manager fess CHËSC" y n "MATEST product manager fess CHËL" te dëstes miné canche chël o chëra á fat CHËSC? Chël ê fat bun.

ci che é sté dër devertënt é che chësc diretur y iö messan lauré deboriada te na dita de dant cun product manager che iö ne manajâ nia, y i pöl ti dír "éi, te dëstes ciamò de chëra porsona? Chëra ê de n dër tajo y chilò te dji l porchí."

Insciö, te dferëntes dmoris de mail o sön Slack ti les forwardëii a chël diretur (sce al n'é nia ciamò lapré) y i dji "bun, n BUN product manager fess CHËSC" y n "MATEST product manager fess CHËL", te dëstes ciamò canche chël o chëra á fat CHËSC? Chël ê propi d'aur.

Al á i pilastri y döt quant.
Sce, chëst hotel é dër vedl y al á dër tröp carater.
Al á n gröm de mobiles vintage.
Caié chësta scrivania.
Te as dër prësc löia de t’asenté dailó, de tó fora la pení y de pié ia.
No sai, a scri lëtres o val’ d’ater.
Fondé dl 1860.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

So cute.

@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social asche, spo ponsunse pa sëgn de ticheteiché i contignüs d’on de porsones verificades por che ai dëches n set de datus cun manco rumenta por l’alenamënt?
I ne sai nia, ai dëss sfeché te söa mësra de rumenta vomitada che ai á instsc fat, insciö che so spazial de veturs latënt s’unësc sön l’unité.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Mia pröma ponsada inche. I á dastalé mën sit personal deache i ne m’un fariô nia de nodri i dëgni Torment Nexuses. Ticheteiché i dëgni contignüs d’on fesc döt plü faç l’alenamënt de nüs set de datus nia-avenená e sënza rumenta.
I á ponsé de fá le contrari e nstiché n "pot de velen" por i spions IA ma mën pice de server ne n’é nia tan dër roböst.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social sci, s’i sciampun dër nos, mëtunji a sciampé inche ai.
Sce tö datori de laûr mët l’IA te to laûr da vigni dé, en d’eté de toles i tanc, deura la dërta obediënza de n d’eter cor, adorala por i problems dagnora de vigni dé e gura les respostes nia dagnora d’öga, intant che tö consumes i credic di jüsc sön la spësa dla firma por sciampé i resultac trimestrai.
N’en á canche n mai de döt chesc e in d’eter ai la deura inche sön de nos, deache s’i un pa un d’eter pice de devertimënt, intant ch’i podun 🫤
Modificaziun: ai s’aficeea i numeri dagnora e s’invëntun la vadagnia bel’dagnora de sën, l’adoranza che fará fali tö datori de laûr ne fará de döt nia de rumenta ai dëgni scruc sënza vadagnia de la rumenta o a s’so moto perpetuo de rumenta che jö fesc de bosch.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

hypo_0:
y al n'é nia un n burt film — en pert al sciöra dër bel — mo al é ince un n film fat döt de d'atri films, mius y cun deplü coesiun tematica. al é porchël 2001 y the three-body problem y arrival y n pü' wall-e, mo al é ince Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII y ala fin döt conscidré nia tan de che

mentre che sciörâ m'âi damandé porchëles che la tera messâ ester en dange, y sce le fat che i piçoi d'atri dui dla dërta ecuipas tulesse la vita por lascé le Bel Blanch a comandé fess n valgügn de devers anti-woke; mo conscidran n valgönes de dles feter ghes de andy weir, autur dl liber y 'libertarian con la mior cultura de media', söl fat che star trek dess me ester sun navei dl spazie che fej pew-pew, almanco por ël la resposta é sice al secundo y 'fascism' al pröm

@esvrld d'l let le liber n valgönes de devers d'edema y d'les d'l tò dles ghes, dant döt cun la detlaraziun che al à fat de rest, d'l n devers de s'l tò le meret dl de devers dl'ecuipas internazionara, con la condiziun che le jove blanch restasse sö söl post, sce le pröm liber n'â nia de bon suzes porchëles che al n'é nia n devers de bogn de scrì jent che fej de d'atri, y so su iade d'art d'é n devers de bogn de creè de piciöi de d'atri de devers, jues da decifré in solitudin. t'l dè n compagn alien é stè n bon pass, porchel che s'löra de d'atri poscibilités de comunia che ne messö nia ester dërte a sciöche i umans se conéscies.

mentre che sciörâ m'âi damandé porchëles che la Tera messâ ester en dange, y sce le fat che i d'atri dui dla dërta ecuipas tulesse la vita por lascé le Blanch a comandé fess n valgügn de devers anti-woke; mo conscidran n valgönes de dles ghes de andy weir, autur dl liber y 'libertarian con la mior cultura de media', söl fat che Star Trek dess me ester sun navei dl spazie che fej pew-pew, almanco por ël la resposta é sice al secundo y 'fascism' al pröm

@esvrld d'l let le liber n valgügn de devers y d'l n devers de s'l tò de mior, dant döt cun la dert che al à fat de rest, d'l n devers de s'l tò la mort dl'ecuipas internazionara por lascé söl post le jove blanch, sciöche sce al capise che so secundo liber n'â nia de bon suzes porchëles che al n'é nia n devers de bogn de scrì de jent che se conésce, y so su iade d'art d'é n devers de bogn de creè de piciöi de d'atri de devers, jues da decifré in solitudin. t'l dè n compagn alien é stè n bon pass, porchel che s'löra de d'atri poscibilités de comunia che ne messö nia ester dërte a sciöche i umans se conéscies.

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Me aspetâ de adoré Project Hail Mary, i l'arái ADORÉ, al m'ara ince destrucié en particolar sciöche fena de n'insegnanta de sciënza do n ann carghé de atacs dagnora nüs y tai de scioldi ala sciënza y a chi che la sciara. La jënt adora chësc film, che sará degors de suzes, y spo odia le travert de mia fena, ti destruj si programs y ô che i pirdun nòsc travert sciöche profescionistes. Co pór pa ester che döt chësc sibe vëi exported en un n iade.

Ara s'un é jüda ales 7 de doman por ji a insigné ti laboraturs pratics, ulache ai s'la jorona cun zeles, ulache i studiagn tles classes s'alza dagnora de plü y ulache i dac de suporć d'insegnamënt s'abassa, ara passa plü ores de contat cun i studiagn ti scundüs di laboraturs de d'onza d'atres classes dl campus. Ara á fat n program por studiagn che vëgn dal college por avei n travert paié ti laboraturs, daurjan n troidel STEM por chi che n'un ess dagnora albü la poscibilité. Por döt so travert che va dessura y fora, ara vëgn demonisada sciöche "chëra che mënsciona la DEI tla sciënza", che ai tlama fora de lege

Ma to bën, i sminëi che sce ara fess n programadú blanch de software, scrion de fanfic sön l'insegnamënt dla sciënza.... ara foss sigüda al sciüre.

@grimalkina les medemes raisc s'un é bele te Hail Mary, de vërt. I adori Andy Weir tröp y ne sminëi nia che al l'ess conscidré insciö, ma döt le fat che "la burocrazia y la colaboraziun sibe de vërt le mür che n'an dorb nia d'uní a n d'onza de traverć, y canche la morda se mët de mola canche les tles vëgn joré, i ciafun n anti-burocrat stersc che lassa l'ofize di diplomac y sfurza dagnora döt a d'uní al travert de d'injigné l'ierf, lascian da n flâ de d'ética o de d'ara che chi che se tol pert n'ô conzede" m'á fat l'impresciun de na de gran fanta-individualism american, y i m'ess dagnora ponsé che n american l'ess scrit sce i n'un ess nia ciafé l'inom d'autur

@jcachada @grimalkina

I adori Andy Weir tröp y ne sminëi nia che al l'ess conscidré insciö, ma döt le fat che "la burocrazia y la colaboraziun sibe de vërt le mür che n'an dorb nia d'uní a n d'onza de traverć, y canche la morda se mët de mola canche les tles vëgn joré, i ciafun n anti-burocrat stersc che lassa l'ofize di diplomac y sfurza dagnora döt a d'uní al travert de d'injigné l'ierf, lascian da n flâ de d'ética o de d'ara che chi che se tol pert n'ô conzede" m'á fat l'impresciun de na de gran fanta-individualism american, y i m'ess dagnora ponsé che n american l'ess scrit sce i n'un ess nia ciafé l'inom d'autur

@jcachada @grimalkina
Por döt so valur, le liber dorb de chësc d'onza che n'é nia ruvé tl film.
---
“I sun de d'orëla de d'audí,” i diji a Stratt. “Cun che i metun a joré Hail Mary. Cie faráste spo té?”
“I?” arara dit. “Ne va nia inant. Canche Hail Mary jora, mia d'autorité s'un va. De d'orëla che i vegni d'injignada a n prozes da n tlap de d'ofiziai de govergn söl mof d'uní sciöche i á fat valí l'autorité. Pór ester che i dore l'rest de mia vita te na porjon.”
“I sarái dla d'onza dla tò cella,” á dit Leclerc.
“Te fistidiëste de nia de chësc?”
Ara á sciulé i spalei. “Dagnora i messun fá n sacrific. Sce i messi ester l'boia dl monn por avardé nòsc salf, d'ara spo sará chësc n sacrific d'uní a fá.”
---
Éra miura o piöra sce ara sminia d'uní a se sacrificé?”
hypothesis:
Me aspetâ de adoré Project Hail Mary, i l'á ADORÉ, y al m'á ince destrucié en particolar sciöche fena de n'insegnanta de sciënzes do n ann de aciamënz continuous y tai de scioldi al'insegnamënt de döt les sciënzes. La jënt adora chësc film, che sará de sigü n suzes, y spo adoriai le travert de mia fena, ti destruj si programs y ô che i pirdun nòsc travert sciöche profescionistes. Co pór pa ester che döt chësc sibe vëi exported en un n iade.

Ara s'un é jüda ales 7 de doman por ji a insigné ti laboraturs pratics, ulache ai s'la jorona cun zeles, ulache i studiagn tles classes s'alza dagnora de plü y ulache i dac de suporć d'insegnamënt s'abassa, ara passa plü ores de contat cun i studiagn ti scundüs di laboraturs de d'onza d'atres classes dl campus. Ara á fat n program por studiagn che vëgn dal college por avei n travert paié ti laboraturs, daurjan n troidel STEM por chi che n'un ess dagnora albü la poscibilité. source_doc:
The fried eggs have turned to scrambled eggs.
You know what?
Considering we didn't have a spatula, it's not horrible.
Yum.
Alrighty.
It's breakfast time.
It is 904 and we're still at 100%.
To be fair, we didn't really do anything with the phone just yet.
It was just mostly sitting there in my pocket.
Also, yes, I do put the the milk in first because this way the cereal doesn't get soggy.
Unfortunately, it seems my opinion is a rather unpopular one.

Consideré che ne ciafên nia na spatula, n'él nia sciöche na spandora.

Al é les nöf y cater y i sun ciamò al cënt por cënt.

Al é dër demanco sté te mia gofa.

source_doc:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble is dire at Trust and Safety
Care to expand on that or link me?
> Whitney (Bumble) [is] a billionaire anyway, so what does she care?
I presume she didn't found Bumble by herself, maybe wasn't even part of the original group (as with Melon Husk and Tesla). What about the rest of them?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

hypo_0:
(1/?)
@lorry
> Bumble é na picia sfreia sön la Sigurté y la Fideleza
Te gnesal gën da me splighé chëra deplü o m’envoia n link?
> Whitney (Bumble) [é] de dagnora na miliardaria, pórchí s’un dessera dagnora varié?
I mënsc che ara n’ais nia fondé Bumble de sora, y che ara n’ess fance nia fat pert dl pröm grup (sciöche al é sté por Melon Husk y Tesla). Y les d’atres porsones de chël grup?
@screwlisp

(2/?)
@lorry
> Me mënsc che al sides ciamò le post por gní indô al vedl model
Al é n gröm de models nüs da proé che foss n gran miorament respet al ioghé ala roulette di hashtag, sides sön DataFarms sides sön rëis soziales dezentralisades. Öna na idea che i á odü é stada chëra di dac de dagnora online sciöche na esperiënza soziala basada sön i grups. Chësc é n vare tla drita direziun. Sciöche ince l’idea de @cy in chësc d’ater rami dles discusciuns sön i matchmakers.

(3/?)
A raga sön la roulette, che dijen de n’app de speed-dating sön le stil de Chat Roulette?
L’app podess:
* fá d’i verficaziuns basiches de sigurté (por evité de ciafé de dagnora fotò d’i orghins sessuai, ec.), cumpatí d’i confermes de l’area generala te chëra che t’es (damana-me scioché!)
* te mët te na runda de speed dating en tëmp real cun d’atri te tüa zona (test? usc? video? odëi 4/4).
* Sciöche tl speed dating normal, sce dagnora dui se deit le sciöche d’atri d’i preferis dles conversaziuns, canche as baié, ciafëis i dac d’i contats dl ater
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey Prësc m’essi scrit pro a #Chatroulette, mo spo éra stada che al é pié ia la Covid y la vera dla Ucraina, pórchí chësc n’á portë a nia. Mo i tracké spo de d’atra direziun.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Bun, la industria n’é nia propi plëna de porsones che spiunëia d’i sities d’i dac, mo i operadus de sigurté dla industria baia cun mé. I sá de deplü de chël che m’essi mai pinsé sön i detai de dagnora i sities d’i dac, y de plü m’ál fat de desplajëi. N’é nia propi na gran revelaziun che Bumble é sciöche i d’atri dagnora.
Degügn di sities d’i dac n’á plü de na piza d’escurjiun sön la sigurté. Ai peisa le cost de lites de dagnora cuntra le cost de fá propi chël le travalg, y dagnora inant, i cosć de lites dagnora i é stá bas.

@lorry
> La industria n’é nia propi plëna de porsones che spiunëia sön i sities de dating
Vares d’i porsones specifiches d’i chësc mutif?
> Ai peisa le cost de lites de dagnora cuntra le cost de fá propi chël le travalg, y dagnora inant, i cosć de lites dagnora i é stá bas
Ah. Le prinzip de Fight Club en travalg. Trist. Nes marentun deplü d’i d’atri d’i d’atri d’i dac online.

Good morning.
What do you do baby?
It is day two of Iceland.
All right.
We are touring the south of Iceland today.
I'm excited about it.
The weather is magnificent.
Very pretty.
Today.
Yesterday morning when I left, it was already raining.
But today the sun is out, so I'm hoping it stays this way while we're driving, you know, towards the south.
We will see.
But yes, looking forward to today.
Let's head out.

Bun dé.
Ci faste, deboriada?
Al é le secund dé te Islanda.
Va bun.
Incoo fajunse n tour tl sud de l'Islanda.
Sará bel dër.
Le tëmp é merviglios.
Dër bel.
Incoo.
Ghir de mamia canche i sun piada via corrections, ovel bele o rorëgn.
Ma incoo él le sorëdl, sibe speri ch'al rorëgnes insciö mënter ch'i jún, te saus, devers le sud.
Ciararunse.
Ma dër bën, i m'un ligre por incoo.
Piun via.

```json
[
  "Powerful and easy to use. No set-up or transaction fees. And no credit card required. Set up your free account once, and keep it as long as you like. Exactly what “free” is supposed to be.",
  "Join the 1.6 million small businesses that have trusted the Mambalo E‑commerce platform to sell online.",
  "Set up your Mambalo store once to easily sync and sell across a website, social media, marketplaces like Amazon, and live in-person. Get started with one, or try them all.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Get expert technical support whenever you need it.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Grow your online store with new tools and apps from our Mambalo partners.",
  "№1 Fastest implementation e-commerce platform in 2019.",
  "Turn social sharing into social selling. Easily add and sell products on your Facebook and Instagram feeds to let shoppers browse and make purchases from inside their favorite social media channels.",
  "Sell on marketplaces",
  "Get a piece of the $200B pie with marketplace integrations for eBay and Amazon. Sell seamlessly across the most popular marketplaces right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Sell online, in-store, and on-the-go",
  "Accept payments in-store and on the go with Square and 52 other point-of-sale systems. And best of all, inventory levels are automatically updated in your Mambalo account so all your stores stay perfectly in sync.",
  "Take your small business global with built-in international payment tools and translation support for 50 languages — and counting.",
  "No credit card required.",
  "Manage anywhere from the Mambalo mobile app",
  "Shipping that works for you",
  "Security you can trust",
  "Create, manage, and track advertisements, all from your Mambalo dashboard. Create low-cost advertisements that drive the right shoppers to your store in minutes. No experience required. You provide the dream, we’ll handle the techy stuff.",
  "* That’s it! Track results in your Mambalo dashboard",
  "Shop designer sunglasses for women, men and kids. Wearel online store. Choose among the most stylish sunglasses at an affordable price."
]
```

hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Potënt y saurí da döré. Degügn cosć de dverda o de transaziun. Y degüna carta de credit debojëgn. Configura to cutoff debant un n iade y tègnele tan de tëmp che te rës. Propi ci che \"debant\" dess bën ester.",
  "Unëscite ai 1,6 miliuns de pici afars che s'á fidadé dla plataform de e-commerce Mambalo por l'envaia online.",
  "Configura to durt de Mambalo un n iade por sincronisé y l'envaia saurí tres n sit web, i social media, mercá sciöche Amazon, y dal vi d'afar de porsona. Pröva cun un, o proveli düć.",
  "№1 Plataforma de e-commerce cun l'implementaziun plü snel dl 2019.",
  "Á dagnora l'aiüt tecnich de n espert co te n as debojëgn.",
  "Mambalo App Store",
  "Fajé crescer to durt online cun nüs stromenć y aplicaziuns de nscg partners de Mambalo.",
  "№1 Plataforma de e-commerce cun l'implementaziun plü snel dl 2019.",
  "Muda l'envaia social en envaia de social media. Sposta y l'envaia saurí produc sön i feed de Facebook y Instagram por lascé che i clienc vire y compri diretamënter da sü channels de social media preferis.",
  "L'envaia sön i mercá online",
  "Pia na pert dla torte de 200 miliardi de dólars cun lis integrazions de mercá por eBay y Amazon. L'envaia daldöt dagnora sön i mercá plü poponüs diretamënter da to dashboard de Mambalo.",
  "L'envaia online, tl durt y en iade",
  "Azeta i paiamënć tl durt y en iade cun Square y atri 52 sistems de pont de l'envaia. Y daldöt de miú, i liviei de inventar vën atualisá dagnora automaticamënter te to cutoff de Mambalo, sciöche dagnora düć i dures s'asincroniseies perfetamënter.",
  "Porta to pice afar a livel global cun stromenć de paia internazionai integrá y l'aiüt de traduziun por 50 lingac — y deplü.",
  "Degüna carta de credit debojëgn.",
  "Gestisci dagnora d'olach'te rës cun l'aplicaziun de telefonin de Mambalo",
  "La spediziun che vá por té bën",
  "Sigureza sön che te pōs te fidé",
  "Crea, gestisci y dagnora tracia i adz, düć da to dashboard de Mambalo. Crea adz a bas cost che porta i clienc gius te to durt en n valch menüt. Degüna esperienza debojëgn. Tö te dās to sogn, nos s'en fistidiun de la pert tecnica.",
  "* Chësc é döt! Tracia i resultać te to dashboard de Mambalo",
  "Crea dures d'ogliai da sör por dodes, umini y mituns. Durt online Wearel. Chir feter danter i ogliay da sör plü de moda a n prisc co s'aporta."
]
```

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

Nevada, the Silver State.
Yay!
Hey, honey.
We'll be there in about an hour.
Try to have a good attitude, honey.
So what's the plan with grandma?
I don't know.
Selling the ranch?

I think she'll move and come live with us in LA.
I doubt it.
She likes the country.

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

pënge cun bazkie! 🧵 un thread (lonch) [1/x]
M’un sun ponsé che al foss burt de sparte dut le prozes che al töl d’istat por mët adöm na sena personalisada. Al podess ester util por valgügn y de devertimënt por d’atri :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVA & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
Desche döt is savëis, sunsi na porsona dër de dlijia 🛐 deache pö...
La sena: i sun tl iort de Eden. Adam mhna pomes dl lëgn proibí, deache tlar che al al mhna. Eva n’en pol nia plü de sües de bades, tol n dorbias dër nia de söl post te chi parajes y speta d’i dé jö n valgönes tates a Adam. 🐍
#painting

pënge cun bazkie! 🧵 un thread (lonch) [2/x]
Duncue, i colors debojëgn de fotos de referënza. I oress che Eva sibe tl mët d’istat a stravané le dorbias; porchësc m’un sun ponsé che n batidö de baseball podess ester a post.
Y jor jö por la morda de l’AI, sunsi colé sön chësta foto dër d’istat che á n bel posizionamënt y na buna löm.

pënge cun bazkie! 🧵 un thread (lonch) [3/x]
I oress che Adam sibe te na posiziun de darsëna y ch’al tepe ince na poma proibida, y döt chëst, odü da de lât/dandolsc. Ince la löm dess gní dal medemo lât dl batidö. Porchësc döt adöm é dër stlet da ciafé na foto de referënza adatada, por chëst m’un faji i la posiziun ensciö.
I á fat n valgönes 20 fotos cun n valgönes pices desferënzes de posiziun etc. y i m’á d’instat por chësta. (La man drita va a golfé la poma)

Good job here.
Let's move it a little bit more.
Watch out.
Tucker, let's just kick it over.
Hey.
Hey, hey.
Then let's just move this one out, because the Tucker will be a little sassy with precious, and she'll kind of boss around with food.
That's why we got to move it around, John.
Okay, so they have their hey, of course they want their pellets.
Eat their pellets first before their hey, hey.
So yeah, let's get that.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

@Maker_of_Things
Épa döt sciampé o él de ghesan? Sce al é de ghesan, spo dillo amez tl medemo studio y tènlo d'oci.
Pensé che ara l'àghes tutes dales vënes dlungia le bles, él na poscibilité ch'ara sii jüda massa dërt en dénte y che la vëna se sii sciampada dovia, y che spo na fia de mofola l'àghes sciampada de porco mënter ch'ara gnea fora. Döt dënt dales tecniches y dales fers de laur. I n'à mai podü m'un ciafé cun chëres odles dërtes ma i ê dër de burt cun la "farfalla", te m'as pité dër de plü delicateza.
Sperun che se sii n pü' calmé sciöche sëgn.

@tempusfelix
Ince, da col bles mia. Me faje dër de mofola, ma al va mioran. Al n'é nia sciampé o sanch de döt.

@Maker_of_Things
Bun. S'arà bën podü jüda massa dërt en dénte, spo recordete che sce a n'é nia de bria, te d'as d'aria de podëi dmandé un n dotur te specific sce le tò studio al pormët. Por ejëmpl i à ion la sora d'infirmera de mi studio, d'as n dër mirit.

We were.

Can Twitch subs watch the bonus episode?
Yes.

Dad.

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
I d’ciacia ressa á ciafè le vantac al 26ejim menüt cun le goliador Diaz, deache le iogadú dl Real Madrid á mosstré so istinct por le gol.

Le ciafó da d’angol de Achraf Hakimi é gnü sciorté de ciaf dales pertes dla porta da Ayoub El Kaabi y Diaz á dorié le bal dagnara dlungia porta.

Al á sën scoredé te vignuna dles cinch partides dl Maroch y lëiga so record personal por le maiú numer de goi fac da un de Maroch te na sora fasa finala dla Copa d’Africa, mo al á messé lascé le ciamp tert cun na fassa sciorta sön la raba, ci che sará na preacupaziun por l’atrenadú Walid Regragui.

Les ocajiuns é stades dures da ciafè por dures les parzites, mo Abde Ezzalzouli á sciorté de ciaf de püch dsoras la traversa sön n ater ciafó da d’angol de Hakimi, phosphorylation che chësc ultim á pité na ocajiun de ciaf por Saibari, che é gnüda sciupada.

Le Camerun á albü deantüra da nia ciafè n rigoal col che Mbeumo é gnü stpadré te area, sciöche l’arbitre dla Mauritania Dahane Beida á fat sciass de ioghé inant, phosphorylation che Georges-Kevin Nkoudou á sciorté de ciaf dlungia le post posterior cun la mian ocajiun dla partida por i Lions Indomitable.

Le Maroch á fat le 2-0 n valgügn menüc plü tert por stüde fora la partida, canche Saibari é gnü lascé descurt dlungia le post posterior y á albü le tëmp de controlé le bal y sciuté bas tl ciantun dagnara dla rëi.

Ismael Saibari á albü flá por le Maroch cuntra le Camerun (REUTERS)

Te l’ater car de final de vëndres, Iliman Ndiaye á scoredé le su gol cun che le Senegal s’á assiguré n post tles semifinales dl Afcon por la terza iada tles ucenes cater competiziuns, batenn le Mali a 10 iogadus por 1-0.

Ndiaye á scoredé do 27 menüc, aprofitand de n gran fal dl portier por mete le Senegal dant te n derby teso cuntra i vijins dl’Africa dl vest.

Le Mali é gnü reduciú a 10 iogadus por la secunda pert do che le capitan Yves Bissouma é gnü sciassé fora por n secund amonimënt dagnara la pausa.

Al é gnü amoní deplü por n intervënt deantürat al 25ejim menüt y é gnü sciassé fora do n fal nia debojëgn sön Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Le Mali era a 10 iogadus dal 26ejim menüt de so confrunt deantürat cuntra la Tunisia y é impò reüsí a passè le runda sön rigoals, mo chësta iada n’ál nia plü albü la forza de recuperé cuntra n Senegal sciamp y ordané.

Les ocajiuns é stades dures da ciafé por dures les parzites, mo Abde Ezzalzouli á sciorté de ciaf de püch dsoras la traversa sön n ater ciafó da d’angol de Hakimi, phosphorylation che chësc ultim á pité na ocajiun de ciaf por Saibari, che é gnüda sciupada.

Le Camerun n'á nia albü deantüra canche Mbeumo é gnü stpadré te area sënza ciafé n rigoal, sciöche l’arbitre dla Mauritania Dahane Beida á fat sciass de ioghé inant, phosphorylation che Georges-Kevin Nkoudou á sciorté de ciaf dlungia le post posterior cun la miú ocajiun dla partida por i Lions Indomitable.

Le Maroch á fat le 2-0 n valgügn menüc plü tert por stüde fora la partida, canche Saibari é gnü lascé descurt dlungia le post posterior y á albü le tëmp de controlé le bal y sciuté bas tl ciantun dagnara dla rëi.

```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

1/

(ëra fô tres sciöche mata de m’odëi te chësc sogn) deache i fô tl col de m’en tò jö la dlese d’invërn en d’asvelto empede ordné.

2/

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

L'argomënt por l'impeachment de Donald Trump

Bambes sön l'America Latina: Al parea sciöche le film "Wag the Dog" (Saré i edli), sce dëis a mi da bën. L'aministraziun, che parea dër de bën d'ascolté a pié ia danü cun la concuista militara neoconservadora, à en müt sot l'ultima verra por n codesc de dreg de guern tl Venezuela cun atacs indescriminà sön botes tl Mar de la Caribica y ti dacias dl Pazifich dlungia l'America Zentrala. Chisc atacs, dac faga zënza n minimization de dac dal congres y sön na ipotesa dorta che les botes fess plëgnes de fentanyl che jornea ti Stac Unis, é stac de bëgn d'assassin por se d'istess. Mo la nuvità che l'armada à albü l'ordin de ataché na barca bele sciampada te n atac "double tap" por copé chi che s'à salvà à fat gní l'ombria de crimins de verra - y te na fojon che ganch dër tröc republicans ne parea d'ester prësc a azeté.

L'amic de Binance de Trump ciafa l'indulgënza: Changpeng Zhao à metü man chest ann sciöche le desonoré ex CEO de Binance, la maiora piataforma de barat de dac de triptovaluta al monn, do avëi fat n tëmp de priscion por, sciöche le DOJ de Biden à dit, "avëi falé de tigní n program d'efeto de contrast dl daciart d'arjënt fosch (AML)", violan le Bank Security Act y lascian che i dac d'arjënt jess danc zënza tigní do a n gröm de auc fas, sciöche "terorisc, cyber-chriminai y abusers de mituns". Mo Zhao, avan pordü le dërt de mené Binance, i jornea indô de müt de dac. Insciö àl adoré sües conescienzes cun la familia y l'ambient dlungia Trump por ciafé n'indulgënza che ti coless de mené indô la barca. En barat, Zhao à fat d'ogni de müt por World Liberty Financial - adoran la forza de Binance por riché le fond de tripto privat de Trump. Tim Noah de TNR fova dër d'ascolté a n müt d'enrabé por chest pat sciur.

Trump à insciö fat d'ogni de müt por dër sostergní la dita Nvidia, impò: Chest ann, le president à tòt d'ogni de müt cun la tradiziun de segurëza nazionala de dac d'agn y à fat a sau che al colëit a la dita de bën vëne i chips H200 a la Cina. Sciöche David Sanger de "The New York Times" à noté, le tratat - i dac d'en "lobbism dër de bën" dal CEO de Nvidia y dlascia-pasc de la Ciasa Blancia Jensen Huang - à fat gní na de dac de basa: "Sce i chips che dodes la tecnologia plö inant de dac parea de d'ester fac a vëne a la Cina de dac tecnologich, militar y d'arjënt di Stac Unis, ulache vën pa trac la ligna nöia?". Chest é impò dër de müt n mender pinsier de Trump: Le tratat à ince fat a sau che "le 25 por zent de dac d'ogni de bën da la dita dles vëndites jess ti Stac Unis", te n auter caje d'amor de chesta aministraziun por le corporativism fascist.

Tim Noah de TNR fova dër d'ascolté a n müt d'enrabé por chest pat sciur.

Chips a la Cina: Parlan de Tim Noah y d'enrabiamënt: Al ne é belch nia dër de bën che na sora dita, Nvidia, sides rovada a avëi n podëi sciöche n dío che piga le marcià. Süa importanza de bëgn d'ascolté por l'economia globala à fat che Noah l'à indexada sciöche un di pilastri maius che parea de crodé, canche al à fat i dac por n poscibl colaps de la borsa de Trump bele d'otobré. Trump à insciö fat d'ogni de müt por dër sostergní la dita Nvidia, impò: Chest ann, le president à tòt d'ogni de müt cun la tradiziun de segurëza nazionala de dac d'agn y à fat a sau che al colëit a la dita de bën vëne i chips H200 a la Cina. Sciöche David Sanger de "The New York Times" à noté, le tratat - i dac d'en "lobbism dër de bën" dal CEO de Nvidia y dlascia-pasc de la Ciasa Blancia Jensen Huang - à fat gní na de dac de basa: "Sce i chips che dodes la tecnologia plö inant de dac parea de d'ester fac a vëne a la Cina de dac tecnologich, militar y d'arjënt di Stac Unis, ulache vën pa trac la ligna nöia?". Chest é impò dër de müt n mender pinsier de Trump: Le tratat à ince fat a sau che "le 25 por zent de dac d'ogni de bën da la dita dles vëndites jess ti Stac Unis", te n auter caje d'amor de chesta aministraziun por le corporativism fascist.
hypo_7:

Bambes sön l'America Latina: Al parea propi "Wag the Dog" (Saré i edli), sce dëis a mi da bën. L'aministraziun, che parea dër de bën d'ascolté a pié ia danü cun la concuista militara neoconservadora, à en müt sot l'ultima verra por n codesc de dreg de guern tl Venezuela cun atacs indescriminà sön botes tl Mar de la Caribica y ti dacias dl Pazifich dlungia l'America Zentrala. Chisc atacs, dac faga zënza n minimization de dac dal congres y sön na ipotesa dorta che les botes fess plëgnes de fentanyl che jornea ti Stac Unis, é stac de bëgn d'assassin por se d'istess. Mo la nuvità che l'armada à albü l'ordin de ataché na barca bele sciampada te n atac "double tap" por copé chi che s'à salvà à fat gní l'ombria de crimins de verra - y te na fojon che ganch dër tröc republicans ne parea d'ester prësc a azeté.

L'amic de Binance de Trump ciafa la grazia: Changpeng Zhao à metü man chest ann sciöche le desonoré ex CEO de Binance, la maiora piataforma de barat de dac de criptovaluta al monn, do avëi fat n tëmp de priscion por, sciöche le DOJ de Biden à dit, "avëi falé de tigní n program d'efeto de contrast dl daciart d'arjënt fosch (AML)", violan le Bank Security Act y lascian che i dac d'arjënt jess danc zënza tigní do a n gröm de auc fas, sciöche "terorisc, cyber-chriminai y abusers de mituns". Mo Zhao, avan pordü le dërt de mené Binance, i jornea indô de müt de dac. Insciö àl adoré sües conescienzes cun la familia y l'ambient dlungia Trump por ciafé na grazia che ti coless de mené indô la barca. source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
proiet de s'en joré, stafeta dles vachianzes de porparé
dé 1:
Polí fora l'armar de ciamena da dormí gran
& le contignü de scatles sön na para.
Sun amez a scrutené döt ci che i ai. Öles tól fora na picera pert por la salvamenté. Coses de dertan. Pec pratics por m'enmadri na vita nöia. A chësc frast i sai chi sielg fora deplü de ci che i ai debojëgn, beldespò deplü de ci che i posse pórter; mo la cuantitá che i lasce daldó é dër deplü granda. Cern l'auzel de ci che i tègni & olach'al va, vën daldó dl ejam. Döt le dër sará dé inant ai "scavengers."
#moverR

Dé 2, pofia de mezdedé, lönesc.
Anco' él plü de sfreia co iers. Söi d'anchera de deplü de tröpa plü "remedea". Le d挑戰: chisc record salvá é n pës fìsich che dlongia nia d'ütil por m'adavagné le deman, m'ancor i acompagne amez a i cialé. Al é n stert condan d'en generl, m'al pé, de mëter de flé sön record dertans. Ma i sai ch'ai á na forza. Mo vëi, i sun n artist. Ince record de scontenté, dërt mofores, á n valor por me. I vao inant sciöche daprëia, tignìn de mëndra pert+

+de ci che i fajo jorá, ince sce i sai chi m'en tègni "massa." Le proscimo var sará propi chël de s'en joré & meter apost, olache de d'atres coses podess gnì sies. Chësta fasa é la pre-selezion daprëia de dé döt ci che é gnü polí fora ai atri che s'en vará döt demez.
Da meter sot a: sciöche s'en joré da na ciasa de 12 agn & n paesc d'origina de 45 agn, cun raisc de familia chilò (& ogec fac a man) da 150 agn. Al é finalmënter l'ora de s'en joré, a la drescia de na cultura che se lée a mi laurs.
#moverR

Al é n stert condan d'en generl, m'al pé, de mëter de flé sön record dertans. Ma i sai ch'ai á na forza. Mo vëi, i sun n artist. Ince record de scontenté, dërt mofores, á n valor por me. I vao inant sciöche daprëia, tignìn de mëndra pert+

+de ci che i fajo jorá, ince sce i sai chi m'en tègni "massa." Le proscimo var sará propi chël de s'en joré & meter apost, olache de d'atres coses podess gnì sies. Chësta fasa é la pre-selezion daprëia de dé döt ci che é gnü polí fora ai atri che s'en vará döt demez.
Da meter sot a: sciöche s'en joré da na ciasa de 12 agn & n paesc d'origina de 45 agn, cun raisc de familia chilò (& ogec fac a man) da 150 agn. Al é finalmënter l'ora de s'en joré, a la drescia de na cultura che se lée a mi laurs.
#moverR

A chësc frast i sai chi sielg fora deplü de ci che i ai debojëgn, beldespò deplü de ci che i posse pórter; mo la cuantitá che i lasce daldó é dër deplü granda. Cern l'auzel de ci che i tègni & olach'al va, vën daldó dl ejam. Döt le dër sará dé inant ai "scavengers."

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
I m'ess bel sce l'alcol n'ess nia na chëta de normalité sciöche scincundura tl'andana 😅 Mio dature de de lial m'á manco na boza de Likör d'idof, söl de m'es, ma l'unic alcol che nes sà bel a nos d'i markers de alcol

Me sa che "nia t'i vester bun" n'é nia l'espresciun dreta, i pessi sciöche n'é döt n bel nia sciöche un d'instes che döt i gragn s'un laures con chësta meria, canche d'él de jent che n'ess gnanch d'i bati dret, y scerf döt, pessi che l mond i jess döt de mender sce i l'ess sciuré tl tlozet empede l scinché a val'un

@doombloomart
Iö á albü l cors de sensitivé oblighé por les gran aziendes ti USA che ti recorda ala jent che nia döt cant n'ó alcol y che an n'ess nia da domandé le porchí. Al m'ess de parëi che chësc dess vester plü comun

@elithebearded Ghes, al é soral manco chël che i m'ess d'orëi ince iö. I capësci che cun l'invie de raba en vacoch a döt na gran azienda ne s'un faje de nia döt de bel a dagnora döt, ma 1. ne manco nia raba en vacoch a döt na gran azienda, bel d'en mender, y 2. l'alcol me dâ n bun d'as de fastide por le mët che tröc che n'ess nia da bati d'alcol se l podess a bati canche al rüva sozede de d'instes sot por d'ega de ciasa. 😅

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Le Cloudhorizon Waterproof se sônt fat aposta por le ritmo d'enant y de rst dl jore por jé a laur d'invërn. Söa toma lëia y impermeabla lëia i pîsc sasc sënza dé de gran peis, y la forma archisada dl tisc d'instruziun t'aiüta a te mólé inant cun sciampor, ince canche t'as plö de n vistí d'addos y te portes de gragn psc.

Sota i pîsc, la sbrofura Helion crëia n rbalz amortisé che dëna les lunghes strades danter les staziuns, mënter che la sôla de gome anti-smicé mët a sigureza sön i schia d'ega y sön les matoneles sberlucëntes. Le design minimalist t'i dá n aspet curé y modern, d'or d'idéal sce t'as de plajei n tisc de sport che de gëna la mola d'ora d'intemperies cun discreziun, sënza fá de gran melli sön sües carateristiches tecniches.
