source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.

hypo_0:
Thompson, en rota por i USA, é la stëra sora dles scores pro la cualificaziun de Galway por la finala dl FBD

Matthew Thompson, en rota por la California, á ficié dedorof l'balon te rëi por n'analise de 2-06, canche Galway á davagné por 11 punc a Tuam cuntra Leitrim y s'á garanté n post tla finala dla FBD League dla edema che vëgn.

Thompson, nominè sciöche „Young Footballer of the Year“ dl 2025, de n'ará nia la poscibilité de scioghé por döt le campionat de liga y la pröma pert dl campionat prinzipale. Padraic Joyce á confermè che le scioghadú de Salthill-Knocknacarra se dëna sön le Berkeley-College por le proscimo semester.

Al é sté la fegöra prinzipala de n Galway cun tröpes novités - cun ince Cian Hernon y Kieran Molloy - che á peté sö do n svantaje de trëi punc a la fin dl pröm tëmp cuntra Leitrim.

Thompson á ficié n gol tl ciat sora te la pröma pert, mo i campions de Connacht yera d'ancol dër dales boles ressolütes de Killian Gaffney, intratan che Ryan O'Rourke y Jack Kelly á döt d'oi concuisćé punc por Leitrim.

L'alenadú de Galway, Padraic Joyce, protesta cun l'arbitre por na dezijion

Canche Thompson á convertí n penalte t'la secunda pert de la partida, á Galway coiü i punc de n'vitoria tlassea, cun 10 scioghadus desvalis dales scores por n resultat final de 2-19 a 0-14.

Do döes fasedes dles eliminatories de FBD League, i pröms dusc s'á cualifiché por la finala dla edema proscima, canche Galway s'enfrontará cun le davagnadú dla partida danter Roscommon y Mayo de deman.

Tl Leinster á Westmeath conchisté n post te la finala de la O'Byrne Cup, do na vitoria de 11 punc sora d'Offaly, t'na spetacurara d'gols a Mullingar.

Ence de s'enfrunté cun n Kildare svelt, che á davagné Dublin por 1-22 a 1-13.

L'echipa de Westmeath coordinada da Mark McHugh s'á cualificá dan i campiuns de Longford do n'tiré de moneda saba d'antier, mo ai á d'ert fat vëia dër bel te la partida de saba.

Döes dúpies de gol de Danny McCarton y Brandon Kelly, deplü n gol de Senan Baker, á condüt a la vitoria por 5-10 a 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy á segné dui gols danter la faseda dl pröm y dl secundo tëmp por reporté i gosc de gora de d'compagnia, redujend l'vantaie sön trëi punc a 11 menuc tl secundo tëmp.

La d'compagnia á spo concuisćé n rë de 3-02 te i proscimi 15 menuc sënza rezepì na resposta y á archité la vitoria de feter en dër de d'ert.

Kildare á ciafè la drita rota tl secundo tëmp cuntra Dublin y s'atend sën d'ess cun n sul gol dret luntan da la pröma Copa O'Byrne dal 2014 encá.

Harry O'Neill ficia la bala te rëi por Kildare

Döes les copies de staff tecnich á dret fat proves te la faseda dles gares de Newbridge; te la pröma pert Dublin á fat dër bëgn palesá de manco fegöres conesciüdes mo l'vantaie de 1-08 a 0-08 a la fin dl pröm tëmp l'á dit defin al contrari.

Jamie McCarville á ficié de n bel colp de man, mo l'é sté Clyde Burke a ficié impresciun cun de dër biei tirs y dui "orange flags", danter chisc le secund d'gola de na gran cualité.

Alex Beirne s'á coiü en marea de punc por i Lilywhites, y le penalte de dui punc ficié te i pröms menuc dl secundo tëmp á fat inaudiré na seria de 1-05 sënza degügn dles respóstes, cun Harry O'Neill che á segné le gol de vitoria tl 43ejim menút.

Kildare á tigní dret sön la medema drita con la pert finala de James Harris che cun dui punc á s'azertè la finala defin.

Jamie McCarville á ficié n gol de man, mo al é sté Clyde Burke a ficié impresciun por i sostegnadus en viaia cun de dër biei tirs y dui "orange flags" - cun le secund de dër de gran cualité.

Alex Beirne s'á coiü en marea de punc por i Lilywhites, y le penalte de dui punc ficié te i pröms menuc dl secundo tëmp á inaudiré n rë de 1-05 sënza degügn dles respóstes, cun Harry O'Neill che á segné le gol te rëi tl 43ejim menút.

Kildare á tigní dret sön la medema drita cun le penalte final de James Harris de dui punc che á s'azertè la finala defin.
hypo_6:
Thompson, en rota por i USA, é la stëra de Galway che s'asigura la finala dl FBD

Matthew Thompson, en rota por la California, á fat n bel 2-06 canche Galway á davagné por 11 punc a Tuam cuntra Leitrim por s'asiguré n post tla finala dla FBD League de la edema che vëgn.

Thompson, nominè sciöche „Young Footballer of the Year“ dl 2025, ne sará nia d'antena por döt le campionat de liga y la pröma pert dl campionat, cun Padraic Joyce che á confermé che le scioghadú de Salthill-Knocknacarra studiëia a Berkeley por le semester che vëgn.

Al é sté la fegöra prinzipala de n Galway dër caraterisé da d'esperimënzć - cun ince Cian Hernon y Kieran Molloy - canche ai á recuperé n svantaje de trëi punc a la fin dl pröm tëmp por davagné sön Leitrim.

Thompson á ficié n gol tl ciat sora te la pröma pert, mo i campions de Connacht yera d'ancol dret do Leitrim a la pusa, cun Killian Gaffney che s'á desmostré dër d'efet dales boles fëmes, intratan che Ryan O'Rourke y Jack Kelly á ince fat punc.

L'alenadú de Galway, Padraic Joyce, protesta cun l'arbitre por na dezijion

Ince porsura, cun Thompson che á convertí n penalte tl secundo tëmp, á Galway controlé la partida sënza fadia do la faseda de pusa, cun 10 scioghadus desvalis a la marca por n resultat final de 2-19 a 0-14.

Do döes fasedes de FBD League, i pröms dui de la tlassifica va inant te la finala de la edema proscima, canche Galway s'enfrontará cun le davagnadú de la gara danter Roscommon y Mayo de deman.

Tl Leinster á Westmeath conchisté n post te la finala de la O'Byrne Cup, do na vitoria de 11 punc sora d'Offaly, t'na gara cun n gröm de gols a Mullingar.

A s'enfrunté cun d'ei tla finala sará le Kildare, che á davagné Dublin por 1-22 a 1-13.

L'echipa de Westmeath coordinada da Mark McHugh s'á cualificá dan i campiuns de Longford do n tiré de moneda saba d'antier, mo ai á fat vëia dër bel sön le ciamp de sciog sabeda.

Döes dúpies de gol de Danny McCarton y Brandon Kelly, deplü n gol de Senan Baker, á condüt a la vitoria por 5-10 a 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy á segné dui gols danter la faseda dl pröm y dl secundo tëmp por reporté i gosc te la gara, redujend le vantaie a trëi punc söl 11ejim menút dl secundo tëmp.

Ince porsura, na faseda de furchia de 3-02 sënza degöna risposta te i proscimi 15 menuc á fat archité la gara d'na drita feter desvalia por i d'ciasa.

Kildare á ciafè la drita rota tl secundo tëmp cuntra Dublin y s'atend sën d'ess cun n sul gol dret luntan da la pröma Copa O'Byrne dal 2014 encá.

Harry O'Neill ficia la bala te rëi por Kildare

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
La s'à mangé n ater pü' de polastro y s'à n müt n pü'. La s'à ince sciamporé n pü' de plü l'ultima iada che i as fat borié i licuic.
I as telefoné al dotor di tiers dales 8:30 de chësc de por damandé sce ai ti á ciaré sot al palat moli mënter ch'era fova addurmentada, deache la s'à de gragn polips tl'orëdla. Me s'à dit che le veterinare m'ess cherdé de dërcol. N'al nia fat, i as cherdé jö sëgn (les 16:45 d'inchësc post) y me s'à dit che le dotor n'ess nia achësc dé. Me s'à asbeché n pü' y i as dit "i s'un paié plü de 600 sterline ieri, i sëis ditte de cherdé sce i un de chestiuns, i un de chestiuns y i n'arespondeis nia!"
"N'as nia car le to d'or mënter ch'i rasié, signor"
"N'é nia osc fal personalmënter, ma canch'i paie pressche n mile de sterline m'aspeti n livel de sorvisc che i n'este nia d'anté de me dé"
"I mendaré le veterinare dl'andra filiala a s'cherdé"

Dotor di tiers te n'andra clinica dales set y mesa por n pü' plü de medejina cuntra la nausea. Al n'ans gnaré nia fat paie la tarifa de fora de orar deache i as telefoné de pröma doman.
I as proé de ti dé n’atri 10ml de licuic d’emergënza.

De rito. Inieziun cuntra la nausea, gabapentin, y sëgn éra a ciaṣa. La s'à mangé n pü' de polastro y de ciaṣer.
I as ince ciafé de plü gabapentin en piloles por d'era

La n'astajará nia de mangé. I as de tignì do por de n'la fà nia vomité. L'é ince daldöt, daldöt sbalbiada. Fóra de de daltöt. Stoned. De feter fóra de döt. Defraia tl sotmarin ialf.
Le dotor de che chësc i resetará l'apetit o, canche i sciampun i antiviral, moster s'era fova le dolù ch'era tignì de mangé, ci che s'ess dit che l'é l'ora de n'ecografia.

La mangia n pü', y la s'à ince sciamporé n pü', ma la é ciamò sot medejines canche s'ess püre de chësc. La ti dun ciamò de licuic de ricover, y la n'é ciamò nia sciamporada coche la fass normalmënter.

Valencia s'à dechiaré che se de döt suspicios. La n'vegn nia canche se cherda, la sciampa sce te vas pro d'era. La vën ciamò por ségna, insciö che va bëgn, la s'à sölament odü sa sor adotiv de plü iades fardelada te na tovàa y sfurzada a borié de de rito, y la n'ó avëi nia de chësc, de dër gragn de mërces.

Nöf d’asfles d'Ming: la é n pü' plü ativa, ma ciamò flacia y la drom dër d'plü. La é ciamò do dui dous de antiviral, insciö ch'la é biaz daldöt stoned.
La mangia, n pü' por iada, y la s'à tignì do l'ultimo de d'sei licuic d'emergënza da na schira daldöt por d'era. La s'mët n pü' a post, ma la n'à nia tlapé valencia d'agns, y la n'é ciamò nia a post. Spere ch'l'é l'antiviral, y che canche i tolun i antiviral, l'apetit s'mantiene.

Ming s'à tignì do la spenada de antiviral y s'à n fort deṣiderio de jì fora, ci che i n'aspetun ciamò nia de fà. La mangia, la sciampora, ma al vorrá n valgönes d'edis mënter ch'i dorghes s'fades fora da d'era y i odarun spo co ch'la é.
Prudentamënter otimista.

La vën ciamò por ségna, insciö che va bëgn, la s'á sölament odü sa sor adotiv de plus iades fardelada te na tovàa y sfurzada a borié de de rito, y la n'ó avëi nia de chësc, de dër gragn de mërces.

Nöf d’asfles d'Ming: la é n pü' plü ativa, ma ciamò flacia y la drom dër d'plü. La é ciamò do dui dous de painkillers, insciö ch'la é biaz daldöt stoned.
La mangia, n pü' por iada, y la s'á tignì do l'ultimo de d'sei licuic d'emergënza da na schira daldöt por d'era. La s'mët n pü' a post, ma la n'á nia tlapé valencia d'agns, y la n'é ciamò nia a post. Spere ch'l'é i painkillers, y che canche i tolun i painkillers, l'apetit s'mantiene.

Ming s'á tignì do la spenada de painkillers y s'á n fort deṣiderio de jì fora, ci che i n'aspetun ciamò nia de fá. La mangia, la sciampora, ma al vorrá n valgönes d'edis mënter ch'i dorghes s'fades fora da d'era y i odarun spo co ch'la é.
Prudentamënter otimista.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Por n’atra cunt, ai pormez odü valch un che se lamëntia che i jüc te prëia de passé ala modalità lesia deguandé che te dëgnes.
Inće a mi me sciöche l’incherscesć cöst.
A mi me sà bel che al sides na modalità lesia. Ma dai, i mënse che i jüc dësse sciampmënt te lascé barusé, almanco ćina che les competiziuns à dles regoles d’acorde sön cöst.
Ma vigni jüch che m’à rota la scatola por m’enjigné la modalità lesia é stè n stöp immediat. I à n gröm de jüc de d’atri da jöćé, sce te dës che i dësses finé plü bles, complimënć, i à fusté plü d’orco.

Cöst é l’incherscesć che rënd i Mario moderns - o d’aldidancö inće inće - inće inće inće inćina inćina inćina d’orco de jöćé.
"Esto morü trëi iadi, Marioo? Chilò él la soper-tuta d’or de l’invincibilità de s’en fusté porchì che te saste de nagut! Sce te ne la dës nia, dës pormez schivé con gran atenzion de sciampmënt sfreghé d’atre cosses a pert de "mët mán la fasa d’orco sci sci nagut d’orco d’ater ma mët mán la fasa".
Ći de d’ater é porchì che i à sciampé da jöćé a Phantom Pain. Vigni iade che i mörìa, al m’ofrìa le capel da polon con la deziun de bles sön "sci", de d’ater i m’à dezenté de dila individualmënt "và a d’orco".

I capësc che al sides na deziun de mantignimënt, ma al é d’orco de nia respet.
La desvalianza che se bilancëia de d’atri de s’en fusté inće me mët de mof, porchì che i me mët mán por n’impiza d’orco e d’ater le jüch và de panica e m’en mët sön super lesio porchì che i s’en mët mán de s’en fusté.
I dëgni o valch de d’ater, i vöi mët mán de nöi, ma nia, śën la dsfida n’é plü. T’as reüsć! T’as fat sparí le jüch! No te cruzié, dles dfides d’orco ê por valch d’ater. Valch un mender.
I ne m’en recorde nia sce i à d’orco finé n jüch con la desvalianza autobilanciada.

Mënse che la desvalianza de basa danter mi e le so target de cliënć sides che a mi me sà bel de capí sciöche fá valch, mënter che a so target - almanco te so ćiof - ti sà bel de jé sön n rü con n tronch de d’orco te n parch de Disneyworld.
Valch strasceda, n pô de fluidos, ma no te cruzié, popo, babi Walt tëgn con tè. T’este sciampmënt de bles, te n’as gnanca bogn de te möia, sta ma lapò asët e jü-jü, chilò él na picera deziun de splash-splash.
Sce i asse odü cöst, i jesse a d’orco asët te n parch de jagn a carezé n jagn.

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Y sciöche un de chi drola, ciafunse gonot atacs chilò y daila. Sibe online, offline, o ince dales porsones plü davescina. Chisc atacs vëgn d'avez da omofobia, transfobia, o val' iade ince porćhed' n i deplaj sciöche i sun drola y sciöche i nos comportun, inće dantalöt i furries che và plü sot tla daintorporaziun sciöche l'interpretaziun de ròli y la teriantropia.

Porchël s'á n valgönes de nos tigní al de socrëza sënza avëi debojëgn de dí chí che i sun y dacandé che i gnôn. Val' iade s'unse tigní al d'archis söl taje mostran sö nos instësc ma ai amisc o ai amisc plü davescina. Mostré le dertal dl ciaf o dl corp é na cultura che la plü gran pert di furries á fat al manco n iade te n post privat, sibe de chi posć "scancela sën" o te na storia.

Ince sce al é sciöche, i sun impò d'ancuntada por interaziuns soziales offline. I jun a d'ancuntades furmeet—n'ancuntada de porsona danter furries, sibe te n grup o de porsona, sibe te n evënt o inće d'öga d'or—y val' iade organizeise na con o furcon sciöche MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, y de d'atri. Al é spave l'ancuntada offline, s'encuëi gní plü davescina, podëi i odëi de porsona postchëi che la majera pert de nos n'á mai odü i dertai dl ciaf d'un l'ater, fá na fotografia da tigní por se y dertoré de furbit te publich, rí d'un n col y baié de de d'atri interes sciöche chisc, y de d'atri fac. Al é bel, sozial y d'afet.

Sö d'aldedré i fac n'é plü i medemi. Sciöche la jënt se mët sö a dertorá d'anonimat, a taché furries, therian, LGBTQIA y a scrí fora i dac privac, sciöche inće la nosta comunité tol pert y dertura i dramesc dedit, i fac é deventá n pü' plü sbalciá, n pü' manco d'afet y al n'é plü chël d'antesć sciöche na comunité o na fana. Al n'é plü le medemo d'un n iade.

N pü' de mé spera che i fac posse indô deventé sciöche d'ansciöche ti agn 2000 y 2010, mo, i m'al lase fá al Signor. I m'un mët n pü' l'inchiet dles porsones y dla sozieté. I sun stanch de sciöche i fac và de mal in pićer y sciöche al é derturé d'ataché y de sparé pićenles comunités te n stât de derschëi. Al m'inchiet d'aldedré na sozieté che n'á plü d'aspet y de d'unité.

Porchël s'á n valgönes de nos tigní al de socrëza sënza avëi debojëgn de dí chí che i sun y dacandé che i gnôn. Val' iade s'unse salvè cun le se mostré ma ai amisc o ai amisc plü davescina. Mostré le dertal dl ciaf o dl corp é na cultura che la plü gran pert di furries á fat al manco n iade te n post privat, sibe de chi posć "scancela sën" o te na storia.

Ince sce al é sciöche, i sun impò d'ancuntada por interaziuns soziales offline. I jun a d'ancuntades furmeet—n'ancuntada de porsona danter furries, sibe te n grup o de porsona, sibe te n evënt o inće d'öga d'or—y val' iade organizeise na con o furcon sciöche MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, y de d'atri. Al é bel y spave s'ancunté offline, s'encuëi gní plü davescina, podëi i odëi de porsona postchëi che la majera pert de nos n'á mai odü i dertai dl ciaf d'un l'ater, fá na fotografia da tigní por se y dertoré de furbit te publich, rí d'un n col y baié de de d'atri interes sciöche chisc, y de d'atri fac. Al é bel, sozial y d'afet.

Sö d'aldedré i fac n'é plü i medemi. Sciöche la jënt se mët sö a tò demez l'anonimat dles porsones, a taché furries, therian, LGBTQIA y a scrí fora i dac privac, sciöche inće la nosta comunité tol pert y dertura i dramesc dedit, i fac é deventá n pü' plü sbalciá, n pü' manco d'afet y al n'é plü chël d'antesć sciöche na comunité o na fana. Al n'é plü le medemo d'un n iade.

N pü' de mé spera che i fac posse indô deventé sciöche d'ansciöche ti agn 2000 y 2010, mo, i m'al lase fá al Signor. I n'á plü speranza tles porsones y dla sozieté. I sun stanch de sciöche i fac và de mal in pićer y sciöche al é derturé d'ataché y de sparé pićenles comunités te n stât de derschëi. Al m'inchiet d'aldedré na sozieté che n'á plü de d'aspet y de d'unité.

source_doc:
```json
[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]
```
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Produce a valid json output that matches the input format. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
```json
[
  "Configura y gestionsce n conversion de Facebook dretg da tüa plataform Mambalo. Dësciaura de spartí söl sozial. T’es arjigné por la vëndita soziala.",
  "Azonta, promof y vënn i toc cun fazilité, o gestionsce döt tü sorvisc de reclaims de Facebook cun n para de clic — dretg da tüa plataform Mambalo.",
  "Convertësc i vijitadus de tò conversion en clienc che paia cun le remarketing de Facebook. Cun n para de clic realisunse reclaims dër mirá por ti recordé ai clienc i toc che ai á cialé de puzles de cumpré sënza i cumpré propi.",
  "Vënn dpertut",
  "Configura y gestionsce n conversion de Facebook dretg da tüa plataform Mambalo. Dësciaura de spartí söl sozial. T’es arjigné por la vëndita soziala.",
  "T’ás poia por le laur de gestiun plü gran? Mambalo sincronisëia de d’automatich tües informaziuns sön i toc de tò conversion online cun Facebook, insciö che vigni variaziun che te fas deperferes, vëgn dretg mostrada söl conversion ecommerce de Facebook. Val d’iadi dër scempl.",
  "Reclaims por tò conversion de Facebook — dorigané dër scempl",
  "Le Pixel de Facebook rënd i reclaims sön Facebook dër plü bogn. Fas bogn reclaims al publich che te t’un jites en bas de tules acziuns che ai á fat söl conversion online y taja canch’i se convertësc. Na ma ne sas te dër bun a chi che te ti fas reclaims, ma t’as ince na mender capia de sciöche tü reclaims ala vëndita laura. Döt en d’un, te pos rënd tü messaji dër plü de forza, arjunjon n mender retor dles spëises de reclam.",
  "Fas de remarketing. Por düc chi che vijitëia tò sit, o demia por i d’en de che vijitëia dles pajes d’en particolar o á fat de d’atres acziuns insciö d’en particolar.",
  "Spediziun y tases streamlines: Integhé cun i menders operators sciöche USPS, UPS, FedEx, y dër de d’atri porti d’internaziun por calcolé de d’automatich i cosć de spediziun.",
  "Operativité e-commerce de WordPress: Azonta tò conversion online sön WordPress y presenta i madesc toc, prisc, y descriziuns söl conversion de Facebook sciöche sön tüa plataform de WordPress o sön d’atri d’adoraziun sciöche Weebly, Wix, y Adobe Muse.",
```

```json
  "Él poscibl de trasferí tò shop da WooCommerce sön Facebook cun Mambalo?",
```
```json
  "Sën ciamó nia sgü y m'un de bof de d'atri aiüt cun la app de Mambalo Facebook commerce. Ci dësi pa fá?",

  "Porta plü sön la vëndita sënza joré a d'un"
]
```

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?

hypo_0:
I Melbourne Renegades ghesctëia Glenn Maxwell y i Melbourne Stars al Marvel Stadium tl BBL15 do che Usman Khawaja y i Brisbane Heat ghesctëia i Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper á dominé cun 82 nia fora sön 51 bales y Glenn Maxwell s'á recordé dla sensaziun dla bala sön la batta te n'injinn mureda de 20 nia fora sön 17 bales, che tolô ite un n terminal sciamp.

La fola de 42.846 porsones n'á nia ciafé la partida che a fess speré, sciöche i Stars á davagné la partida por ot wickets cun 25 bales de porsura.

Chësc mantëgn i Melbourne Stars en corsa, sciöche ai á rumpü na secuënza de trëi partides pordüdes y rënd la vita zoruch ai Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis á joré bun por tó 3-33 y fô sön n hat-trick a n cert momënt, mender che Harper é te n gran momënt, avend batü 356 runs cun na velocité de batüda de 159 por l turnoi. El fô l miú iocadú dla partida.

Tom Rogers é joré zoruch cun un n rabid 50 cuntra i Melbourne Renegades

Ma al fô döt sciampé na bota che Tom Rogers s'á fat de bën cun 50 sön 19 bales por scomencé l'injinn cun na colia d'anchia de 84 cun Harper.

"Ai nes á batü al 'G, porchël fôl bel da ciafé n tesc davagn", á Harper dit a Fox Cricket.

La maiú pert de porsona d'interes fô i comentars dla cabina de coment de Fox Cricket, dër che l'ex-capitan de l'Inghilterra Michael Vaughan á dit tler mender che decolisá al fô cun la drita che la gerarchia d'Inghilterra á traté n incident de n nightclub che á fat Harry Brook te Nea Zelanda denant ch'ai arivass in Australia por The Ashes.

L veteran di Melbourne Stars, Peter Siddle, á dit "al é sté un n bun rionda de rotula" cun la devandada che sburia la colia zoruch al secund post sön la tabela BBL.

Al scomënza a se scialdé cun trëi ioc de porsura por i Melbourne Renegades y dui por i Melbourne Stars.

Al é ciamó tröp cricket de porsura chësc isté, porchël aspetede inant. Giulan por nes sicuté. Póa i Stars ala fin davagné l títol?

La fola de 42.846 porsones n'á nia ciafé la partida che a fess speré, sciöche i Stars á davagné la partida por ot wickets cun 25 bales ciamó da iocé.

Chësc mantëgn i Melbourne Stars en corsa, sciöche ai á rumpü na secuënza de trëi partides pordüdes, y rënd la vita zoruch ai Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis á iocé dër bun por tó 3-33 y fô sön n hat-trick a n cert momënt, mender che Harper é te na gran forma, avend fat 356 runs cun na velocité de batüda de 159 por l turnoi. El é sté l miú iocadú dla partida.

Tom Rogers é joré zoruch cun un n rabid 50 cuntra i Melbourne Renegades

Ma al fô döt sciampé na bota che Tom Rogers á fat 50 sön 19 bales por scomencé l'innings cun na colia d'anchia de 84 cun Harper.

"Ai nes á batü al 'G, porchël fôl bel da ciafé nosc chinto davagn", á Harper dit a Fox Cricket.

La maiú pert de porsona d'interes fô i comentars dla cabina de coment de Fox Cricket, dër che l'ex-capitan de l'Inghilterra Michael Vaughan á dit tler mender che decolisá al fô cun la drita che la gerarchia d'Inghilterra á traté n incident de n nightclub che á fat Harry Brook te Nea Zelanda denant ch'ai arivass in Australia por The Ashes.

L veteran di Melbourne Stars, Peter Siddle, á dit "al é sté un n bun rionda de rotula" cun la devandada che sburia la colia zoruch al secund post sön la tabela BBL.

Al scomënza a se scialdé cun trëi ioc ciamó da iocé por i Melbourne Renegades y dui por i Melbourne Stars.

Al é ciamó tröp cricket de porsura chësc isté, porchël aspetede inant. Giulan por nes sicuté. Póa i Stars ala fin davagné l títol?

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Fora de cort na moscia de complices de mi ex me daciara tres deplëgn, me arfola y me amanaia a mi y a düc chi che ai bëtia che m'ebe dader l'aiüt en valch faza o manira.
Ün de chi colparëis é la tiktokera Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim che s'un é jüda fora sön i posć publics de mi ex y che cugnesce mi ex de porsona.
I cariará inant ciamé valch video de d'ëi sura de me cun n'avertënza de contignü (CW).
Mo i olesse che al fossa cler dër bën tan che chësta jënt m'ess de burt da dles sora y de cancelé i pici ribasć che i ai albü.
Chilo vëgnerel menac violentesc cuntra n testimon te mia decijion.

Chësta tiktokera á fat de so contignü PRINCIPAL le tajo de me daciaré a mi, a mi amisc y spezificamënter ai testimonis de mi desfratöm nia legal.
Te i video che ai á fat sura de me próvun de me depënje sciöche "nia n'ativista", "nia n hacker" y "massa n tarliscedü".
DÜT deache mi ex á dezis che le spartí dles fatures dertan na separaziun representass violënza de familia.
Al vëgn spo definí sciöche "ativism" le fat de me sciampé do tres cun na rassa online che vëgn azaiada sö y de chësta faza fá n checo por i scioldi sön MI de l'ega y sön mia causa te cort.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" é conesciüda te la jënt por carisurëles de tiktok de d'ëra instëssa che rorogna + arfola de plü de soi ex, düt sön so tiktok+IG.
Areej á sciurré spray al peve a na bibliotecaria trans, Canyon, DAN la camera dertan che al/ara sciampâ dal lüch de laur, bën dër deache Canyon á düt d'un albü da fá respeté i bunes reigles de la biblioteca.
Areej á fat cyberbullism a Canyon por de pici mënsc do.
Canyon é mort dër dedò, asvelé por n'overdose de d droga aposta.
De plü te la comunité mëtia che i de burt fac de Areej ebe bën dër condüt demez ala mort de Canyon.
CHISC é i "amisc" che mi ex se tëgn artan.

Sce no... chësc tajo de batalies anter de gauche é la piess telenovela coded de portlandia mai oghidore.
I n'ai MAI scrit nia de d'ëra d'esperié pùblicament d'Areej inant sën.
Areej s'á bën d'asvelé contatà 2 agn fá cun valch romborta te n grup, mo i ai DEDALBER dezis de nia ester de la pert.
I ai albü valch confront privat y te la comunité dertan les problematics che ai á alzà por s'asvelé de na dërcia de reconziliaziun de bona o de faza.
Üna s'un é jüda inant y evel de gran sostëgn por chësc i m'un ai sciampé.
Chësc fova düt le limit de nòsc contat.

Al momënt che i m'un ai sciampé ai avertí la comunité cuntra le cyberbullism de gran faza anter les porsones forestes al conflict intern de porsona d'esperié.
Chëst'avertënza fova arestada d'Areej, me sciampâ che so cyberbullism RUN a d'atres decijions che fova bele a so bën n'ess nia dër de bunes fopes.
Sura düt me sciampâ che le fat che Areej daciarâ le comitê de reconziliaziun/i mediaturs DERTAN le mëtia inant fova propi d'arfola dër de burt.
I ai avertí dër bën sura la drita poscibilitá che les vitimes de Areej d'asvelé se fess d'esperié de burt a se dlé de d'ëres instës.

source_doc:
Celtic hammer Dundee United on O'Neill's return

Normal service resumed at Celtic Park as champions Celtic secured a dominant 4-0 win over Dundee United and their first clean sheet since Martin O'Neill's previous game in charge.

Two first-half goals in five minutes from Yang Hyun-jun and Arne Engels sent Celtic on their way as O'Neill returned to the dugout in style following Wilfried Nancy's brief but disastrous reign.

Substitute Benjamin Nygren grabbed his 11th goal of the season and Daizen Maeda netted on the rebound to equal Celtic's two biggest wins of the league season so far. Both of them were in O'Neill's caretaker spell in charge, which resulted in seven wins from eight games.

Celtic sent for the 73-year-old on Monday after terminating Nancy's contract in the wake of six defeats - and 18 goals against - in eight matches.

The chaos, confusion and defensive fragility that marked Nancy's reign disappeared as the Hoops moved three points off the top of the table.

Nobody in the stadium would have been surprised to see O'Neill restore Celtic's long-standing 4-3-3 formation and the team picked up where they left off under O'Neill, as if they had awoken from a nightmare and got on with life as normal.

Centre-back Liam Scales was back to the consistent form he displayed before suffering in and out of a back three under the Frenchman.

Callum McGregor dictated play again and Celtic's wide players, Yang and Sebastian Tounekti, were given attacking licence after being handed wing-back roles by the former Columbus Crew head coach.

Celtic enjoyed 78 per cent possession, had 22 shots at goal and let United have just three. Their opponents averaged 12 shots during Nancy's tenure and United managed 17 themselves during their 2-1 win over the Hoops at Tannadice less than four weeks ago.

Celtic penned United in from the start, with Kieran Tierney instrumental in creating a series of first-half chances.

The left-back had a shot deflected wide, Yang and Scales threatened from headers and Maeda flicked a low cross of the bar, before the pressure paid off in the 27th minute.

Such was Celtic's dominance that Scales found himself in possession on the edge of the box and rolled a pass to Yang, who drilled home from 20 yards.

Maeda soon mis-kicked a volley before Engels produced a first-time finish from Tierney's pass.

It was not all plain sailing for Celtic in the first half. Mexican right-back Julian Araujo marked his first start with a yellow card for a dangerous challenge on Will Ferry, who was still hobbling when he took the resulting free-kick.

United also had chances and Dario Naamo looked unsure whether to head or volley Craig Sibbald's deep cross and did neither and Owen Stirton twice came close.

The striker was firstly foiled by a goal-saving block from Scales after being gifted possession by Auston Trusty and later shot just wide from 18 yards after the Celtic central defence backed off.

United brought on winger Amar Fatah for holding midfielder Pan Camara at half-time but Celtic were even more dominant in the second half.

Reo Hatate and Maeda missed good chances before Nygren shot high into the net from six yards in the 63rd minute.

Maeda had an easy finish six minutes later after Tounekti's shot was saved.

hypo_0:
Le Celtic bat le Dundee United a nüs de colps cun le retur de O'Neill

La normalité é jüda inant sön le ciamp de Celtic Park, con i campions dl Celtic che á vadagné daldöt por 4-0 sön le Dundee United y á mantegnü la porta sciuta por le pröm iade do l'ultima partida de Martin O'Neill sciöche trenadú.

Döes gol tes ti pröms cinc d'ora de juat dales fies de Yang Hyun-jun y Arne Engels á metü le Celtic sön la dërtia via, cun O'Neill che á fat so retur sön l'assise di sostituc cun gran stil do la cörta ma sciaria fasa de Wilfried Nancy.

Le sostitut Benjamin Nygren á fat so ünecim gol de la sajun y Daizen Maeda á dagné sön la stofa por lëde i dui majeri deces de la sajun dl Celtic cina d'inchëi. Atri dui fova stac te la fasa de dertur de l'O'Neill, che á portè a set vitores fora de ot partides.

Le Celtic á cherdé le trenadú de 73 agn indolajö de lönesc do ch'an á stlüt le contrat cun Nancy do sies pordüdes - y 18 gol incuntra - te ot partides.

Le caos, la confujiun y la deblëza defensiva che á caraterisé la fasa de Nancy é sparides cun i Hoops che se porta a trëi punc dal pröm post in clasifica.

Degügn tl stacio ne s'ess aspeté nia d'ater co che O'Neill mudass indô al schema de juat storich 4-3-3 dl Celtic, y la scuadra á pité inant sciöche s'an s'ess lü sön i dërs de O'Neill, sciöche s'an s'ess dscedé fora de n sogn döt n müt y s'ess lascé jö cun la vita normala.

Le defensur zentral Liam Scales á dagné so bun iüé ch'al demostrava dagnora denant de s'avëi stancé te na defensiva a trëi sot al franzos.

Callum McGregor á demané indô le juat y i dusc a la lera dl Celtic, Yang y Sebastian Tounekti, á albü le consëi de atach do avëi albü n rol de dusc da ala dal ex trenadú di Columbus Crew.

Le Celtic á albü n posess de bal por le 78 por cent, á fat 22 tirs a la porta y á lascé ma trëi ai aversars dl United. Söles partides te la fasa de Nancy, i aversars á fat na mez de 12 tirs por partida, y le United n'á fati 17 instës tlassa do la vitoria por 2-1 sön i Hoops a Tannadice nia manco de caranta d'edema d'edema d'edema.

Le Celtic á tignü le United dales fies n döt, cun Kieran Tierney che á iüé n rol fondamental te la creaziun de deplü ocajions ti pröms casc de juat.

Le defensur d'ala sora d'ala á albü n tir devié d'ala porta, Yang y Scales á mënazé de gol cun ti dusc y Maeda á dagné n cross bas che á tuché la traversa, denant che la presciun se portass resultac tl 27ejim menüt.

Le Celtic dominaba a de tles manires che Scales s'á ciafé cun la bala sön la riga d'aria y á fat n dertur de passaje a Yang, che á tiré drit tl gol da 20 metri.

Maeda á tosc faddé n col de volley denant che Engels s'ess dagné na definiziun dret amesa le passaje de Tierney.

Nia döt é jü saurí por le Celtic te la pröma fasa de juat. Le defensur d'ala dërtia mexican Julian Araujo á albü n carton jor l'pröm iade por n intervënt pricolos sön Will Ferry, che iüva ciamó de zop canch'al á trat le col de puniziun ch'en é gnü fora.

Le United á ince albü sües ocajions y Dario Naamo ne parô nia dertür s'al aspetass de col de ciaf o de volley sön le cross d'ala sora de Craig Sibbald, y n'á fat degügn di dui, y Owen Stirton s'á dagné deplü ocajions deplü de püt.

L'atachënt á d'edema albü l'bal sön n blco salvagol de Scales do avëi ciafé la bala sön n fal de Auston Trusty, y plü inant á tiré drit d'ala porta da 18 metri do che la defensiva zentrala dl Celtic á metü indô d'ala riga.

Le United á metü ite l'internazional Amar Fatah al post dl defensur de mët-ciamp Pan Camara tl mez de juat, ma le Celtic é sté deplü fort ciamó tl secundo tëmp.

Reo Hatate y Maeda á pordü de bones ocajions denant che Nygren s'ess dagné n col d'alt sön la rëi da sies metri tl 63ejim menüt.

Maeda á dagné na definiziun saurida sies menüc plü inant do che le col de Tounekti é sté salvé dal portier.

Nia döt é jü saurí por le Celtic te la pröma fasa de juat. Le defensur d'ala dërtia mexican Julian Araujo á albü n carton jor l'pröm iade por n intervënt pricolos sön Will Ferry, che iüva ciamó de zop canch'al á trat le col de puniziun ch'en é gnü fora.

Le United á ince albü sües ocajions y Dario Naamo ne parô nia dertür s'al aspetass de col de ciaf o de volley sön le cross d'ala sora de Craig Sibbald, y n'á fat degügn di dui, y Owen Stirton s'á dagné deplü ocajions por dui iades.

L'atachënt á d'edema albü l'bal sön n blco salvagol de Scales do avëi ciafé la bala sön n fal de Auston Trusty, y plü inant á tiré drit d'ala porta da 18 iars do che la defensiva zentrala dl Celtic á metü indô d'ala riga.

Le United á metü ite l'internazional Amar Fatah al post dl defensur de mët-ciamp Pan Camara tl mez de juat, ma le Celtic é sté deplü fort ciamó tl secundo tëmp.

Reo Hatate y Maeda á pordü de bones ocajions denant che Nygren s'ess dagné n col d'alt sön la rëi da sies iars tl 63ejim menüt.

Maeda á dagné na definiziun saurida sies menüc plü inant do che le col de Tounekti é sté salvé dal portier.

Le Celtic derschia le Dundee United al retur de O'Neill

La normalité é tornada söl ciamp dl Celtic Park cun i campions dl Celtic che s'á assiguré na vitoria dominanta por 4-0 sön le Dundee United y so pröm match sënza ciafè gol da canche Martin O'Neill fova sté sön la banchina dl'ultima partida de dertur.

Döi gol tl pröm tëmp te cinc menüć da pert de Yang Hyun-jun y Arne Engels á metü le Celtic sön la bona strada cun O'Neill che á fat so retur sön la banchina cun stil, do la cörta ma disastrous fasa de direziun de Wilfried Nancy.

Le sostitut Benjamin Nygren á fat so ünecim gol de la sajun y Daizen Maeda á dagné sön la rebatüda por arjonje les döes majeres vitores de la sajun de liga dl Celtic cina d'inchëi. Ertes dures dui fova staces te la fasa de dertur de l'O'Neill, che á portè a set vitores fora de ot partides.

Le Celtic á cherdé le trenadú de 73 agn de lönesc do ch'an á stlüt le contrat de Nancy do sies pordüdes - y 18 gol incuntra - te ot partides.

Le caos, la confujiun y la fragilité defensiva che á caraterisé la fasa de Nancy é sparides cun i Hoops che se porta a trëi punc dales prömes posiziuns de la tabela.

Degügn tl stadio ne s'ess aspeté nia d'ater co che O'Neill mudass indô al schema storich 4-3-3 dl Celtic, y la scuadra á pité inant sciöche s'an s'ess dscedé fora de n sogn dret de n müt y s'ess lascé jö cun la vita normala.

Le defensur zentral Liam Scales é jü indô sön la forma dagnora de debojëgn ch'al demostrava denant de s'avëi stancé te na defensiva a trëi sot al franzos.

Callum McGregor á diret le juat indô y i dusc de ala dl Celtic, Yang y Sebastian Tounekti, á albü le consëi de atach do avëi albü n rol de dusc da ala dal ex trenadú di Columbus Crew.

Le Celtic á albü n posess de bal por le 78 por cent, á fat 22 tirs a la porta y á lascé ma trëi ai aversars dl United. Söles partides de Nancy, i aversars á fat na mez de 12 tirs, y le United n'á fati 17 instës te la vitoria por 2-1 sön i Hoops a Tannadice nia manco de caranta d'edema fac.

Le Celtic á tignü le United dales fies n döt d'inant, cun Kieran Tierney che á iüé n rol fondamental te la creaziun de deplü ocajions ti pröms casc de juat.

Le defensur d'ala sora d'ala á albü n tir devié d'ala porta, Yang y Scales á mënazé cun i dusc y Maeda á dagné n cross bas che á tuché la traversa, denant che la presciun s'ess dagné n gol tl 27ejim menüt.

La dominanza dl Celtic fova te de tles manires che Scales s'á ciafé cun la bala sön la riga d'aria y á fat n passaje a Yang, che á tiré drit tl gol da 20 iars.

Maeda á tosc faddé n col de volley denant che Engels s'ess dagné na definiziun de pröm iade sön n passaje de Tierney.

Nia döt é jü saurí por le Celtic te la pröma fasa de juat. Le defensur d'ala dërtia mexican Julian Araujo á albü n carton jor l'pröm iade por n intervënt pricolos sön Will Ferry, che iüva ciamó de zop canch'al á trat le col de puniziun ch'en é gnü fora.

Le United á ince albü sües ocajions y Dario Naamo ne parô nia dertür s'al aspetass de col de ciaf o de volley sön le cross d'ala sora de Craig Sibbald, y n'á fat degügn di dui, y Owen Stirton s'á dagné deplü ocajions por dui iades.

L'atachënt á d'edema albü l'bal sön n blco salvagol de Scales do avëi ciafé la bala sön n fal de Auston Trusty, y plü inant á tiré drit d'ala porta da 18 iars do che la defensiva zentrala dl Celtic á metü indô d'ala riga.

Le United á metü ite l'internazional Amar Fatah al post dl defensur de mët-ciamp Pan Camara tl mez de juat, ma le Celtic é sté deplü fort ciamó tl secundo tëmp.

Reo Hatate y Maeda á pordü de bones ocajions denant che Nygren s'ess dagné n col d'alt sön la rëi da sies iars tl 63ejim menüt.

Maeda á dagné na definiziun saurida sies menüc plü inant do che le col de Tounekti é sté salvé dal portier.

source_doc:
High Noon review - Billy Crudup brings classic Hollywood western back with a bang

How do you turn a classic Hollywood western into West End musical fare? Add songs, many of Bruce Springsteen's in this case, along with a few rounds of line dancing and a sizzling star in Billy Crudup. Still, it's an odd experience initially as Thea Sharrock's production switches from one brief filmic scene to the next, and the endeavour seems as wooden as the clapboard saloon-bar slats that comprise the handsome set.

As a piece of theatre, it finds its flow. As a debate play, though, it gathers a locomotive energy as it travels towards the showdown between Frank Miller (James Doherty), who is returning to this "dirty little village in the middle of nowhere," and the marshal Will Kane (Crudup) who put him behind bars. That is mostly because of the uncanny and urgent relevance of this 1952 film about a community working out (or rather, squirming out of) its civic responsibilities around institutional wrongdoing.

Originally an allegory of McCarthyism (its screenwriter, Carl Foreman, was blacklisted), the story sets the cowardice of the many against the courage of the few - in this case, the lone, heroic Kane, who mobilises his defence against Miller and his henchmen after being let down by the townsfolk. The film was blasted by John Wayne as un-American for its critical portrait of the community; the production comes to life in its arguments on collective in/action and seems to speak directly about the dilemmas facing the cowboy country of Trump's America (the shooting in Minneapolis just the latest example). Eric Roth's script uses many lines from Foreman's screenplay but fleshes out the debates on the ethical stance of a community in the face of wrongdoing and misguided American myths around immigration.

Cowardice of the many, courage of the few ... cast of High Noon. Photograph: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

hypo_0:
Recensiun de High Noon - Billy Crudup porta indô le classich western de Hollywood cun n gran bot

Co sciöche dër vëgnel da trasformé n classich western de Hollywood te n musical dl West End? Cun l'ajunta de cianties, deplü de chëres de Bruce Springsteen te chësc cas, adöm cun n valgügn rëis de line dance y na stëra sciöche Billy Crudup che sprancia sciampis. Impò él de pröma jent n'esperienza sciöche dër dules, demez che la produziun de Thea Sharrock passa da na cürtia scena de film al'antra, y l'impëgn parora tan de lëgn sciöche i assuns dl saloon che formëia la bela sena.

Sciöche furest de teater ciafel so flus. Sciöche peza de dëbata, indere, colliëiel n'energia de locomotiva demez che al va devers le scontro final anter Frank Miller (James Doherty), che dërcora indô te chësc "pice paûsc sporch tal mez dl nagut", y le marshal Will Kane (Crudup) che l'â metü do i dats. Chësc dantalöt por via de la fona y urgenta revalënza de chësc film dl 1952 sora na comunité che asproverëia de ciafé na soluziun (o indere de s'en sciampé) da sües dëvites ziviles tocach la colpa de l'istituziun.

Uriginalmënter n'alegoria dl mccarthyism (so scenarist, Carl Foreman, ê sön la lista foscia), la stori sets la trandorria de tröps cuntra le coraje de d'un valgügn - te chësc cas, l'unich, eroich Kane, che mobilisëia so paror cuntra Miller y sü compagns do che i abiscons dl paûsc l'â lascé te l'origo. Le film ê gnü criticé forat da John Wayne sciöche nia-american por so retrat critich de la comunité; la produziun ciafa vita te sües dëbates sora l'in/aziun coletiva y parora de comuniché dret sora i dilemes che la tera de vacaruns dl'America de Trump dër speta (les archiopades a Minneapolis d'agost n'é ma l'ultimo ejëmpl). Le codesc de Eric Roth deura deplü rimes dla scenografia de Foreman, ma met dant cun deplü cia dles dëbates sora l'etica d'na comunité danter la colpa y i falis mic de l'America sora la migraziun.

Trandorria de tröps, coraje de d'un valgügn... la furest de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Al é ince le talënt metü adöm de Crudup y dl'inchëscia Denise Gough che ti dà vita ai dui protagonisc le de de so noze. Öna é Amy Fowler, na quachera che deteste l'aziun di oms de violënza; l'ater é le marshal che à dër deura sará so "stëra de stagn" por bunder sciöche n botier. Chësc, cina che la novitè rüva te paûsc che Miller rüverà col tren de mezdedè.

Gary Cooper â fat le rode d'al döt d'so dret, so tigní de parora dër conparabl d'ma cun l'Atticus de Gregory Peck te To Kill a Mockingbird. Insciö à Crudup d'sfidè na fona ombrena. Al mët dret d'al bunde sön teater sciöche n om dret, sanzier y dër desperé. Gough rënd so rode deplü de carater y plü modern de chël dl film, Grace Kelly. La dúpia é d'buna sciöche püre scebën che so sota carater tign l'inchëscia dles capaziun de sües deura.

Deplü d'atri caracters parora dër lëgns, dal vi-marshal de Billy Howle, Harvey Pell, ala dóna de d'afars mesicana de Rosa Salazar, Helen, scebën che l'afinitè anter d'ëra y Amy é d'buna frestia, y Roth ti dà deplü usc y deura a chëstes dónes d'döt.

Na pert de les cianties de Springsteen porta le so dret d'pulitica de l'America (da l'otimism de landa de Land of Hope and Dreams cina a The Rising, scrita do l'11 de setëmber). N valgünes é ciantades a cappella, deplü da Gough, che é na d'buna ciantorina, so usc sprancia desperaziun, ma dërcora I'm on Fire n iade d'massa.

Al parora n musical che n'à nia dër deura te d'valgügn momënc, les cianties cürties y sotes, ma le ritm y le son d'percusciun é dagnora dret de carater, sciöche dret la löm, deurada da Neil Austin, che porta d'buna claritè d'sentiment y dret d'intrigh. N orloi é dret tal mez dla sena de Tim Hatley, che cunta i dac por la rüvada dl tren y le scontro do, che mët dret de tenziun y dramatica, scebën la mizeria d'meté sön scena n scontro d'archiopades fora de paûsc.

Por döt so dert de lëgn dl pröm, al ciafa deplü energia y al é d'valgügn momënc che dërcora. A la fin, le messas d'pulitica parora le plü d'bort, tignan adöm la dëna dl mccarthyism d'inlaota cun la dëna de Trump de chësc dé.

Uriginalmënter n'alegoria dl mccarthyism (so scenarist, Carl Foreman, ê sön la lista foscia), la stori sets la cowardice de tröps cuntra le coraje de d'un valgügn - te chësc cas, l'unich, eroich Kane, che mobilisëia so paror cuntra Miller y sü compagns do che i abiscons dl paûsc l'â lascé te l'origo. Le film ê gnü criticé forat da John Wayne sciöche nia-american por so retrat critich de la comunité; la produziun ciafa vita te sües dëbates sora l'in/aziun coletiva y parora de comuniché dret sora i dilemes che la tera de vacaruns dl'America de Trump dër speta (les archiopades a Minneapolis d'agost n'é ma l'ultimo ejëmpl). Le codesc de Eric Roth deura deplü rimes dla scenografia de Foreman, ma met dant cun deplü cia dles dëbates sora l'etica d'na comunité danter la colpa y i falis mic de l'America sora la migraziun.

Cowardice de tröps, coraje de d'un valgügn... la furest de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

Recensiun de High Noon - Billy Crudup porta indô le classich western de Hollywood cun n gran bot

Co sciöche dër vëgnel da trasformé n classich western de Hollywood te n musical por le West End? Cun l'ajunta de cianties, deplü de chëres de Bruce Springsteen te chësc cas, adöm cun n valgügn rës de line dance y na stëra d'eceziun sciöche Billy Crudup. Impò él al ciavalier n'esperienza sciöche dules extended, demez che la produziun de Thea Sharrock passa da na cürtia scena cinematografica al'andra, y l'impëgn parora tan de lëgn sciöche i assuns dl saloon che formëia la bela sena.

Sciöche peza de teater ciafel so flus. Sciöche drama de dëbata, indere, colliëiel n'energia de locomotiva demez che al va devers le scontro final anter Frank Miller (James Doherty), che dërcora indô te chësc "pice paûsc sporch tal mez dl nagut", y le marshal Will Kane (Crudup) che l'â metü do i dats. Le film ê gnü criticé forat da John Wayne sciöche nia-american por so retrat critich de la comunité; la produziun ciafa vita te sües dëbates sora l'in/aziun coletiva y parora de comuniché dret sora i dilemes che la tera de vacaruns dl'America de Trump dër speta (les archiopades a Minneapolis d'agost n'é ma l'ultimo ejëmpl). Le codesc de Eric Roth deura deplü rimes dla scenografia de Foreman, ma met dant cun deplü cia dles dëbates sora l'etica d'na comunité danter la colpa y i falis mic de l'America sora la migraziun.

Codardia de tröps, coraje de d'un valgügn... le cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Te chësc musical dër valf ince le talënt metü adöm de Crudup y dla dagnora agila Denise Gough che iuga la püre dles nozes. D d'ëra é Amy Fowler, na quacra che dërcora la violënza dles jëntes de rabi; d d'el é le marshal che à dagnora lascé demez so "tin star" por mët en pe n pice botëia. Chësc dantalöt, cina che la novité ariva tl paûsc che Miller é dret sön le tren de mezdé.

Gary Cooper à fat le papel dl düt so uriginal, so respet comparable ma a chël de Gregory Peck sciöche Atticus te To Kill a Mockingbird. Ince Crudup à dagnora na gran ombria de chëra che al dër sciampé. Al dër resegüia a mët sö la pert sön la sena sciöche n om dret, dërt y dagnora de plü deperdi. Gough fesc so papel dër plü burt y plü modern de chël dl film de Grace Kelly. La püre n'é d'aurora sciöche püre scebën che la pert de picera jënt sciampia les rës de sües dotes.

Deplü d'atri caraters parora sciöche massa de lëgn, da chël dl vize-marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle, a chël dla dënz de botëia Helen, na messicana de Rosa Salazar, scebën che l'afinité anter d'ëra y Amy é dër d'aurora, y Roth dër deura deplü usc y culur a chësc de d'ëres.

Deplü cianties de Springsteen porta la sua pulitica americana (da l'otimism de Land of Hope and Dreams cina a The Rising, scrita do l'11 de setëmber). Un valgügnes vëgn ciantades a cappella, dantalöt da Gough, che é na dër brava ciantarina, so usc dër fona de deperdi, ma d'ëra cianta "I'm on Fire" n dret de plü.

Sön un valgügn momënc parora n musical dert nia d'aurora, les cianties cürtes y dules ma la mujiga de percusciun y l'architetura dl sonn é dagnora d'eceziun, sciöche ince la lüm dl design de Neil Austin che porta sclarimënt y mët gajia. N orlo é le dret de set de Tim Hatley, che mët demez le tëmp cina al'arivada dl tren y al scontro final, che ressegüia dagnora na gran tensiun y drama, dantalöt cun la dificolté de mët en pe na sparada te paûsc.

Cun düt so dër de lëgn dl pröm d'aurora, al va inant dret cun gran gajia y al é de biei momënc. Flascher, le mof pulitich dër deura dret de plü, mët adöm la poia de McCarthian de chi agns cun chëla de Trump al dërt de d'ancuei.

Ince Crudup à dagnora na gran ombria de chëra che al dër sciampé. Al dër resegüia a mët sö la pert sön la sena sciöche n om dret, dërt y dagnora de plü deperdi. Gough fesc so papel dër plü burt y plü modern de chël dl film de Grace Kelly. La püre n'é d'aurora sciöche püre scebën che la pert de picera jënt sciampia les rës de sües dotes.

Deplü d'atri caraters parora sciöche massa de lëgn, da chël dl vize-marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle, a chël dla dënz de botëia Helen, na messicana de Rosa Salazar, scebën che l'afinité anter d'ëra y Amy é dër d'aurora, y Roth dër deura deplü usc y culur a chësc de d'ëres.

Deplü cianties de Springsteen porta la sua pulitica americana (da l'otimism de Land of Hope and Dreams cina a The Rising, scrita do l'11 de setëmber). Un valgügnes vëgn ciantades a cappella, dantalöt da Gough, che é na dër brava ciantarina, so usc dër fona de deperdi, ma d'ëra cianta "I'm on Fire" n dret de plü.

Sön un valgügn momënc parora n musical dert nia d'aurora, les cianties cürtes y dules ma la mujiga de percusciun y l'architetura dl sonn é dagnora d'eceziun, sciöche ince la lüm dl design de Neil Austin che porta sclarimënt y mët gajia. N orlo é le dret de set de Tim Hatley, che mët demez le tëmp cina al'arivada dl tren y al scontro final, che ressegüia dagnora na gran tensiun y drama, dantalöt cun la dificolté de mët en pe na sparada te paûsc.

Cun düt so dër de lëgn dl pröm d'aurora, al va inant dret cun gran gajia y al é de biei momënc. Flascher, le mof pulitich dër deura dret de plü, mët adöm la poia de McCarthian de chi agns cun chëla de Trump al dërt de d'ancuei.

Recensiun de High Noon - Billy Crudup porta indô le classich western de Hollywood cun n gran bot

Co sciöche dër vëgnel da trasformé n classich western de Hollywood te n musical por le West End? Cun l'ajunta de cianties, deplü de chëres de Bruce Springsteen te chësc cas, adöm cun n valgügn rës de line dance y na stëra d'eceziun sciöche Billy Crudup. Impò él al pröm n'esperienza sciöche dules, demez che la produziun de Thea Sharrock passa da na cürtia scena cinematografica al'andra, y l'impëgn parora tan de lëgn sciöche i assuns dl saloon che formëia la bela sena.

Sciöche peza de teater ciafel so flus. Sciöche drama de dëbata, indere, colliëiel n'energia de locomotive demez che al va devers le scontro final anter Frank Miller (James Doherty), che dërcora indô te chësc "pice paûsc sporch tal mez dl nagut", y le marshal Will Kane (Crudup) che l'â metü do i dats. Chësc dantalöt por via de la fona y urgenta revalënza de chësc film dl 1952 sora na comunité che asproverëia de ciafé na soluziun (o indere de s'en sciampé) da sües dëvites ziviles tocach la colpa de l'istituziun.

Uriginalmënter n'alegoria dl mccarthyism (so scenarist, Carl Foreman, ê sön la lista foscia), la storia met la codardia de tröps cuntra le coraje de d'un valgügn - te chësc cas, l'unich, eroich Kane, che mobilisëia so paror cuntra Miller y sü compagns do che i abiscons dl paûsc l'â lascé te l'origo. Le film ê gnü criticé forat da John Wayne sciöche nia-american por so retrat critich de la comunité; la produziun ciafa vita te sües dëbates sora l'in/aziun coletiva y parora de comuniché dret sora i dilemes che la tera de vacaruns dl'America de Trump dër speta (les archiopades a Minneapolis d'agost n'é ma l'ultimo ejëmpl). Le codesc de Eric Roth deura deplü rimes dla scenografia de Foreman, ma met dant cun deplü cia dles dëbates sora l'etica d'na comunité danter la colpa y i falis mic de l'America sora la migraziun.

Codardia de tröps, coraje de d'un valgügn... le cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Te chësc musical dër valf ince le talënt metü adöm de Crudup y dla dagnora agila Denise Gough che iuga la püre dles nozes. D d'ëra é Amy Fowler, na quacra che dërcora la violënza dles jëntes de rabi; d d'el é le marshal che à dagnora lascé demez so "tin star" por mët en pe n pice botëia. Chësc dantalöt, cina che la novité ariva tl paûsc che Miller é dret sön le tren de mezdé.

Deplü cianties de Springsteen porta la sua pulitica americana (da l'otimism de Land of Hope and Dreams cina a The Rising, scrita do l'11 de setëmber). Cun düt so dër de lëgn dl pröm d'aurora, al va inant dret cun gran gajia y al é de biei momënc. Flascher, le mof pulitich dër deura dret de plü, mët adöm la poia de McCarthian de chi agns cun chëla de Trump al dërt de d'ancuei.
