source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."

hypo_0:
"Na de porvëles de de mizeria": l'incontter a Kempton Park marred dala mort de trëi ciavai

La Cherta dl Lanzarote Hurdle a Kempton Park é stada segnada dala mort de trëi ciavai, danter chisc Kalif Du Berlais, venciadú de un n Grade One, che süa porduda é stada descrita da Paul Nicholls sciöche "n gran pof te dinc" y n "trist de."

Kalif Du Berlais - che danter i propritars á ince Sir Alex Ferguson - á sciamporé de sela Harry Cobden tl Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase cun cater partezipanc y é tomé jö zop, cul sciome rot che al á patí che s'á mostré nia varíbel y al é stat eutanisó dal grup de veterunars le sabeda.

Nicholls á dit: "Al é n trist de col s'un pord d'i ciavai sciöche chisc, al é dör por döt le grup. Al é n gran pof te dinc por düc, i propritars, la pora mütiga che s'un fistidies - an dëscia nia odëi che al suzedi zeche de te'. Al s'á pro l' de d'incö mostré te süa tlassa, al á sciampé y viaié bun y ince sfortunatamenter scenó al ne sará mai pi de porsu de mostré le potenzial che i cherdên che al á."

"I m'un poss ince dì d'i rües, ma al é dër n de rü d'la desfortuna por döt le grup. Harry s'á insciö scurié dër scem y l'é sté manco de de de pi d'le rode te l'ultimo mument canche al ne s'á nia sintí dër bun. Al é n ciaval gran, dër coragius che atachëia i stacujes y chisc ciavai, canche ai fajëi chësc, i pól finí che ai á na gran toma."

"Al é sté dër entusiasmé d'incö y viaiava dër de bel y i n'un mài pi de saé canche s'un füssun arjunc, i un sèmper albü tröpa fiduziara te d'él. Chëstes coses suzed, sfortunatamenter, y i m'un dëscion indré de nes lparé de müt y de jí inant. Chisc ciavai ciafa le mender de döt, al n'é nia de tröp de dit che al mënsc por mi d'incö fòrse de mioré la situaziun."

"Al ne dvënta mai pi de bocia canche chëstes coses suzed y al é n gran pof."

Tla Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, l' Peso de Jonjo y AJ O'Neill é stat fermá sön le plan cun na ferida che ne podô nia gní varida, scenó les veterunars de d'la pista n'á d'altr’ alternative che de le eutanisé.

Harry Derham á fistidié Wertpol por le juvenile hurdle y l' ciaval s'á mostré d'esse insciö de de na gran corsa danter de tomé jö pro l'ultimo y d'avëi de na ferida de de mort. Derham á dit sön sü cont X: "Na de porvëles de de mizeria a Kempton Park d'incö cul pordi Wertpol che i un albü por de na fortura de n mument d'avëi te nosc lüch de porsu por n cürt de."

"Al é n trist de col s'un pord d'i ciavai sciöche chisc, al é dör por döt le grup. Al é n gran pof te dinc por düc," á dit Paul Nicholls. Fotografia: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Al fova n gran talent che fova dër de bel y cuntent de fé sü labor d'ogni de, sovenz fajëi i jüc y de se mostré. Al i de porsu de sü labor y i sun dër de scem por sü Heart Of The South syndicate, che é le pi bel de de grup de jënt. Les gares pó de d'i muments esse n sport de dolur y d'incö s'á mostré n de dör por n valgügn de d'i propritars. Un n de da s'un desmentié."

Un n portavox de Kempton Park á dit: "Düc nos de Kempton Park s'un fistidiun dër por le bënestar de düc i ciavai de gara, sciöche d'i milies de d'i laoranc de d'les gares che i á conzed d'i mënsc ners de de niancia d'ogni de a ciasa. Les nostes plü sodes condolianzes de d'i cors a düc i propritars de d'i trëi ciavai."
hypo_1:
"N de daldöt mizerabel": l'incontru a Kempton Park é stat segné dala mort de trëi ciavai

La jurnada dl Lanzarote Hurdle a Kempton Park é stada segnada dala mort de trëi ciavai, danter chisc Kalif Du Berlais, venciadú de un n Grade One, che süa porduda é stada descrita da Paul Nicholls sciöche "n gran pof te dinc" y n "trist de".

Kalif Du Berlais - che danter i propritars á ince Sir Alex Ferguson - á sciamporé de sela Harry Cobden tl Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase cun cater partezipanc y é tomé jö zop; la spola rota che al á patí s'á mostré nia varibla y al é stat eutanisó dal grup de veterunars le sabeda.

Nicholls á dit: "Al é n trist de col s'un pord d'i ciavai sciöche chisc, al é dör por döt le grup. Al é n gran pof te dinc por düc, i propritars, la pora mütiga che s'un fistidies - an dëscia nia odëi che al suzedi zeche de te'. Al s'á pro d'incö mostré te süa tlassa, al á sciampé y viaié bun y sfortunatamenter scenó al ne sará mai pi de porsu de mostré le potenzial che i cherdên che al á.

"I m'un poss ince dì d'ogni sort, ma al é dër n de rü d'la desfortuna por döt le grup. Harry fova dër de mure y s'á sciurré de de pi d'le rode te l'ultimo mument canche al ne s'á nia sintí dër bun. Al é n ciaval gran, dër coragius che atachëia i stacujes y chisc ciavai, canche ai fajëi chësc, i pól finí che ai á na gran toma.

"Al fova dër entusiast d'incö y viaiava dër de bel y i n'un mài pi de saé canche s'un füssun arjunc, i un sèmper albü tröpa fiduziara te d'él. Chëstes coses suzed, sfortunatamenter, y i m'un dëscion d'indré indrié de nes lparé de müt y de jí inant. Chisc ciavai ciafa le mender de döt, al n'é nia de tröp de dit che al mënsc por mi d'incö fòrse de mioré la situaziun.

"Al ne dvënta mai pi de bocia canche chëstes coses suzed y al é n gran pof."

Tla Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, l' Peso de Jonjo y AJ O'Neill é stat fermá sön le plan cun na ferida che ne podô nia gní varida, scenó les veterunars de d'la pista n'á d'altr’ alternative che de le eutanisé.

Derham á dit sön sü cont X: "N de daldöt mizerabel a Kempton Park d'incö cul pordi Wertpol che i un albü por de na fortura de n mument d'avëi te nosc lüch de porsu por n cürt de.

Le program dl Lanzarote Hurdle a Kempton Park é stat sciurrad dala mort de trëi ciavai, danter chisc Kalif Du Berlais, venciadú de Grade One, che süa porduda é stada descrita da Paul Nicholls sciöche "n gran colpo tl stomech" y na "trista jurnada".

Kalif Du Berlais - che danter sü propritars á ince Sir Alex Ferguson - á fat borstolé jö Harry Cobden tla gara Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase cun cater partezipanc y é tomé jö zop; la spola rota che al á patí s'á mostré nia varibla y al é stat eutanisó dal grup de veterunars le sabeda.

Nicholls á dit: "Al é na trista jurnada canche an pord ciavai de chësc caliber, al é dör spor döt le grup. Al é n gran colpo tl stomech por düc, i propritars, la pora mütiga che s'un fistidies - an astia d'odëi che al suzedi zeche de te'. Al fova por mët man de mostré süa tlassa incö, al á sciampé y viaié bun y sfortunatamenter sëgn al ne sará mai plü de porsu de mostré le potenzial che i cherdên che al á.

"I m'un poss ince dì d'ogni sort, ma al é dër n de rü de desfortuna por döt le grup. Harry fova dër de mure y s'á sciurré de tó pert a l'ultima corsa dache al ne s'á nia sintí d'ámo bën de porsu por chëra. Al é n ciaval gran y coragius che atachëia i stacujes y chisc ciavai, canche ai fajëi chësc, i pól finí che ai á na gran toma.

"Al fova entusiast incö y viaiava de bel y i n'un mài plü de saé canche s'un füssun arjunc, i un sèmper albü tröpa fiduziara te d'él. Chëstes coses suzed, sfortunatamenter, y i m'un dëscion d'indré indrié de nes lparé de müt y de jí inant. Chisc ciavai ciafa le mender de döt, al n'é nia de tröp de dit che al mënsc por mi d'incö fòrse de mioré la situaziun.

"Al ne dvënta mai plü flu canche chëstes coses suzed y al é n gran colpo."

Tla Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, l' Peso de Jonjo y AJ O'Neill é stat fermá sön le plan cun na ferida che ne podô nia gní varida, scenó les veterunars de la pista n'á d'altr’ alternative che de le eutanisé.

Harry Derham á fistidié Wertpol por le juvenile hurdle y l' ciaval s'á mostré d'esse insciö de de na gran corsa danter de tomé jö pro l'ultimo y d'avëi de na ferida de de mort. Derham á dit sön sü cont X: "Na jurnada daldöt mizerabla a Kempton Park d'incö cul pordi Wertpol che i un albü por de na fortura de n mument d'avëi te nosc lüch de porsu por n cürt de.

"Al é na trista jurnada canche an pord ciavai de chësc caliber, al é dör por döt le grup. Al é n gran colpo tl stomech por düc," á dit Paul Nicholls. Fotografia: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"Al fova n gran talent che fova dër de bel y cuntent de fé sü labor d'ogni de, sovenz fajëi i jüc y de se mostré. Al i de porsu de sü labor y i sun dër de scem por sü Heart Of The South syndicate, che é le pi bel de de grup de jënt. Les gares pó de d'i muments esse n sport de dolur y d'incö s'á mostré n de dör por n valgügn de d'i propritars. Un n de da s'un desmentié."

Un n portavox de Kempton Park á dit: "Düc nos de Kempton Park s'un fistidiun dër por le bënestar de düc i ciavai de gara, sciöche d'i milies de d'i laoranc de d'les gares che i á conzed d'i mënsc ners de de niancia d'ogni de a ciasa. Les nostes plü sodes condolianzes de d'i cors é cun i propritars de d'i trëi ciavai."

source_doc:
Robin Roefs" penalty saves secures Sunderland's spot in FA Cup fourth round

Get the Adam Clery Football Column. A newsletter that unpacks the absurdities and oddities of the beautiful game

The ACFC newsletter: unpacking football's absurdities

Unpack football's oddities with the ACFC newsletter

Robin Roefs was Sunderland's hero as Everton's FA Cup hopes came to a premature end once again after three woeful penalties in a shootout saw the Black Cats reach round four.

David Moyes" threadbare squad looked like exiting in normal time until James Garner's 89th-minute spot-kick cancelled out Enzo Le Fee's brilliant first-half strike.

But extra time was the last thing the hosts, down to just 12 senior players, needed and when the shootout came around Garner, Thierno Barry and Beto all saw their efforts saved by Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka and Luke O'Nien confidently scored their first three attempts to help Sunderland into the fourth round for only the second time in 11 seasons.

It was a hammer blow to Everton, who were dragged back into the game by Adam Aznou, a £7.8million signing from Valladolid in the summer who had not had a sniff of first-team action.

The teenager's only senior football was two appearances in the EFL Trophy back in September and October and his 86th-minute introduction for Merlin Rohl was only because Moyes had little to no option.

But the Spanish-born Moroccan showed more drive in the four minutes of regulation time than many of his battle-weary team-mates had in the preceding 86 - particularly fellow 19-year-old and summer arrival Tyler Dibling, who cost five times as much.

Within three minutes he won an admittedly soft penalty after a shoulder-to-shoulder challenge by Trai Hume allowing Garner to equalise.

Replays of the foul on the big screens at full-time enraged Xhaka, who hurled his water bottle into the turf and raged at the perceived injustice to anyone in earshot, but the Black Cats" captain was soon celebrating.

It is rare for Sunderland, promoted from the Championship last season, to be favourites in any game but the fact Regis Le Bris was able to make five changes and still have the likes of Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete and Wilson Isidor in reserve swung the odds in their favour.

Injuries, the Africa Cup of Nations and suspensions for Michael Keane and Jack Grealish were compounded by Tim Iroegbunam's hamstring problem which took the absences to nine.

Barry, the one senior player he left out, accounted for 23 of the 27 first-team appearances among the substitutes with five of six academy players not having previously featured at all.

After Harrison Armstrong sliced wide their only first chance of the first half, Sunderland took control and should have been comfortably ahead by the interval.

Their first shot resulted in the opener - and what a goal.

Everton failed to deal with a long throw and Eliezer Mayenda teed up Le Fee to send a cushioned right-footed volley curling past Jordan Pickford.

Moyes had a face like thunder and his demeanour was not improved as Pickford clawed away a Nordi Mukiele overhead kick and tipped away, at full-stretch, Romaine Mundle's strike from distance.

Surprisingly, the Everton boss did not make the only change available to him and sacrifice one of his five midfielders for Barry at the start of the second half, but they did not come to life until Mayenda rolled an angled shot just wide with less than half an hour remaining.

Beto's appeal for a penalty for a shirt pull by Hume was waved away but referee John Brooks obliged when Aznou went down and Garner equalised.

Unfortunately for Everton their subsequent penalties were not as confident, with Barry and Beto's stuttering run-ups far from convincing, as Roefs saved all three.

hypo_0:
Les dodes de Robin Roefs da paré i penalties ti garantësc al Sunderland n post tl cuarto rënd dla FA Cup

Arpata la colona dl football de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che spliga fora les absurditesć y de bizes dl jüch dl balón

La newsletter de ACFC: splighé fora les absurditesć dl football

Descoveresc les de bizes dl football cun la newsletter de ACFC

Robin Roefs é sté l'eroe dl Sunderland, degolesc che les speranzes dl Everton ti dërts dla FA Cup é jüdes de fia a nia n'andra de rënd do trëi de bogn penalties sciurá sciöche nia te na fasa de penalties che á portá i Black Cats al cuarto rënd.

L'ecuipa dër strënta de David Moyes pargora de jorá fora ti agnoc normai inant che n penal de James Garner al 89ejim menüt anolass le gol de fanta de Enzo Le Fee te la pröma pert dl jüch.

Ma i agnoc de estension fova l'ultima cossa che i d'ciasa mervëia, cun mé 12 joradus de esperiënza, adora, y canche la fasa de penalties é rovada, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto á düć conesciü i sforz parés da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien á trat cun sgürëza i pröms trëi proi de penalter por iüté le Sunderland a rové tl cuarto rënd por la secunda iada te 11 sajuns.

Chësc é sté n gran tarlon por l'Everton, che é sté trat zoruch tl jüch da Adam Aznou, n joradú de 7,8 miliuns de sterlines cherdé dal Valladolid de d'aspi, che no m'aveva d'antruché nia deplü de jüch de pröma ecuipa.

L'unich football senior dl joradú de mender etá fova stades döes apariziuns tl EFL Trophy en setëmber y utober y so joré al 86ejim menüt por Merlin Rohl é sté mé deache Moyes n'aveva nia tröpes de alternatives.

Ma le marochin de nscer spanola á desmostré deplü forza te i cater menüć de jüch normal de chël che de tröć de si joradus de ecuipa stanc de batalia m'aveva fat ti prezedenć 86 - dantal düt l'oter joradú de 19 agn y arivé de d'aspi Tyler Dibling, costé cinch iades deplü.

Inco de trëi menüć al á vadagné n penal, mënco sclet por na batalia sciola a sciola cun Trai Hume, m'permeton a Garner de rowé de pari.

I replis dla falia sön i gragn scherms al terminal dl jüch á furié Xhaka, che á sciuré so fiasch d'ega por tera y á furié cuntra l'ingiustizia desmostrada a d'agn de oredla, ma le capitan di Black Cats s'á tost complajü.

Al é dër ror por le Sunderland, pié ia dala Championship la sajun colada, d'ester i ganeiturs predilicć te d'aresgn de jüch, ma le fat che Regis Le Bris fova tl dërt de fá cinch mudamënć y avëi d'aries sciche Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor en resserva á mudé les speranzes te so dërt.

Danjes, la Copa d'Africa y les suspisciuns por Michael Keane y Jack Grealish é stades acompagnades dal problem al garët de Tim Iroegbunam che á portá les d'asenies a nio.

Barry, l'unich senior d'aspi che al á lascé d'or, á curí 23 de les 27 apariziuns de pröma ecuipa danter i sustituicć cun cinch de si sis academy players che no m'aveva d'antruché nia de pröma fat inant.

Do che Harrison Armstrong á sciuré d'or süa sola pröma ocajiun dla pröma pert, le Sunderland á ciafé le control y m'avess podü ester inant cun comfort inant le travert de palsa.

So pröm tire á portá al gol d'aria - y ce n gol.

L'Everton n'é nia sté tl dërt de gestí n lonch lancia y Eliezer Mayenda á passá la bala a Le Fee por n tire al völ de dërt amorté che á passá Jordan Pickford.

Moyes á conesciü na sburla sciöche n de tarlon y süa manira de fá n'é nia d'amiorada canche Pickford á sprigorá d'aria n tire d'aria de Nordi Mukiele y á sprigorá d'aria, dër spestorá, le tire de colier de Romaine Mundle da lonsch.

D'aria de sorps, le capitan de l'Everton n'á nia mudé süa sola mudaziun por anolé un de si cinch mesanjerins por Barry al scomënciamënt de secunda pert, ma ai n'é nia gnüs de fia inant che Mayenda á sciuré n tire de cania dër d'or cun mënco de na mesa d'ora restanta.

La d'man de Beto por n penal por na tircada de blusa de Hume é stada lasciada de cania, ma l'arbitre John Brooks á fat de dërt canche Aznou é jü de tera y Garner á rovada de pari.

Desfortüna por l'Everton, si penalties con-sequenć n'é nia stá de sciöche dër de confidenza, cun Barry y Beto che m'aveva corides dër de bizes inant che Roefs á paré düć trëi.

Robin Roefs para i penalties y ti sigüra al Sunderland le post tl cuarto rënd dla FA Cup

Ciafa la colona dl ciafajüch de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che spliga les absurditesć y les curiositesć dl juche del balun

La newsletter dl ACFC: splighé les absurditesć dl ciafajüch

Descofreia les bizes dl ciafajüch cun la newsletter dl ACFC

Robin Roefs é sté l'eroe dl Sunderland mënter che les speranzes de FA Cup dl Everton é rovades de fia a n fin anticipé ciamó na iada do trëi penalties sciurá de bogn te na fasa de penalties che á portá i Black Cats al cuarto rënd.

La scuadra dër strënta de David Moyes pargora de s'un jí ti agnoc dles partides normales inant che l'ariada de penal de James Garner al 89ejim menüt anolass le gol d'autor de Enzo Le Fee te la pröma pert dl jüch.

Ma i agnoc de estension fova l'ultima cossa che i d'ciasa, redusć a mé 12 joradus de esperiënza, m'aveva de bojëgn y canche la fasa de penalties é rovada, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto á d'agn d'aresgn conesciü i sforz parés da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien á trat cun sgürëza i pröms trëi proi por iüté le Sunderland a rové tl cuarto rënd por la secunda iada te 11 sajuns.

Chësc é sté n gran tarlon por l'Everton, che é sté trat zoruch tl jüch da Adam Aznou, n joradú de 7,8 miliuns de sterlines cherdé dal Valladolid d'aspi che no m'aveva ciamó conesciü degüna ocajiun de jüch de pröma ecuipa.

L'unich football senior dl joradú de mender etá fova stades döes apariziuns tl EFL Trophy en setëmber y utober y so joré al 86ejim menüt por Merlin Rohl é sté mé deache Moyes n'aveva d'antruché degüna oter alternativa.

But le marochin de nscer spanola á desmostré deplü forza te i cater menüć de jüch normal de chël che de tröć de si joradus de ecuipa stanc de batalia m'aveva fat ti prezedenć 86 - dantal düt l'oter joradú de 19 agn y arivé d'aspi Tyler Dibling, costé cinch iades deplü.

Inco de trëi menüć al á vadagné n penal, plajor dër lëgier, do na batalia sciola a sciola cun Trai Hume, m'permeton a Garner de rowé de pari.

I replis dla falia sön i gragn scherms al terminal dl jüch á furié Xhaka, che á sciuré so fiasch d'ega por tera y á furié cuntra l'ingiustizia desmostrada a d'agn de oredla, ma le capitan di Black Cats s'á tost complajü.

Al é dër ror por le Sunderland, pié ia dala Championship la sajun colada, d'ester i ganeiturs predilicć te d'aresgn de jüch, ma le fat che Regis Le Bris fova tl dërt de fá cinch mudamënć y avëi d'aries sciche Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor en resserva á mudé les speranzes te so dërt.

Danjes, la Copa d'Africa y les suspisciuns por Michael Keane y Jack Grealish é stades acompagnades dal problem al garët de Tim Iroegbunam che á portá les d'asenies a nio.

Barry, l'unich senior d'aspi che al á lascé d'or, á curí 23 de les 27 apariziuns de pröma ecuipa danter i sustituicć cun cinch de sis joradus de academy che no m'aveva ciamó sciuré sön la d'jüch.

Do che Harrison Armstrong á sciuré d'or süa sola pröma ocajiun dla pröma pert, le Sunderland á ciafé le control y m'avess podü ester inant cun comfort inant le travert de palsa.

So pröm tire á portá al gol d'aria - y ce n gol.

L'Everton n'é nia sté tl dërt de gestí n lonch lancia y Eliezer Mayenda á passá la bala a Le Fee por n tire al völ de dërt amorté che á passá Jordan Pickford.

Moyes á conesciü na sburla sciöche n de tarlon y süa manira de fá n'é nia d'amiorada canche Pickford á sprigorá d'aria n tire d'aria de Nordi Mukiele y á sprigorá d'aria, dër spestorá, le tire de colier de Romaine Mundle da lonsch.

D'aria de sorps, le capitan de l'Everton n'á nia mudé süa sola mudaziun por anolé un de si cinch mesanjerins por Barry al scomënciamënt de secunda pert, ma ai n'é nia gnüs de fia inant che Mayenda á sciuré n tire de cania dër d'or cun mënco de na mesa d'ora restanta.

La d'man de Beto por n penal por na tircada de blusa de Hume é stada lasciada de cania, ma l'arbitre John Brooks á fat de dërt canche Aznou é jü de tera y Garner á rovada de pari.

Desfortüna por l'Everton, si penalties con-sequenć n'é nia stá de sciöche dër de confidenza, cun Barry y Beto che m'aveva corides dër de bizes inant che Roefs á paré düć trëi.
hypo_3:
Les parades de penal de Robin Roefs ti sigüra al Sunderland le post tl cuarto rënd dla FA Cup

Arfa la colona dl ciafajüch de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che spliga les absurditesć y les bizes dl juche del balun

La newsletter dl ACFC: splighé les absurditesć dl ciafajüch

Descofreia les bizes dl ciafajüch cun la newsletter dl ACFC

Robin Roefs é sté l'eroe dl Sunderland mënter che les speranzes de FA Cup dl Everton é rovades de fia a n fin anticipé ciamó na iada do trëi penalties dër dëbiles te na fasa de penalties che á portá i Black Cats al cuarto rënd.

La scuadra dër strënta de David Moyes pargora de s'un jí ti agnoc dles partides normales inant che l'ariada de penal de James Garner al 89ejim menüt anolass le gol d'autor de Enzo Le Fee te la pröma pert dl jüch.

Ma i agnoc de estension fova l'ultima cossa che i d'ciasa, redusć a mé 12 joradus de esperiënza, m'aveva de bojëgn y canche la fasa de penalties é rovada, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto á d'agn d'aresgn conesciü i sforz parés da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien á trat cun sgürëza i pröms trëi proi por iüté le Sunderland a rové tl cuarto rënd por la secunda iada te 11 sajuns.

Chësc é sté n gran tarlon por l'Everton, che é sté trat zoruch tl jüch da Adam Aznou, n joradú de 7,8 miliuns de sterlines cherdé dal Valladolid d'aspi che no m'aveva ciamó conesciü degüna ocajiun de jüch de pröma ecuipa.

L'unich football senior dl joradú de mender etá fova stades döes apariziuns tl EFL Trophy en setëmber y utober y so joré al 86ejim menüt por Merlin Rohl é sté mé deache Moyes n'aveva d'antruché degüna oter alternativa.

But le marochin de nscer spanola á desmostré deplü forza te i cater menüć de jüch normal de chël che de tröć de si joradus de ecuipa stanc de batalia m'aveva fat ti prezedenć 86 - dantal düt l'oter joradú de 19 agn y arivé d'aspi Tyler Dibling, costé cinch iades deplü.

Inco de trëi menüć al á vadagné n penal, plajor dër lëgier, do na batalia sciola a sciola cun Trai Hume, m'permeton a Garner de rowé de pari.

I replis dla falia sön i gragn scherms al terminal dl jüch á furié Xhaka, che á sciuré so fiasch d'ega por tera y á furié cuntra l'ingiustizia desmostrada a d'agn de oredla, ma le capitan di Black Cats s'á tost complajü.

Al é dër ror por le Sunderland, pié ia dala Championship la sajun colada, d'ester i ganeiturs predilicć te d'aresgn de jüch, ma le fat che Regis Le Bris fova tl dërt de fá cinch mudamënć y avëi d'aries sciche Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor en resserva á mudé les speranzes te so dërt.

Do che Harrison Armstrong á sciuré d'or süa sola pröma ocajiun dla pröma pert, le Sunderland á ciafé le control y m'avess podü ester inant cun comfort inant le travert de palsa.

So pröm tire á portá al gol d'aria - y ce n gol.

Le Everton n'é nia sté tl dërt de gestí n lonch lancia y Eliezer Mayenda á passá la bala a Le Fee por n tire al völ de dërt amorté che á passá Jordan Pickford.

Moyes á conesciü na sburla sciöche n de tarlon y süa manira de fár n'é nia d'amiorada canche Pickford á sprigorá d'aria n tire d'aria de Nordi Mukiele y á sprigorá d'aria, dër spestorá, le tire de colier de Romaine Mundle da lonsch.

Desort, le capitan de l'Everton n'á nia mudé süa sola mudaziun por anolé un de si cinch mesanjerins por Barry al scomënciamënt de secunda pert, ma ai n'é nia gnüs de fia inant che Mayenda á sciuré n tire de cania dër d'or cun mënco de na mesa d'ora restanta.

La d'man de Beto por n penal por na tircada de blusa de Hume é stada lasciada de cania, ma l'arbitre John Brooks á fat de dërt canche Aznou é jü de tera y Garner á rovada de pari.

Desfortüna por l'Everton, si penalties con-sequenć n'é nia stá de sciöche dër de confidenza, cun Barry y Beto che m'aveva corides dër de bizes inant che Roefs á paré düć trëi.
hypothesis:
Les parades de rigor de Robin Roefs ti garantësc al Sunderland n post tl cuarto rënd dla FA Cup

Arfa la rubrica de football de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che spliga les absurdités y curiosités dl juche dl balun

La newsletter de l'ACFC: splighé les absurdités dl football

Descofreia les curiosités dl football cun la newsletter de l'ACFC

Robin Roefs é sté l'eroe dl Sunderland mënter che les speranzes de FA Cup dl Everton é jüdes a de blesse por l'ennesima iada, do che trëi rigors dër debole ti set de rigors á portá i Black Cats al cuarto rënd.

La rosa dër dëbila de David Moyes pargora de s'un jí ti agnoc de jüch regular inant che la batüda dal dischet de James Garner al 89ejim menüt anolass la gran bela golada de Enzo Le Fee tl pröm tëmp.

Ma i tëmps d'estension fova l'ultima cossa che i d'ciasa, redusć a mé 12 joradus dla pröma scuadra, m'aveva de bojëgn, y canche al é gnü le momënt di rigors, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto s'á odü i sforz pará da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien á trat cun segurëza i pröms trëi rigors por iüté le Sunderland a rové tl cuarto rënd por la secunda iada te 11 sajuns.

Chësc é sté n gran tarlon por l'Everton, che é sté trat zoruch tl jüch da Adam Aznou, n d'aspi de 7,8 miliuns de sterlines dal Valladolid d'asora che n'aveva ciamó nia tasté le jüch de pröma scuadra.

L'unich football senior dl joradú de mender etá fova stades dös apariziuns tl EFL Trophy en setëmber y utober, y so joré al 86ejim menüt por Merlin Rohl é sté mé deache Moyes n'aveva prësc degüna oter alternativa.

Ma le marochin de nscer spanola á desmostré deplü deteminazion te i cater menüć de jüch regular che dër tröć de si compagns de scuadra stanc de bataia ti prezedenć 86 - dantal düt le compagn de 19 agn arivé d'asora Tyler Dibling, costé cinch iades deplü.

Inco de trëi menüć al á vadagné n rigor, scemia dër lëgier, do n contrat spola a spola cun Trai Hume, m'permeton a Garner de rowé de pari.

I replis dla falia sön i gragn scherms al terminal dl jüch á furié Xhaka, che á sciuré so fiasch d'ega por tera y á furié cuntra l'ingiustizia desmostrada a d'agn de oredla, ma le capitan di Black Cats s'á tost complajü.

Al é dër rar por le Sunderland, pié ia dala Championship la sajun colada, d'ester i predilicć te d'aresgn de jüch, ma le fat che Regis Le Bris fova tl dërt de fá cinch mudamënć y avëi d'aries sciche Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor en resserva á pendedé les speranzes te so dërt.

Le Everton n'é nia sté tl dërt de gestí n lonch lancia y Eliezer Mayenda á passá la bala a Le Fee por n tire al völ de dërt amorté che á passá Jordan Pickford.

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.

Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Dopla por Ashley Barnes y le Burnley davagnëia dër ion cuntra le Millwall

Ashley Barnes á fat na dopleta y le Burnley á lascé da na pert les preocupaziuns de Premier League por passá plajorbelmënter al cuarto torn de FA Cup cun na vitoria por 5-1 cuntra le Millwall.

Le jore de 36 agn á sciuré sice pröm gol dla sajun bën adora y á fat le secundo a mesa la secunda fasa dl jüch, ince deache i Lions á sciurá dër dales man y á daddoman al’ecuipa de ciasa sotescrita la vitoria piö tlara che n’e s’aspetâ nia.

L’allenadú Scott Parker á fat ot mudamënc ti joradus de baje che â scomenzé la partida d’en jöbia deache al s'â stlüt jö cun un n 2-2 cuntra le Manchester United, y ai n’á nia delüt: i gundis fac da Loum Tchaouna y Jaidon Anthony mënena bën adora ti pröms descors na vitoria de sigonda descureia.

Le sostitut Jaydon Banel á fat le chinto gol por le Burnley dlungia le menüt 90, inant che i spaventá Lions, che s'â daldöt dac sö, fajess n gol de consola ti menüc de recupero cun Josh Coburn.

Le Burnley á dominé i pröms momënc dla partida y á tut la devandesta al menüt 11, canche Jacob Bruun Larsen á passè la bales a Barnes che á frapé de dër man dlungia le portier di ghes Steven Benda.

I Lions á fat dër pücia reaziun, cun Aidomo Emakhu che á sparé süa mender ocajiun dër cuntra le portier dl Burnley Max Weiss do ch’al ê gnü lissé söl’ciamp a man dërca da Joe Bryan.

Ma i ghes á bel plan scomenzé a cresci par rionje l’egalité canche Jake Cooper á daddorú de ciaf söl cross de Alfie Doughty dales dërcis pro dles linies, ma al é gnü sturcé da n gran paré de Weiss.

Le portier á inno de n paré a Cooper al mez de l’ora de jüch canche le Millwall ciarâ de fá l’egalité, ma i ghes s'un é dac sö por gaujia de dui fai dla defensia che á portè la partida daldöt defora da süa porteda.

Tchaouna á ciafé le spacio de cané n colp de dërcia dales dërcis dles linies dla dërcia dlungia Benda al menüt 35, y püch dan l’intervallo, la debla sparada dl portier dl Millwall á daddoman a Anthony la dërta ocajiun de scrí le terzo gol por süa ecuipa.

Le Millwall se fariâ plö jorënt al scomenz dl secundo tëmp y Thierno Ballo dess ciafé dër deplö canche al á daddorú n spacio de ciaf por frapé dlungia la pert dërcia dla linia de ciamp, ma l’ecuipa de ciasa d’en gaujia controlâ bën bëgn le jüch.

Tchaouna é sté dër dlungia al secundo gol canche al á frapé n colp de forza dlungia le post dërc dl portier Benda, y le cuarto gol che un s'aspetâ bel plan é gnü al menüt 65 canche Kamarl Grant n’é nia sté bun de paré n cross da la linia dërca de Anthony, y Barnes á mënè bën la bales de dër lio do ch’al s'â despolé.

Inant che al fess na tripleta, Barnes á frapé de ciaf dër dlungia Benda canche la bandira dl daddoman de linia ê piada sö, ma al é sté Banel a fá le gol dla debla rüina da dër dlungia, dan che Coburn stlüss jö la partida cun süa gran vitoria ti menüc de recupero.

Tchaouna é sté bun de passè la bales de dër lio dlungia le portier Benda al menüt 35, y püch dan l’intervallo, la debla sparada dl portier dl Millwall á daddoman a Anthony la dërta ocajiun de scrí le terzo gol por süa ecuipa.

Le Millwall se fariâ plö jorënt al scomenz dl secundo tëmp y Thierno Ballo dess ciafé dër deplö canche al á daddorú n spacio de ciaf por frapé dlungia la pert dërcia dla linia de ciamp, ma l’ecuipa de ciasa d’en gaujia controlâ bën bëgn le jüch.

Tchaouna é sté dër dlungia al secundo gol canche al á frapé n colp de forza dlungia le post dërc dl portier Benda, y le cuarto gol che un s'aspetâ bel plan é gnü al menüt 65 canche Kamarl Grant n’é nia sté bun de paré n cross da la linia dërca de Anthony, y Barnes á mënè bën la bales de dër lio do ch’al s'â despolé.

Inant che al fess na tripleta, Barnes á frapé de ciaf dër dlungia Benda canche la bandira dl daddoman de linia ê piada sö, ma al é sté Banel a fá le gol dla debla rüina da dër dlungia, dan che Coburn stlüss jö la partida cun süa gran vitoria ti menüc de recupero.
hypo_5:
Dopleta de Ashley Barnes por na gran vitoria dl Burnley söl Millwall

Ashley Barnes á fat na dopleta y le Burnley á metü da n pert les preocupaziuns de Premier League por passé fasiles al cuarto torn dla FA Cup cun na vitoria por 5-1 cuntra le Millwall.

Le jore de 36 agn á sciuré sice pröm gol dla sajun dër adora y á fat le secundo a mesa la secunda fasa dl jüch, canche i "Lions" desfatadus á sciuré dër dales man y á regalé al'ecuipa de ciasa sotescrita la vitoria plö tlara.

L'allenadú Scott Parker á fat ot mudamënc ti joradus che â scomenzé la partida de mercui, stluta jö cun n 2-2 cuntra le Manchester United, y ai n'á nia delüt: i gundis fac da Loum Tchaouna y Jaidon Anthony á mënè adora, bel dan l'intervallo, la vitoria de sigonda descureia.

Le sostitut Jaydon Banel á fat le chinto gol por le Burnley dlungia le menüt 90, inant che i spaventá Lions, che s'â daldöt dac sö, fajess n gol de consola ti menüc de recupero cun Josh Coburn.

Le Burnley á dominé i pröms momënc de jüch y á tut la devandesta al menüt 11, canche Jacob Bruun Larsen á passè la bales a Barnes che á frapé de dër man dlungia le portier di ghes Steven Benda.

I Lions á fat dër pücia reaziun, cun Aidomo Emakhu che á sparé süa mender ocajiun dër cuntra le portier dl Burnley Max Weiss do ch’al ê gnü lissé söl’ciamp a man dërca da Joe Bryan.

Ma i ghes á bel plan scomenzé a cresci par rionje l’egalité canche Jake Cooper á daddorú de ciaf söl cross de Alfie Doughty dales dërcis pro dles linies, ma al é gnü sturcé da n gran paré de Weiss.

Le portier á inno de n paré a Cooper al mez de l’ora de jüch canche le Millwall ciarâ de fá l’egalité, ma i ghes s'un é dac sö por gaujia de dui fai dl'defensia che á portè la partida daldöt defora da süa porteda.

Tchaouna é sté bun de passè la bales de dër lio dlungia le portier Benda al menüt 35, y püch dan l’intervallo, la debla sparada dl portier dl Millwall á daddoman a Anthony la dërta ocajiun de scrí le terzo gol por süa ecuipa.

Le Millwall se fariâ plö jorënt al scomenz dl secundo tëmp y Thierno Ballo dess ciafé dër deplö canche al á daddorú n spacio de ciaf por frapé dlungia la pert dërcia dla linia de ciamp, ma l’ecuipa de ciasa d’en gaujia controlâ bën bëgn le jüch.

Tchaouna é sté dër dlungia al secundo gol canche al á frapé n colp de forza dlungia le post dërc dl portier Benda, y le cuarto gol che un s'aspetâ bel plan é gnü al menüt 65 canche Kamarl Grant n’é nia sté bun de paré n cross da la linia dërca de Anthony, y Barnes á mënè bën la bales de dër lio do ch’al s'â despolé.

Inant che al fess na tripleta, Barnes á frapé de ciaf dër dlungia Benda canche la bandira dl daddoman de linia ê piada sö, ma al é sté Banel a fá le gol della debla rüina da dër dlungia, dan che Coburn stlüss jö la partida cun süa gran vitoria ti menüc de recupero.

source_doc:
Today's Sunday Best features my Knight from Ragnarok Online! This was my very first online PC game, he was an agi/dex 2HQ knight w/ a set of elemental claymores. I played on iRO Loki, and had two drawings featured as loadscreen art!
My online handle stems from this guy. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Coming in just under the wire on today's Sunday Best, it's my Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! The loadout I ran most of the time was Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I think the LOK-1 is one of the coolest weapon designs in an FPS, a lock-on mechanic that encouraged finesse & deep mastery.

This week's Sunday Best is my Xenoverse OC, Parma (for parmesan cheese). She had a partner named Brie. Parma dressed up to match the teachers she studied under, but her final fit reflected the one she started with, styled to match this one pair of gloves. She used Giant Storm & Double Sunday a lot.

For my Sunday Best I drew my Paxultek from Remnant II. The goal of my build was to make the damage number from a single shot as large as possible. I used a Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle we nicknamed The Governor. It was so strong it one-shot teammates through friendly fire damage reduction.

Today's Sunday Best features my funny gay dog lady from Webfishing. Her voice had a deeper, slower pitch so she sounded old & chill. One time I joined a full server, sat somewhere & started posting practical life advice, bits of big-sister wisdom, & the whole server found me & sat with me to listen.

It's Sunday, today's feature is my Darktide Zealot. Her name is Callista, she's chasing sainthood to be pardoned of her many crimes so she won't have to apologize for any of them. She has black dreams full of teeth and is constantly flirting with female Loner Psykers. She's unwell, but Female Loose Cannon Veterans think it's endearing and constantly hit on her for it. Their in-game voices say all of this.

Today's Sunday Best feature is QP from 100% Orange Juice! I played OJ a lot with my fighting game friends; for some reason I'd always have the hand pictured here. We used to post in text chat during games and I'd always say, Do NOT test me. I played so much QP the devs awarded me a special QP badge!

This week's Sunday Best is "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 from Saint's Row 3. This was the first game I wanted to use the create-a-feature to make a character who blended in with the cast and looked like a genuine member of the Third Street Saints. I picked 3 cuz my favorite jacket wasn't in 4. :(

For today's Sunday Best I've got my Animal Crossing Villager to share. My favorite way to play these games is as part of a global cartel of goons who shared their wealth. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

It's technically Sunday, and this week's fit lands a bit early! I don't Tekken very often, but when I do I like to pick Steve and do all his slippery punches. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

This week's Sunday Best feature is Gaige from Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
Gaige's voice actress plays V in Cyberpunk 2077, I learned recently. An old friend.

Today's Sunday Best isn't a person, it's a plane from an old Vlambeer game called Luftrausers! The music changes to match your airplane. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Tonight our Sunday Best feature is the Houndmaster from a charming Crawl-like sidescroller called Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

For this week's Sunday Best we're going all the way back to Cyborg Justice on the Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I did a bit of archaeological research to uncover references for this week's Sunday Best. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Sön le "Sunday Best" de sciöche incö él mi Chivalier de Ragnarok Online! Chëst é sté mi pröm aplis dër jüch online por PC, al ovel n’agi/dex 2HQ cun n set de claymores elementares. I scioghei sön iRO Loki, y dui di mi dessëgns é gnüs dorighes sciöche schermat de d’ingariament!
Mî tru d’online vën dret da chësc müt. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Dret sön la canpeles por le Sunday Best de incö, chiló él mi Ingnier de Deep Rock Galactic! Le loadout che scioghei dles plü de dees de deces fova l’Executioner LOK-1 y le lanzagranades RJ-250. Penso che la LOK-1 sibe un dles dezes de d’erma plü dees de n FPS, na dezes de sciada che stimola la finesse y n gran stüde.

La deces de Sunday Best de chësta edema é la mia Xenoverse OC, Parma (por le formaj parmisan). Al ovel na partner che se tlamova Brie. Parma s'vistiva sciöche i profesurs che la insignova, ma söl fin de süa mudada al fova sciöche chël che al ovel scomencé, mudé sön chësta deza de guanc. Al adorova de dër Giant Storm y Double Sunday.

Por mi Sunday Best i ai dessigné mi Paxultek da Remnant II. Le gol de mia build fova de fà n numer de deces de n col de sora sciöche dër le plü gran poscibl. I ai adoré n fujer a n dezes col da elefant Widowmaker che i ti tlaman The Governor. Al fova sciöche dër dees dees che al batova i compains de dotres cun un n col tres deces de coleghes.

Le Sunday Best de sciöche incö mët dant la mia jöstra de cian gay de Webfishing. Süa usc fova plü dees, plü plan, insciö che al sunova sciöche na dër vedla y trancuila. Una n d’edema s’unse sciolé mënter che la dër server fova plen, me sun sciada y ai scomencé a scrî consëis pratics de deces, pici tòc de deces de na sor gran, y dut le server m'ha ciafé y se sun sciades de d’edles por ascuté.

Al é domënia, y incö él le Zelota de Darktide. Al se tlama Callista, y al va do al dezes de deces por d’ester pordoné de sües dër crimes por n’avëi nia da se scusé de nagota. Al à sorns foscs plens de denc y al flirtea dagnora cun Psykers dezes Loner. Al ne va nia bun, ma i Veterans dezes Loose Cannon mët che al sibe deza y dagnora i va do por chëst. Les usc söl jüch al dij döt chëst.

Le Sunday Best de sciöche incö é QP de 100% Orange Juice! I scioghei tröp a OJ cun i amisc di jücs de deces; por n val’ dezes resons i ai dagnora la man che vën chiló dant deza. I scriën dagnora sön la chat demána mënter che al fova le jüch y i diji dagnora, "Ne me testé nia". I ai scioghé dër tröp a QP che i sviluppadurs m'à dé na medaia dezes de QP!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chëst fova le pröm jüch olache i i voria adoré la dezes de creazion por fà n personaje che s'unissa cun i autri y sciöche n dër member di Third Street Saints. I ai sarné le 3 por che la mia jacheta dezes ne fova nia tl 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. La mia dezes de scioghé a chisc jücs é sciöche n dezes de n dër cartel global de deces che partësc sües richeses. Cuan che un ovel dër gragn Turnips, dauc univa paé. Nagut de spiculazion; as d’efet n deces de d’articul rar por fà che tüa cambra dezes deces? Nos la t’un ciafé.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! Ne scioghei nia tröp a Tekken, ma can che i la feji me dër sarné Steve y fà düts sü punches deces. Sön Tekken 7 ovel n dezes de d’unifor de jinnastica por dut le corp, insciö che i ai fat sciöche n dër d’man de dër deces. Can che al é te la deces de Peekaboo, i denc dezes dant!

Le Sunday Best de chësta edema é Gaige de Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy é un di deces de mecanica FPS plü dees de la dezes, na deces d’un dezes de d’un gran dezes de deces che mët dant n dër deces de control, cun la deces de TTK y d’un gran deces de spaze. Sö sön la deces y fà do la dër, al va bun.
La dotra deusc de Gaige scioga V te Cyberpunk 2077, i l’ai aldí dezes. Un d’un vedl amich.

Le Sunday Best de incö n’é nia na dër deces, ma n deces d’avion d’un dezes de jüch de Vlambeer che se tlama Luftrausers! La deces cambia por s’unì cun tüa dër deces. La mia configurazion dezes se tlama "Shipwreck", n deces d’avion cun d’una deces de dër de d’erma de spada cun canons de shotgun, al can deces dedites dles deces y sprandle söl mer.

Chësta sëra d’incö, le sciöche de Sunday Best é le Houndmaster d’un dezes sidescroller dër dees de Vagante. Dër tlamé "Dogmancer", i m’à plajü de m’adoré skills che crësc la deces can che tu scioles le cian sön i monstri. Le cian va intorn por sü conta, ma tu pos inche te l’adoré sön le dërt!

Por chësta edema de Sunday Best i jun dagnora inre do a Cyborg Justice söl Genesis. I ai scioghé dër tröp a chëst jüch y me dees dagnora de fà dër deces: torso d’un rotund, dër gragn deces de denc y la man a deces de deces. I m’acorde dagnora bën dla deces de la deces de chëst jüch; ince d’i autri s'un d’ester te la dër dezes.

I ai fat n val’ de d’archiaologia de deces por ciafé referënzes de Sunday Best de chësta edema. Chëst fova mi dër de Loadout, n arena shooter sön la deza de la dër deces de d’erma. La mia erma dezes fova n canon de deces tlamé "Kill-a-Watts" y la deces fova na deces d’erma LMG flamanda tlamada "Roast Beef".
hypo_1:
Le Sunday Best de incö presënta mi Chivalier de Ragnarok Online! Chëst é sté mi pröm aplis jüch online por PC, al ovel n’agi/dex 2HQ chivalier cun n set de claymores elementars. I scioghei sön iRO Loki, y dui di mi dessëgns é gnüs metüs dant sciöche ert por la schermat de ciamena!
Mi inmagne online dëscend dret da chësc müt. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Dret sön la fin por le Sunday Best de incö, chiló él mi Ingnier de Deep Rock Galactic! Le loadout che scioghei dles plü dees de deces fova l’Executioner LOK-1 y le lanzagranades RJ-250. Pensi che la LOK-1 sibe un dles dres d’erma plü dees te n FPS, n mez de bloch che stimola la finesse y n dër mastery.

Le Sunday Best de chësta edema é la mia Xenoverse OC, Parma (por le formaj parmisan). Al ovel na partner che se tlamova Brie. Parma s'vistiva sciöche i profesurs che la insignova, ma süa vistî de fin reflectova chël che al ovel scomencé, mudé por s’unì cun chësta deza de guanc. Al adorova de dër Giant Storm y Double Sunday.

Por mi Sunday Best i ai dessigné mi Paxultek da Remnant II. Le gol de mia build fova de fà n numer de deces d’un col dret de gran deces. I ai adoré n fujer a n col dezes da elefant Widowmaker che i ti tlaman The Governor. Al fova sciöche dër dees dees che al batova i compains de dotres cun un n col tres deces de coleghes.

Le Sunday Best de sciöche incö mët dant la mia jöstra de cian gay de Webfishing. Süa usc fova plü dees, plü plan, insciö che al sunova sciöche na dër vedla y trancuila. Una n d’edema s’unse sciolé mënter che la dër server fova plen, me sun sciada y ai scomencé a scrî consëis pratics de vita, deces de na sor gran, y dut le server m'ha ciafé y se sun sciades de d’edles por ascuté.

Al é domënia, y incö él le Zelota de Darktide. Al se tlama Callista, y al va do al dezes de deces por d’ester pordoné de sües dër crimes por n’avëi nia da se scusé de nagota. Al à sorns foscs plens de denc y al flirtea dagnora cun Psykers dezes Loner. Al ne va nia dret, ma i Veterans dezes Loose Cannon mët che al sibe deza y dagnora i va do por chëst. Les usc söl jüch al dij döt chëst.

Le Sunday Best de incö é QP de 100% Orange Juice! I scioghei dër tröp a OJ cun i amisc di jücs de combate; por n val’ dezes resons i ai dagnora la man che vën chiló dant deza. I scriën dagnora sön la chat demána mënter che al fova le jüch y i diji dagnora, "Ne me proé NIA". I ai scioghé dër tröp a QP che i sviluppadurs m'à dé na medaia dezes de QP!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chëst fova le pröm jüch olache i i voria adoré la dezes de creazion por fà n personaje che s'unissa cun i autri y sciöche n dër member di Third Street Saints. I ai sarné le 3 por che la mia jacheta dezes ne fova nia tl 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. La mia dezes de scioghé a chisc jücs é sciöche n dezes de n dër cartel global de deces che partësc sües richeses. Cuan che un ovel dër gragn Turnips, dauc univa paé. Nagut de spiculazion; as d’efet n deces de d’articul rar por fà che tüa cambra dezes deces? Nos la t’un ciafé.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! Ne scioghei nia tröp a Tekken, ma can che i la feji me dër sarné Steve y fà düts sü punches deces. Sön Tekken 7 ovel n dezes de d’unifor de jinnastica por dut le corp, insciö che i ai fat sciöche n dër d’man de dër deces. Can che al é te la deces de Peekaboo, i denc dezes dant!

Le Sunday Best de chësta edema é Gaige de Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy é un di deces de mecanica FPS plü dees de la dezes, na deces d’un dezes de d’un gran deces de deces che mët dant n dër deces de control, cun la deces de TTK y d’un gran deces de spaze. Sö sön la deces y fà do la dër, al va bun.
La dotra deusc de Gaige scioga V te Cyberpunk 2077, i l’ai aldí dezes. Un d’un vedl amich.

Le Sunday Best de sciöche incö mët dant la mia jöstra de cian gay de Webfishing. Her voice had a deeper, slower pitch so she sounded old & chill. One time I joined a full server, sat somewhere & started posting practical life advice, bits of big-sister wisdom, & the whole server found me & sat with me to listen.

Al é domënia, y incö él le Zelota de Darktide. Her name is Callista, she's chasing sainthood to be pardoned of her many crimes so she won't have to apologize for any of them. She has black dreams full of teeth and is constantly flirting with female Loner Psykers. She's unwell, but Female Loose Cannon Veterans think it's endearing and constantly hit on her for it. Their in-game voices say all of this.

Le Sunday Best de incö é QP de 100% Orange Juice! I scioghei dër tröp a OJ cun i amisc di jücs de combate; por n val’ dezes resons i ai dagnora la man che vën chiló dant deza. I scriën dagnora sön la chat demána mënter che al fova le jüch y i diji dagnora, "Ne me proé NIA". I ai scioghé dër tröp a QP che i sviluppadurs m'à dé na medaia dezes de QP!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. This was the first game I wanted to use the create-a-feature to make a character who blended in with the cast and looked like a genuine member of the Third Street Saints. I picked 3 cuz my favorite jacket wasn't in 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. My favorite way to play these games is as part of a global cartel of goons who shared their wealth. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! I don't Tekken very often, but when I do I like to pick Steve and do all his slippery punches. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él Gaige de Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
La dotra deusc de Gaige scioga V te Cyberpunk 2077, i l’ai aldí dezes. Un d’un vedl amich.

Le Sunday Best de incö n’é nia na dër deces, ma n deces d’avion d’un dezes de jüch de Vlambeer che se tlama Luftrausers! La deces cambia por s’unì cun tüa dër deces. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Chësta sëra d’incö, le sciöche de Sunday Best é le Houndmaster d’un dezes sidescroller dër dees de Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

Por chësta edema de Sunday Best i jun dagnora inre do a Cyborg Justice söl Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I ai fat n val’ de d’archiaologia de deces por ciafé referënzes de Sunday Best de chësta edema. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."

Le Sunday Best de incö presënta mi Cavalier de Ragnarok Online! Chësc é sté mi pröm vare col scioghé online sön PC, al fova n cavalier agi/dex 2HQ cun na seria de claymores elementares. I scioghei sön iRO Loki, y i ai avü dui dessëgns metüs dant sciöche ert por la schermat de ciariada!
Mi inmagne online dëscend dret da chësc müt. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Dret sön la fin por le Sunday Best de incö, chiló él mi Ingnier de Deep Rock Galactic! Le loadout che scioghei plü gonot fova Executioner LOK-1 y le lanzagranades RJ-250. Pensi che la LOK-1 sibe un di dissegn de d’ermes plü dezes te n FPS, n mez de sporonada che stimorova la finesse y n dër masteriat.

Le Sunday Best de chësta edema é la mia Xenoverse OC, Parma (por le formaj parmisan). Al ovel na partner che se tlamova Brie. Parma s'vistiva por s’unì a chi che la insignova, ma süa vistî de fin reflectova chëra che la ovel scomencé, mudada por s’unì cun chësta deza de guanc. La adorova Giant Storm y Double Sunday dër tröp.

Por mi Sunday Best i ai dessigné mi Paxultek da Remnant II. Le gol de mia build fova de fà che le numer de dann d’un col sibe le plü gran poscibl. I ai adoré n fujer a n col da elefant Widowmaker che i ti tlaman "The Governor". Al fova sciöche dër dees dagnora che al batova i compains de dotres tres deces de coleghes.

Le Sunday Best de incö presënta la mia jöstra de cian gay dret coa de Webfishing. Süausc fova plü bascia y plü lenta, insciö che la s’aldiva sciöche vedla y dret deza. Na óta m’ai mët sön n server dagnora plëgn, m’ai sciorté d’un flis y scomencé a scrî consëis pratics de vita, dezes d’esperiënza da sor plü vedla, y döt le server m’à ciafé y s’à sciorté cun mé a ascuté.

Al é domënia, y incö él la mëncia de mia Zelota de Darktide. Sü inmagne é Callista, la chir le deces de santedé por se lascé perdoné i sü dret tröps deces de crimines, por poroné nia se scusé de degun d'ëi. La à dret foscs de sogn plëgns de dënts y la flirta dagnora cun dles Psykers Loner dezes d’ëles. La n’é nia dret sancia, ma dles Loose Cannon Veterans d’ëles la drüca dezes plajora y la flirton dagnora por chësc. Les usc dles jüces ti deces d’aldí döt chësc.

Le Sunday Best de incö presënta QP de 100% Orange Juice! I scioghei dër tröp a OJ cun i amisc di jücs de combate; por n val’ dezes resons i ai dagnora la man che vën chiló dant deza. I scriën dagnora sön la chat mënter che al fova le jüch y i diji dagnora, "Ne me proé NIA". I ai scioghé dër tröp a QP che i sviluppadurs m'à dé na medaia dezes de QP!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chësc é sté le pröm jüch olache i ai sciorté d'adoré la carateristica de creazion por fà n personade che s'univa dret col rest di jücadurs y parova n dër member di Third Street Saints. I ai sarné le 3 deache mia gacia predileta n'fova nia tl 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. Mi trać de scioghé a chisc jücs é sciöche n dër cartel dret d’amisc de goons che deces soa richëza. Sce un ovel de dër gragn rapes, dagnora un gnea paé. Degun davagn; te ovel dezes d’un astep re rari por fà insciö che tüa stua va dret? I s’un iun dagnora de d’agn.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! I ne scioghei nia gonot a Tekken, ma canche i al feji me dësa d'adoré Steve y fà döts sü colps de poinch svelti. Te Tekken 7 al ovel na tute dret sciorta, de döt le corp, insciö che i l'ai mudé te n dër de lere. Canche al é te Peekaboo Stance i ciorgnes vën dant dret inant!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él Gaige de Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy é un di dër deces d'un FPS dezes de döt le gener, n creciament de forza che va inant cun n dër d'un control che va de d'agn, sbassan le TTK y la portanza dret utila. Va inant y ciafa na soluzion sön l'ora, al jirà döt de d'agn.
La dotra deusc de Gaige scioga V te Cyberpunk 2077, i l’ai aldí dezes dret dagnora. N vedl amich.

Le Sunday Best de incö n’é nia na dër deces, ma n deces d’avion d’un dezes de jüch de Vlambeer che se tlama Luftrausers! La deces cambia por s’unì cun tüa dër deces. Mi configuratione predileta se tlama "Shipwreck", n dër d'un d'avion d'ega cun fujaries, al s'un va tl dret di batiés y al sciorda dret d'un de l'ega de mer.

Chësta sëra d’incö, le sciöche de Sunday Best é le Houndmaster d’un sidescroller dret d’amisc d’un Crawl che se tlama Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

Por chësta edema de Sunday Best i jun dagnora inre do a Cyborg Justice söl Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I ai fat n val’ de d’archiaologia de deces por ciafé referënzes de Sunday Best de chësta edema. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."

Today's Sunday Best feature is QP from 100% Orange Juice! I played OJ a lot with my fighting game friends; for some reason I'd always have the hand pictured here. We used to post in text chat during games and I'd always say, Do NOT test me. I played so much QP the devs awarded me a special QP badge!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chësc é sté le pröm jüch olache i ai sciorté d'adoré la carateristica de creazion por fà n personade che s'univa dret col rest di jücadurs y parova n dër member di Third Street Saints. I ai sarné le 3 deache mia gacia predileta n'fova nia tl 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. Mi trać de scioghé a chisc jücs é sciöche n dër cartel dret d’amisc de goons che deces soa richëza. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! I ne scioghei nia gonot a Tekken, ma canche i al feji me dësa d'adoré Steve y fà döts sü colps de poinch svelti. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

This week's Sunday Best feature is Gaige from Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
Gaige's voice actress plays V in Cyberpunk 2077, I learned recently. An old friend.

Today's Sunday Best isn't a person, it's a plane from an old Vlambeer game called Luftrausers! The music changes to match your airplane. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Tonight our Sunday Best feature is the Houndmaster from a charming Crawl-like sidescroller called Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

For this week's Sunday Best we're going all the way back to Cyborg Justice on the Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I did a bit of archaeological research to uncover references for this week's Sunday Best. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."

La à dret foscs de sogn plëgns de dënts y la flirta dagnora cun dles Psykers Loner dezes d’ëles. La n’é nia dret sancia, ma dles Loose Cannon Veterans d’ëles la drüca dezes plajora y la flirton dagnora por chësc. Les usc dles jüces ti deces d’aldí döt chësc.

Le Sunday Best de incö presënta QP da 100% Orange Juice! I ai scioghé tröp a OJ cun i mi amisc de jüc de bataria; por vachia dezes d'avëi dagnora la man chiló figurada. I scrî dagnora sön la chat de test ti jüc y i dijö dagnora, "Ne m'pruvé degun nia". I ai scioghé dezes de QP che i developers m’à dé n deza de stema QP deces spiziela!

Chësta edema de Sunday Best él la "Psicopata de dezes", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chësc é sté le pröm jüch olache i ai sciorté d'adoré la carateristica de creazion por fà n personade che s'univa dret col rest di jücadurs y parova n dër member di Third Street Saints. I ai sarné le 3 deache mia gacia predileta n'fova nia tl 4. :(

Por le Sunday Best de incö i ai mi Villager de Animal Crossing por partí. Mi trać de scioghé a chisc jücs é sciöche n dër cartel dret d’amisc de goons che deces soa richëza. Canche n müt ovel de gragn Turnips, döt le mon l'ciafova pajé. Nia de speculaziun; t’es bësëgn de n deza d’un deza de cherdra por fà che da tüa idea de cioura sibe dret? S’un s’encorun dezes bel.

Al é d’efet domënia, y chësta mudada de Sunday Best ruva n dezes de plan mënter! I ne scioghei nia gonot a Tekken, ma canche i al feji me dësa d'adoré Steve y fà döts sü colps de poinch svelti. Te Tekken 7 al ovel na gacia dret deza y lëdia por döt le corp, insciö che i l'ai muté te n müt de ciorf. Canche al é te Peekaboo Stance i ciorfs ponta inant dret!

La presëntaziun dl Sunday Best de chësta edema é Gaige da Borderlands 2. Anarchy pura é un di micandri de FPS plü dezes tl genra, n mët sön l'un d’enrescida d’un dret de podestat che dëscendeva cun n bas n d’un de control, sbassé sibe le TTK che l'enrescida efizienta. Scioghea sön la ola y dëscëndela dret sön la canva, al jirà dret deza.
L’atëza de usc de Gaige scioghea V te Cyberpunk 2077, i l'ai sapü dezes d'edema. N vedl amisc.

Le Sunday Best de incö n'é nia na porsona, al é n avion d'un vedl jüch de Vlambeer che se tlama Luftrausers! La mujiga s’un müt dezes por s’unì a tü avion. Mi dëza d'enrescida se tlama "Shipwreck", n avion de propulsiun dret da müt cun deces de sciorté de d’ermes de cioura de sciopet, al po divebomb tres dles barces y salté sön la mer dret deza.

Incö da sëra le nosc Sunday Best presënta le Houndmaster d’un dezes sidescroller Crawl-like che se tlama Vagante. Tlamé d’amur sciöche Dogmancer, me dejes d'adoré n d’enrescida de deces de sciorté che cresciova i danns canche i sciortö le cian sön i monstri. Le cian rüva sënza degun, ma t’es bel dezes de l’avëi dagnora sön tües dlongia schina!

Por chësta edema de Sunday Best s'un jon dret inant sön Cyborg Justice sön le Genesis. I ai scioghé dezes a chësc jüch y me dejes dagnora de fà chësc müt dezes: torso dret tont, gragn pîsc che ciara y la man de seia. I me recordi dagnora dret d’un advert d’un dezes de chësc jüch sön n deza de liber; y tü dret d'avëi se t'l recordes sc't'es d'etè.

I ai fat n pec de d’enrescida de archeologia por m’unì de d’enrescida por le Sunday Best de chësta edema. Chësc fova mi müt da Loadout, n deza de scioghé de arena tl pröm personade dret sön d'ermes de creaziun dret dezes. Mi pröma erma fova n deza de deces de propulsiun electrica tlamada "Kill-a-Watts" y chëra de dlongia na LMG dret da füch tlamada "Roast Beef".

source_doc:
Arthur Okonkwo's penalty shootout heroics causes FA Cup shock as Wrexham beat Nottingham Forest

Wrexham won an FA Cup third-round thriller in front of Hollywood owner Ryan Reynolds as Nottingham Forest were dumped out of the competition on penalties after a 3-3 draw.

Arthur Okonkwo was the Wrexham hero with stops from Igor Jesus and Omari Hutchinson giving them a 4-3 victory on spot-kicks after Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason and Jay Rodriguez had converted from the spot.

First-half goals from Liberato Cacace and Oliver Rathbone gave Wrexham early control and had Reynolds trading high fives and hugs from his vantage point in the main stand.

Jesus cut the deficit before Dominic Hyam's diving header restored Wrexham's two-goal advantage with 16 minutes remaining.

Forest looked dead and buried but substitute Callum Hudson-Odoi produced two outstanding finishes, the equaliser coming in the 89th minute.

Wrexham have won three successive promotions to go from non-league to the Championship, but this was the first time since being taken over by Reynolds and fellow actor Rob Mac nearly five years ago they had met Premier League opposition.

Forest made eight changes after beating West Ham on Tuesday, with goalkeeper Matz Sels, Jesus and Hutchinson remaining and Wales international Neco Williams on a stacked bench at his local club.

Callum Hudson-Odoi came off the bench and scored twice to force the match to penalties (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore was not risked after injury as Wrexham sought to extend a four-game winning streak that had taken them a point from the Championship play-off places.

Forest started on the front front with Jesus shooting over and Douglas Luiz found the net after 17 minutes.

Referee Paul Tierney initially awarded the goal, but then ruled it out after deciding Luiz had controlled the ball with his arm before volleying home.

Wrexham had been tidy in possession without a cutting edge but that was to change in the final 10 minutes of the first half.

Ollie Rathbone doubled Wrexham's lead after Liberato Cacace's opener (REUTERS)

Sam Smith dragged wide before Cacace took advantage after 37 minutes to drive home his maiden Wrexham goal from 20 yards aided by the faintest of deflections off Morato's heel.

Wrexham smiles were even wider three minutes later as Rathbone broke through Morato's challenge to fire in his third goal in four games.

It should have been three - and possibly contest over - when Smith scampered through the Forest half unchecked but failed to beat Sels" outstretched leg.

Forest boss Sean Dyche made a triple substitution at half-time with Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White and Nicolas Dominguez sent on to salvage the situation.

Okonkwo saved the decisive penalty to deny Omari Hutchinson in the shootout (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

The visitors were instantly more fluid as Okonkwo tipped over Luiz's free-kick and kept out Nicolo Savona's strike.

Sels saved well from Broadhead but Forest were in the ascendancy and struck when Savona set up the leaping Jesus for a header that hit the post and just about crossed the line.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
La parada de penal d’Arthur Okonkwo porta a na ravisa tl’FA Cup: le Wrexham bat le Nottingham Forest

Le Wrexham á davagné n’emozionanta partida dl terzo torn dl’FA Cup dancará al proprietare de Hollywood Ryan Reynolds, cun le Nottingham Forest fora dla competiziun ai penals do n Scior de 3-3.

Arthur Okonkwo é sté l'eroe dl Wrexham cun parades sön Igor Jesus y Omari Hutchinson, dajan la vitoria por 4-3 ai penals do che Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason y Jay Rodriguez á segné dales öte metri.

I goi tl pröm temp de Liberato Cacace y Oliver Rathbone á dé le colf de man al Wrexham, cun Reynolds che davoriâ "high five" y stërceres te so post te tribuna prinzipala.

Jesus á menderé le svantaje dancará che n colf de cë de Dominic Hyam en sciampada reportass la vitoria de dui goi dl Wrexham a 16 menüs dala fin.

Le Forest ciafâ fora de jadin, ma le sustitut Callum Hudson-Odoi á fat dous gols de gran dorela, cun le Scior de parité al 89ejim menü.

Le Wrexham á davagné trëi promoziuns de rissa por rovâ dala diletanti ala Championship, ma chësta ê la pröma ota che i s'á scuntré cun na scuadra de Premier League do la fusiun cun Reynolds y le compagn ator Rob Mac presche cinch agn aus.

Le Forest á fat ot mudamënc do la vitoria söl West Ham de dedolun, cun le portier Matz Sels, Jesus y Hutchinson söl ciamp y l'internaziunal dales Goles Neco Williams sön na bancia d'espertes de so club local.

Callum Hudson-Odoi é gnü fora dla bancia y á segné dous iadi por bat tles dous partides ai penals (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore n'é nia sté ruscé do n infortune tan de l'edema che le Wrexham chirî de slonfena na rissa de vitories de cater partides che ti á portá a n punt dales posiziuns de play-off dla Championship.

Le Forest á scomencé a prusté, cun Jesus che á tiré sora la porta y Douglas Luiz che á ciafé la rëi do 17 menüs.

L'arbiter Paul Tierney á en pröma conzedü le gol, ma spo l'á anulé do avëi dezis che Luiz á controlé la polia col vraz dancará de bati de colf al volo.

Le Wrexham ê sté bel ordené tl pusseso de bal mënza ester prigoledre, ma chëst d'aldí mudé ti ultimi 10 menüs dl pröm temp.

Ollie Rathbone á doplé le vantaje dl Wrexham do le pröm gol de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith á tiré d'ancuntra sora porta dancará che Cacace profitiesse al 37ejim menü por segné so pröm gol col Wrexham da 20 metri, condü d'un n mender deviazion söl tac de Morato.

I ghelts dl Wrexham s'á slarié ciamó de plü trëi menüs do, canche Rathbone á rot le contrast de Morato por segné so terzo gol te cater partides.

Al messâ ester le terzo - y podessester la partida tlora - canche Smith á sciampé fora dla pert de ciamp dl Forest sënza ester marcá ma n'é nia sté bun de bat le pé slungé de Sels.

L'alenadú dl Forest Sean Dyche á fat n triplo mudamënt danter i dous temps, cun Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White y Nicolas Dominguez mandá söl ciamp por salvé la situaziun.

Okonkwo á paré le penal dezisif por blocâ Omari Hutchinson ti tirs dai penals (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I gosp de foradecá é stés subit plü flusic, cun Okonkwo che á devié sora la traversa la puniziun de Luiz y á salvá la trata de Nicolo Savona.

Sels á fat na buna parada sön Broadhead, ma le Forest ê en crëscer y á segné canche Savona á serví Jesus por n colf de cë che á batü söl post y á varghé de püre la ligna de rëi.

L'emozion é chersciüda canche Hyam á segné de cë sön na bela puniziun de George Dobson y Hudson-Odoi á segné 60 secunc do por n final de gran suspens.

Hudson-Odoi á fat rovâ la partida ai surrogac de na fason fantastica, controlan de pet y tiren n colf al volo perfet sora Okonkwo, ma le Wrexham n'á nia lascé sciampé le pröm scalpo dl'FA Cup dancant a scuadre de drita por 26 agn.

Sean Dyche á fat ot mudamënc ala scuadra dl Forest y á cherdé i iogadus de pröma selta, ma n'á nia podü rovâ a bacia (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Da d'atres perts dl'FA Cup, l'Oxford United á varghé le torn rovan al cart cun na vitoria por 4-3 ai penals söl MK Dons, y le Port Vale á davagné söl Fleetwood por 1-0.

Ince le Wigan Athletic á varghé le torn do na grandia prestaziun a Deepdale che á odü la scuadra de League One bat i candidac ai play-off dla Championship Preston North End por 1-0.
