Sam Smith á tiré d'ancuntra sora porta dancará che Cacace profitiesse al 37ejim menü por segné so pröm gol col Wrexham da 20 iardi, condü d'un n mender deviazion söl tac de Morato.

I ghelts dl Wrexham s'á slarié ciamó de plü trëi menüs do, canche Rathbone á rot le contrast de Morato por segné so terzo gol te cater partides.

Al messâ ester le terzo - y podessester la partida tlora - canche Smith á sciampé fora dela pert de ciamp dl Forest sënza ester marcá ma n'é nia sté bun de bat le pé slungé de Sels.

L'alenadú dl Forest Sean Dyche á fat n triplo mudamënt danter i dous temps, cun Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White y Nicolas Dominguez mandá söl ciamp por salvé la situaziun.

Okonkwo á paré le penal dezisif por blocâ Omari Hutchinson ti tirs dai penals (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I gosp de foradecá é stés subit plü flusic, cun Okonkwo che á devié sora la traversa la puniziun de Luiz y á salvá la trata de Nicolo Savona.

Sels á fat na buna parada sön Broadhead, ma le Forest ê en crëscer y á segné canche Savona á serví Jesus por n colf de cë che á batü söl post y á varghé de püre la ligna de rëi.

L'emozion é chersciüda canche Hyam á segné de cë sön na bela puniziun de George Dobson y Hudson-Odoi á segné 60 secunc do por n final de gran suspens.

Hudson-Odoi á fat rovâ la partida ai surrogac de na fason fantastica, controlan de pet y tiren n colf al volo perfet sora Okonkwo, ma le Wrexham n'á nia lascé sciampé so pröm scalpo dl'FA Cup dancant a scuadre de drita por 26 agn.

Sean Dyche á fat ot mudamënc ala scuadra dl Forest y á cherdé i iogadus de pröma selta, ma n'á nia podü rovâ a bacia (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Da d'atres perts dl'FA Cup, l'Oxford United á varghé le torn rovan al cart cun na vitoria por 4-3 ai penals söl MK Dons, y le Port Vale á batü le Fleetwood por 1-0.

Ince le Wigan Athletic á varghé le torn do na grandia prestaziun a Deepdale che á odü la scuadra de League One bat i candidac ai play-off dla Championship Preston North End por 1-0.
hypo_5:
L’arice de Arthur Okonkwo ti tirs dai penals porta a na gran sorpresa tl’FA Cup: le Wrexham bat le Nottingham Forest

Le Wrexham á davagné n’emozionanta partida dl terzo torn dl’FA Cup danter i dles fies de so proprietare de Hollywood Ryan Reynolds, cul Nottingham Forest che é gnü eliminé dala competiziun ai tirs dai penals do n Scior de 3-3.

Arthur Okonkwo é sté l’eroe dl Wrexham cun les parodes sön Igor Jesus y Omari Hutchinson, dajan la vitoria por 4-3 ai penals do che Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason y Jay Rodriguez â segné dales öte metri.

I goi tl pröm temp de Liberato Cacace y Oliver Rathbone á dé le control dla partida al Wrexham bele adenant, cun Reynolds che davoriâ "high five" y stërceres te so post sön la tribuna prinzipala.

Jesus á menderé le svantaje dan che n colf de cë en sciampada de Dominic Hyam reportass le vantaje de dui goi dl Wrexham a 16 menüs dala fin.

Le Forest ciafâ daldöt pordü ma le sustitut Callum Hudson-Odoi á fat dous gols de gran dorela, cun le Scior de parité che é gnü al 89ejim menü.

Le Wrexham á davagné trëi promoziuns de rissa por rovâ dala diletanti ala Championship, ma chësta ê la pröma ota che i s'á scuntré cun na scuadra de Premier League do la fusiun cun Reynolds y le compagn ator Rob McElhenney presche cinch agn ales rës.

Le Forest á fat ot mudamënc do la vitoria söl West Ham de dedolun, cun le portier Matz Sels, Jesus y Hutchinson söl ciamp y l'internaziunal dales Goles Neco Williams sön na bancia de gran cualité te so club local.

Callum Hudson-Odoi é gnü fora dela bancia y á segné dous iadi por bat tles dous partides ai penals (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore n'é nia sté ruscé do n infortune tan de l'edema che le Wrexham chirî de slonfena na rissa de vitories de cater partides che ti â portá a n punt dales posiziuns de play-off dla Championship.

Le Forest á scomencé a prusté, cun Jesus che á tiré sora la porta y Douglas Luiz che á ciafé la rëi do 17 menüs.

L'arbiter Paul Tierney á en pröma conzedü le gol, ma spo l'á anulé do avëi dezis che Luiz â controlé la polia col vraz dancará de bati de colf al volo.

Le Wrexham ê sté ordené tl pusseso de bal sënza ester dër prigoledre, ma chëst d'aldí mudé ti ultimi 10 menüs dl pröm temp.

Ollie Rathbone á doplé le vantaje dl Wrexham do le pröm gol de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith á tiré d'ancuntra sora porta dancará che Cacace profitiesse al 37ejim menü por segné so pröm gol col Wrexham da 20 iardi, condü d'un n mender deviazion söl tac de Morato.

I ghelts dl Wrexham s'á slarié ciamó de plü trëi menüs do, canche Rathbone á rot le contrast de Morato por segné so terzo gol te cater partides.

Al messâ ester le terzo - y podessester la partida tlora - canche Smith á sciampé fora dela pert de ciamp dl Forest sënza ester marcá ma n'é nia sté bun de bat le pé slungé de Sels.

L'alenadú dl Forest Sean Dyche á fat n triplo mudamënt danter i dous temps, cun Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White y Nicolas Dominguez mandá söl ciamp por salvé la situaziun.

Okonkwo á paré le penal dezisif por blocâ Omari Hutchinson ti tirs dai penals (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I gosp de foradecá é stés subit plü flusic, cun Okonkwo che á devié sora la traversa la puniziun de Luiz y á salvá la trata de Nicolo Savona.

Sels á fat na buna parada sön Broadhead, ma le Forest ê en crëscer y á segné canche Savona á serví Jesus por n colf de cë che á batü söl post y á varghé de püre la ligna de rëi.

L'emozion é chersciüda canche Hyam á segné de cë sön na bela puniziun de George Dobson y Hudson-Odoi á segné 60 secunc do por n final de gran suspens.

Hudson-Odoi á fat rovâ la partida ai surrogac de na fason fantastica, controlan de pet y tiren n colf al volo perfet sora Okonkwo, ma le Wrexham n'á nia lascé sciampé so pröm scalpo dl'FA Cup dancant a scuadre de drita por 26 agn.

Sean Dyche á fat ot mudamënc ala scuadra dl Forest y á cherdé i iogadus de pröma selta, ma n'á nia podü rovâ a bacia (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Da d'atres perts dl'FA Cup, l'Oxford United á varghé le torn rovan al cart cun na vitoria por 4-3 ai penals söl MK Dons, y le Port Vale á batü le Fleetwood por 1-0.

Ince le Wigan Athletic á varghé le torn do na grandia prestaziun a Deepdale che á odü la scuadra de League One bat i candidac ai play-off dla Championship Preston North End por 1-0.

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!

Insciö m'el gnü en ment n model scemplifiché por controlé sce chësc asvel pro por splighé d'en dert le fenomen.

I ponson ince por scemplizitè che i reply guys operiëies de dert mecanich, ch'al oles di ch'i n'adores nia i automatisms por ciafé i posć d'asponde. Chësc mët n limit ala soma di posć ch'un n reply guy pöl asponde te na sora de dé. Al canun chësc de D.
I podun ince ponsé che te n dé un n uasce normel nia-reply-guy fejes de regola P < D posć.
Por n secunt i n'asgardan nia aspet de tëmp plü gragn ch'un n dé (sciöche ince la descussiun a n dert pöl deventé lungia sce i slargiun fora lëns de tëmp d'osservaziun) …

Dant de fá le dert carcul, i dán na dert edada söl val'ejëmpl pratich. Pongunpa che 1 utënt sön 10 sides de reply guys, che n reply guy s'as liges fora 100 posć al dé, y che un n utënt normel fejes sön i 10 posć al dé.

Mo sce al è 100 utënć söl rëi, de chi che 10 è de reply guys, söl rëi as farià d'en dert 900 posć al dé, mo i reply guys de dert n'as vedrà nia daldöt döt!

vigni post d'al na probabilitè de (8/9)^10 de mia ester odü, mo por la probabilitè che DÖT i posć de dert n'as vegnes odü, d'al ester de plü n dert elevé al numer di posć fac de dert sora la porsona, che de dert è 10, insciö (8/9)^100, y la probabilitè che ALMANCO UN POST vegne odü de dert ALMANCO UN reply guy as deventi 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… che daldöt n'è nia 100% mo daldöt dert d'al lée d'as d'ester daldöt insciö.

Sce al è 10 utënć söl rëi, 9 è utënć de regola y 1 è n reply guy. Al d'al 90 posć de regola al dé, y le sora reply guy de dert i as vedrà DÖT (porché d'al pöl ligé fora 100 posć al dé, y insciö as vëiga döt i posć fac söl rëi te chël dé.
Mo sce al è 100 utënć söl rëi, de chi che 10 è de reply guys, söl rëi as farià d'en dert 900 posć al dé, mo i reply guys nia daldöt döt as vedrà!
4/n

Söl secunt ejëmpl, vigni reply guy as vedrà 100 posć a causo sön i 900. Anche sce al è 10 reply guys, chësc n'oles nia di che vigni post vegne ciafé de dert un n reply guy! Al podess ester posć ch'as vëiga deplü reply guys, y posć che n'as vedrà degügn reply guys!
So co fariundi a carculé la probabilité che n post vegne odü de dert n reply guy sön chësc aspet?
Na derta d'al fá d'as pöl con carculé la probabilité de nia ester odü de DEGÜGN reply guy, y to sön dert le complement.
5/n

Insciö, sciöche vigni reply guy as vëiga 100 di 900 posć, vigni post d'al na probabilité de 1/9 de dert ester odü de dert val'reply guy particolar, sciöche a dé na probabilité de 8/9 de nia ester odü de dert chël particolar reply guy. La probabilité de nia ester odü de DEGÜGN reply guy è insciö de 8/9 por vigni reply guy y scen ponse che la probabilités sides sora d'al maza, chësc oles di che la probabilité de nia ester odü de degügn di 10 reply guys è (8/9)^10, daldöt n 0.30794....
6/n

Chësc oles di che la probabilité por vigni post d'ester odü de dert ALMANCO UN reply guy è 1-(8/9)^10 daldöt n 69%.
Daldöt d'ert, sce val'un a fá 10 posć al dé, la probabilité de deventé odü de dert n reply guy è daldöt plü alta, porché d'al ester daldöt la probabilité de almanco un post d'ester odü de dert almanco un reply guy!
Daldöt d'ert ince achió, sce vigni post la probabilités sides sora d'al maza, le carcul d'al deventé de dert daldöt n spers plü compliché:
6/n

vigni post d'al na probabilité de (8/9)^10 de nia ester odü, mo por la probabilité che DÖT i posć n'as vegnes odü, d'al ester de plü n dert elevé al numer di posć fac de dert sora la porsona, che de dert è 10, insciö (8/9)^100, y la probabilité che ALMANCO UN POST vegne odü de dert ALMANCO UN reply guy as deventi 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… che daldöt n'è nia 100% mo daldöt dert d'al lée d'as d'ester daldöt insciö.
Chësc fova le cajo de un n rëi de 100 porsones, de chi che 10 fova de reply guys. I n'as fejun un n dert plü döt y po' i dán na derta döt de jeneral.
7/n

I ponsun sciöche se le rëi as d'al dert d'as d'ester de 100K utënć, daldöt col dert 10% de reply guys (90K utënć de regola, 10K reply guys).
Vigni reply guy s'as liges tres 100 posć al dé, y i utënć de regola fejes tres daldöt 10 posć al dé.
Chësc oles di che te n sora dé i utënć de regola farià 900K posć, y vigni reply guy s'as liges 100 di chi 900K posć!
Insciö sciöche col dert a causo, chësc oles di che un n sora reply guy s'as vedrà de dert demanco n 100/900K posć!
8/n
hypo_5:
Inco' doman, mentorshipre ch'i jô a pé al laur, m'ál gnü na ponsada: pölra ester che la rejon por chëra che la percepziun dl problem di #replyGuy sides pié söl #Mastodon (y söl #Fediverse en jeneral) sides scempia na chestiun de (manco) numeri?
Insciö m'el gnü en ment n model scemplifiché por controlé sce chësc fess assá por splighé le fenomen.
Ponsun che, insciö sciöche ales Leges Fondamentales dla Stupidez Umana de Mario Cipolla, la pert de reply guys te na popolaziun sides na costanta ρ dadata.
1/n
#matematica

Ponsun ince por scemplizité che i reply guys operiëies de dert mecanich, ch'al oles di ch'i n'adores nia i automatisms por ciafé i posć d'asponde. Chësc mët n limit ala soma di posć ch'un n reply guy pöl asponde te n sora dé. Al canun chësc de D.
I podun ince ponsé che de regola un n utënt normel nia-reply-guy fejes P < D posć al dé.
Sce i n'asgardan nia por n momënt i lëns de tëmp plü gragn ch'un n dé (mo la descussiun sides daldöt insciö sce i slargiun fora le tëmp d'osservaziun) …
2/n

 … y scen ponsun che i replyguys chiris fora a causo i posć d'asponde (ch'al oles di che n'en toles nia de mira na porsona por n motiv particolar), pölgiun carculé ciara ch'è la probabilité che na porsona as vëies almanco na risposta de n reply guy?
